name: Bob Casey
subject: Did you know these Pennsylvania facts?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
Peter, fun fact: you probably know that the Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia in 1776, but did you also know that Philly was the capital of the United States from 1790 to 1800?
I’m one of our Commonwealth’s number one fans, so there’s a lot more where that came from.
Before I share, my Finance Director, Taylor, said that I can’t use this email to only recite facts about Pennsylvania, no matter how much I might want to. I should also ask folks to chip in to help me continue representing the place I’ve always called home.
**[Peter, will you chip in now to help me continue fighting for my fellow Pennsylvanians in the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?refcode=em20231217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) **
Now that’s out of the way, are you ready for some more facts?
Did you know that Pennsylvania’s Fayette County is home to Fort Necessity, where George Washington experienced his first military combat in 1754?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?refcode=em20231217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
Or that William Maclay — a member of Pennsylvania’s first United States Senate delegation — kept a diary during his term, which became one of few historical accounts of the 1st United States Congress?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?refcode=em20231217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
Or here’s a fun one: the world’s first computer was built in Philadelphia in 1946!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?refcode=em20231217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
These are just a few of my favorite pieces of Pennsylvania trivia, Peter. I love the Commonwealth and its history. Just recently, my team challenged me to name all 67 of our counties — and I did it in under 10 minutes.
[**Now I’m hoping you’ll chip in $10 or more to support our re-election fight. I’m Pennsylvania through and through, and I need your support to keep making progress for our Commonwealth.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?refcode=em20231217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231217-2-el&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231217-2-el&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231217-2-el&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231217-2-el&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231217-2-el&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231217-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20231217-2&refcode2=1408_552475_aVW_J5&akid=1408%2E552475%2EaVW_J5)
---
Thank you for your support, Peter.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

Now that I’m closing out my first year in Congress, I’m reflecting on _how_ I got here: by listening to _all_ the voices in the room and engaging with the community. This is, and always has been, a people-powered campaign through and through.

Our grassroots supporters have kept our movement pushing forward this past year, so I want to hear about the everyday issues you want to see prioritized in Congress as we head into 2024.

[**_Peter – If you can spare just two minutes, I’m asking you to represent your community and take our End of Year Grassroots Priorities Survey. Our team will be reviewing the answers on Monday morning! >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/D10RA9z52nhWNiTRpPFBig~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnYhG7P0SaaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QuY2FtcGFpZ25kZXB1dHkuY29tL2VveS1zdXJ2ZXktZW4_Y2RtYz0yWmFtTXl5Y2JPTXJyWUpWTGoydGw1dHNiZTgmcmVmY29kZTI9MlphbU15eWNiT01ycllKVkxqMnRsNXRzYmU4JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJaYW1NeXljYk9NcnJZSlZMajJ0bDV0c2JlOFcDc3BjQgplfLuMf2WBd3Z2UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | | | Did you see Chris' first big ad drop this week? Chris' opponents continue ignoring their actual opponent - DONALD TRUMP. Chris is the only person running with the guts to take Trump down. With only 35 days until the New Hampshire primary, the time is never been better than now to show your support and help spread this message by donating. | | Chris Christie's answer about the recent TX Supreme Court abortion case is the only common sense and compassionate one. He's the only candidate willing to give a direct answer and say they got it wrong. Nikki Haley is typically evasive and refuses to say if she thinks it's right or wrong. Ron DeSantis doesn't think the Texas abortion ban goes far enough. ONLY Chris is willing to tell the truth. | | | America's top pundits and journalists have been praising Chris Christie's debate performance after he once again proved to be the only candidate willing to tell the truth about Trump and answer questions directly. | | Last week, right after the debate, Chris went on a Campus Tour in New Hampshire. He met with students at four universities hearing some silly questions and some great thought-provoking questions that have helped restore our hope in America's future. We need the support of every voter, especially young voters to beat Trump and win in New Hampshire next month! | | | | | | | | Thank you for staying tuned with Team Christie. We hope that you have a great holiday! And please if you can spare a few dollars to support our ad, it would make our holidays even brighter! Jordan Team Christie | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

I apologize for reaching out late like this on a Sunday night.

Very soon, the highest court in the land will weigh the Biden DOJ’s motion asking for an _IMMEDIATE_ ruling on taking away my presidential immunity!

There’s no other way to say it, the stakes for our Free Republic have never been higher.

Witch Hunt finally reaching the SUPREME COURT , my attorneys have been working around the clock as we draft our response for the 12/20 DEADLINE. Very soon, the highest court in the land will weigh the Biden DOJ’s motion asking for an IMMEDIATE ruling on taking away my presidential immunity! There’s no other way to say it, the stakes for our Free Republic have never been higher. But at such a pivotal moment in history, I think there’s a response even more important than the one coming from my legal team... ...THE PEOPLE’S RESPONSE: “WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR COUNTRY!” Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. | WEEKLY NEWSLETTERDecember 17th, 2023
---
|
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)** Over the past week, I announced that my campaign has raised** _over $1 million_** to defeat Tim Kaine since launching our campaign a little more than four months ago. Commander Everett Alvarez, US Navy (Ret), the longest serving Prisoner of War at the Hanoi Hilton hosted an event for me with more than a dozen members of the Senate and the House of Representatives. We finished the week with the Army-Navy football game – it wasn’t the result I wanted, but it was a great game. Beat Army (next year)! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)
---
|
---
_**In Case You Missed It**_
---
**[Hung Joins the Night of Hope](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=9ff362d0befb4aeb8cbb7e6edf15254e&_e=XeqelcsdVEIzZc95Qagtjk5gNQyXecmEQuTX4MaXsShE5eR6iqtMxgzQCKOXsRDLM0YRxxCRQRsMqSblcM1ZRYhVIKFYjE_8p8j4J2jFJ-GA-wYz2xDM2ecGqQq58HVlhOf0D09eKtoPdrXEw9PGcU7kXA7wXDVE11w_uPIuNmHltk79RxsqXznYE6PrTrH3KbTjxRvAJSexD1ZHAOwO0qmpE5K1sQ7PYmLnIjVVAcNbUHcWyWvFnYXe91lRrH7AxcjlkNOGVYklFVOSZr075hhb2sXD-s6uOXH1b6SGaUvPylUwh7f2ZU_QVPubiyWLQXRrMGyrP-NMHWlhP7PHog%3D%3D)**
---
Last week, Everett Alvarez who served as a Prisoner of War at the Hanoi Hilton for nearly nine year, hosted an event for me. We were joined by more than a dozen members of the Senate and the House of Representatives at the Capitol Hill Club. This national treasure presented me as potentially the first Vietnamese-American US Senator who will be inaugurated on the 50th anniversary of the fall of Saigon. I appreciate everyone who was able to join us and listen to my message.
---

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231217_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20533%2E4449941%2EIVpIWS)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231217_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20533%2E4449941%2EIVpIWS)**

---

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5c16251b646e476dbd29785667641662&_e=ugtPstv9bFP6Uc4ZcpOebwyTuiVYjt5vGmJ0AFZIEnMNi1k-NYICGFN0__cSqGdH__BQvlPxhwFpSeGFiTSmIa_erol740zYGLzwN4icjraoCKoyi95TkbSnewHoMp6TnC58NYkpzyBli55qv6tr291VxfodhKZrwRjJDSP9tWkvTRhpQ6hb_AVvPPlw8a_qhVc_sE6e78ivqWbPsqWC_0XHbheHNr9bFbE-dpO-Pfr3zHXAu0ByMtpNFR3kUdT9a0iixIjzl4vd5DQhNC2650eRFJikjeZFmyH_gQptpyq20LIxazPUF_gTaqXdG19iyQsys4AGlf4OD6Q168MSmUASuITC5VwQnh_ZMblGiv1yady8cYuxSr8hizhxivP9C2pKxWZJNtGD690rqRj5GQ%3D%3D)

name: Debbie
subject: Florida is NOT a red state. It's a gerrymandered state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this is the one thing that I need you to know about my race
| | |
---
Friend, this is the one thing that I need you to know about my race: **Florida is NOT a red state.****_It's a gerrymandered and voter-suppressed state._**
I've raised my family here. I've built my career here. I've served this state through work with non-profits and in Congress. I've worked hard over the years to get to know every community that calls our state home. And over these past few months, I've spent just about every spare minute meeting even more voters as I travel up and down our beautiful state.
The majority of Florida voters don't support Rick Scott's far-right agenda. They believe in protecting reproductive rights. They don't want to see their taxes go up while the top 1% gets a tax cut. They want to keep their Medicare and Social Security benefits. They don't want leaders who sow division and lie to them.
But the Florida GOP has spent years gerrymandering our state to ensure that they hold on to power in Washington and Tallahassee and totally ignore what the majority of Floridians actually believe in. That reality helps to drive down turnout and leave voters disillusioned with politics. **And then, the extremists who've gerrymandered their way into office pass more and more voter suppression bills that make it harder for voters to cast their ballots every election year.**
**Florida is NOT a red state. But I need your help to prove it.[Will you make a donation now to help me build a winning grassroots campaign? Together, we can inspire voters to fight for change, break down the voter suppression barriers keeping people from the ballot box, and flip this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75353280/444443898/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk498-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmIxOWE5MjMtNDc5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SeRCAhawTLxKQA26rOZUMdDsVJIbNkXj9gSRCs8_C6U=)**

clean_body: | | | Exploitation and extraction of NEW oil and gas fields and NEW coal-fired power stations must be curtailed if the world is to stay within the safe limits of global warming and meet the goal of net zero emissions by 2050. The expectation, even from environmental activists, isn’t to stop extraction everywhere, all at once. The expectation, the urgent need, is to stop NEW fossil fuel extraction. Failure to commit to that will see us overtake the 1.5 degrees Celsius goal to prevent catastrophic climate chaos. The Biden Administration must commit to ending new fossil fuel projects rather than approving massive projects that will shatter any hope of limiting our emissions. ** The International Energy Agency’s executive director says, “If governments are serious about the climate crisis, there can be no new investments in oil, gas, and coal from now.” Reducing greenhouse gas emissions to limit global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius remains possible due to the growth of clean energy technologies, but we need to ramp them up quickly. That won’t happen if we expand fossil fuel extraction. We need bold action NOW to keep the goal of limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees. **** ****It makes no sense to invest in fossil fuels that undermine our future. -Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

name: Our Revolution
subject: Celebrating 2023 Victories and looking ahead!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

With everything going on in the world these days, it's more important than ever to reflect on the positive change we've made and chart a path to a more peaceful, economically just, and democratic world.

That's why we're reaching out to thank you for your incredible support in 2023, which fueled Our Revolution to achieve remarkable victories. Together, we helped elect 77 progressives, strengthening our movement in critical cities like Pittsburgh, St. Louis, and Chicago.

Thanks to your work electing Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago over the full power of the establishment political machine, Chicago has already passed a measure to guarantee a higher wage for tipped workers.

As we look ahead to 2024, a pivotal year for our democracy, we face significant challenges. Can we count on you to make a recurring contribution here to stop a Trump dictatorship, defend peace candidates against AIPAC's smear campaign, replace Kyrsten Sinema, and elect powerful progressives like Rep. Barbara Lee to join Bernie Sanders in the Senate? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13086?t=1011&akid=5078%2E5885482%2EAB7_pq)

AIPAC plans to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to unseat our strongest pro-peace progressive allies, such as Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and many others.

Your continued support is critical because their brave opposition to the murder of civilians has life or death stakes, and we need to have their back against right-wing forces that seek to use their unlimited resources to silence their voices for good.

And, with Joe Biden struggling in key swing states, we need to pick up the slack to mobilize young voters, progressives, and other key constituencies that are necessary to stop a Trump dictatorship that will crush abortion rights, end fair elections, and more.

Our work to defend democracy in 2024 is buttressed by our great success this year.

In Ohio, your support helped us codify abortion rights and defeat an anti-democratic ballot measure funded by right-wing billionaires.

As critical issues like abortion, higher wages, criminal justice reform, and democracy itself take center stage in 2024, your contribution will make a huge impact. Can we count on you to commit to a recurring donation to support our critical work? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13086?t=1012&akid=5078%2E5885482%2EAB7_pq)

Our Revolution also launched a campaign in 2023 to end medical debt, collaborating with Ro Khanna and patient activists nationwide to combat hospital price-gouging and predatory debt collection.

While we continue the fight for Medicare for All, we are actively working to pass CalCare single-payer healthcare in California, supported by leaders like State Assemblyman Ash Kalra and U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee.

In 2023, we also were heartened to see incredible union victories for working people. From SAG-AFTRA writers in Hollywood to UAW workers securing hard-fought contracts with the Big 3, Our Revolution members actively supported workers nationwide in their pursuit of better pay and working conditions.

Together, we can build on our successes, overcome obstacles, and shape a future that reflects our progressive values. Please consider making a recurring monthly contribution today to help Our Revolution defend our rights in the battles ahead in 2024. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13086?t=1013&akid=5078%2E5885482%2EAB7_pq)

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Because Ending Indoctrination in Idaho's Higher Education is Long Overdue
| | [Brian Lenney](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/126a9494-ed48-45d1-987e-90a8d19e18da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e0fe1703-7301-4f5a-9d18-d77aba169d70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
During a period when our educational systems are being closely examined, it's crucial to initiate bold reforms in 2024.
This is why I'm proud to announce a bill that will get us back to our roots and invigorate higher education in Idaho. Aligning with Texas, Florida, [Oklahoma](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/722d7a22-c68c-4933-809b-cc4100913c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and others, this legislation reinforces the commitment to prioritize academic merit and excellence over divisive identity politics and inflammatory rhetoric.
Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work:
[Pledge your support](https://substack..2JToLx_Kq1-057Fhl3BOCabwyIli4T_65Jnsx-tUTW8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139877214)
This isn't just a policy shift; it's a cultural revolution in education that Idahoans are chomping at the bit to be a part of.
## Why This, Why Now?
The decision made in Oklahoma, where DEI policies were banned in state institutions, has reignited a nationwide debate on the role of such policies in our educational institutions.
As we look around the nation, we see:
> "At least 40 anti-DEI bills have been introduced in 22 states and at least seven have passed, according to the [Chronicle of Higher Education](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/87c6206f-d450-4bbf-b3bb-35fc157309ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Earlier this year, [Texas Gov. Greg Abbott](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/83fc603c-3218-4ba5-9c64-74b569358ded?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) banned DEI offices at public colleges and universities, while [Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8ba4a494-5d2d-4bf5-924c-8d1360933ff5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) defunded such programs."1
These actions from various states underscore the growing momentum of a national movement that Idaho should be an active part of.
The inspiration for this bill stems from a fundamental belief that _**Idaho's higher education should emphasize academic merit and excellence - period**_. Because Idaho has always been a place where hard work, dedication, and merit are celebrated, and our educational institutions should reflect these values.
It's a moment for our state to join hands with other forward-thinking states in setting a shining example. We aim to showcase that the foundations of education should be built upon academic rigor and excellence, rather than being swayed by wokeism, Marxism, or race-based discrimination.
## The Bill: Core Objectives & Rationale
The bill seeks to emphasize academic merit and excellence as the primary drivers of success within our educational institutions by:
1. **Disbanding DEI Bureaucracies:** The bill unequivocally bars the allocation of funds to support DEI offices, officers, and employees at Idaho's public higher education institutions.
2. **Eliminating Diversity Statements:** It removes the consideration of diversity statements in both employment processes and college admissions.
3. **Ending Mandatory Diversity Training:** The legislation firmly puts an end to mandatory diversity training for students, faculty, and staff at these institutions.

The rationale behind this bill is clear...
America needs to revisit the core principles of education, which are knowledge acquisition, intellectual growth, and scholarly pursuit.
To achieve this, we must shape an educational system that acknowledges and rewards students for their academic achievements, placing a strong emphasis on meritocracy and academic excellence.
## Impact on Idaho's Higher Education
The enactment of this bill is set to significantly elevate Idaho's educational standards. By emphasizing academic merit and excellence, we're not only enhancing our students' educational experience but also elevating our institutions' stature nationally.
This strategic shift in focus is more than a local change; it's a pioneering move with the potential to set a precedent, inspiring other states and nations to consider similar reforms, thereby contributing to a broader transformation in global education.
Because at the end of the day, student success isn't determined by privilege, ideology, or diversity quotas; it's built on the solid foundation of hard work and academic achievement. This principle stands as a testament to the core values of our educational system, emphasizing that true merit and effort are the real keys to achievement.

Eliminating Diversity Statements: It removes the consideration of diversity statements in both employment processes and college admissions. 3. Ending Mandatory Diversity Training: The legislation firmly puts an end to mandatory diversity training for students, faculty, and staff at these institutions. The rationale behind this bill is clear... America needs to revisit the core principles of education, which are knowledge acquisition, intellectual growth, and scholarly pursuit. To achieve this, we must shape an educational system that acknowledges and rewards students for their academic achievements, placing a strong emphasis on meritocracy and academic excellence. Impact on Idaho's Higher Education The enactment of this bill is set to significantly elevate Idaho's educational standards. By emphasizing academic merit and excellence, we're not only enhancing our students' educational experience but also elevating our institutions' stature nationally. This strategic shift in focus is more than a local change; it's a pioneering move with the potential to set a precedent, inspiring other states and nations to consider similar reforms, thereby contributing to a broader transformation in global education. Because at the end of the day, student success isn't determined by privilege, ideology, or diversity quotas; it's built on the solid foundation of hard work and academic achievement. This principle stands as a testament to the core values of our educational system, emphasizing that true merit and effort are the real keys to achievement. | | ---|---|--- *Bill language to be released in January 2024 1 Nampa's Senator Brian Lenney is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Nampa's Senator Brian Lenney that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2023 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37929%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lJdAuX8KSlaaXPJnEwBqxA&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37920%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5U31%2fNPM9CEiXc8L%2biSHzA&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37920%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5U31%2fNPM9CEiXc8L%2biSHzA&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | == | Update December 18 | | This is a throwback McGuire Family Christmas card with our five children. Where does the time go? | | | ---|--- | Fellow legislators and I have been submitting legislation to make life better for Virginians. The fourth bill I submitted for the upcoming General Assembly session is the Tim Tebow Bill to allow Home School students to participate in public school sports. What do you think? Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what I have been up to: | Congress | | We must protect our God given rights; Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. In Congress, I will support the America First Agenda. Among many other things, this includes tackling our outrageous national debt, 100 percent securing our southern border, fully supporting our military service members and veterans, and ending useless foreign wars. I will staunchly protect the Bill of Rights including the freedom of assembly. I am committed to restraining the FBI and other agencies that have been weaponized against the American people. A big part of my job as a Navy SEAL was to stop drug dealers South of the Border. I will do everything possible to stop the supply of fentanyl and stop the fatal overdose epidemic in our country. | We Can Do Better Than Good. | My never Trumper opponent continues to change his comments about Trump. You gotta be really against Trump to endorse his opponent less than a year after receiving a Trump endorsement and on the day Trump received a ridiculous indictment. If you click this link and watch the video, you will ask yourself what else is he not telling you the truth about. == | John Daly Speaking Truth on Tucker Carlson (Link) | == | "Life was better under Trump." Watch the John Daly interview with Tucker Carlson. == | Crowd Roars for Trump at UFC 296 | == | The crowd was fired up for President Trump at UFC 296. == | Body Armor for Israel | == | From my friend and constituent Bob Marcellus of Powhatan. Bob has partnered with Sheriffs all over Virginia and the Attorney Generals office to help our ally Israel get surplus bullet proof vests primarily for their civilian first responders. I want to personally thank Bob Marcellus, AG Jason Miyares, three Sheriffs in my district (my Goochland Sheriff Stephen Creasey, the Louisa Sheriff Don Lowe, and the Powhatan Sheriff Brad Nunnally). I also want to thank the following sheriffs from all over Virginia. Rockingham Sheriff, Augusta Sheriff, Prince George Sheriff, Lancaster Sheriff, New Kent Sheriff, Virginia Beach Sheriff, Fauquier Sheriff, Madison Sheriff, Haymarket Police, Bland Sheriff, Wise Sheriff, Bristol Sheriff, Montgomery Sheriff, Henry Sheriff, Buchanan Sheriff, Warren Sheriff, Rappahannock Sheriff, Chesapeake Sheriff, Roanoke Police Read the Richmond Times Dispatch story here == Read the Israeli news story here. == Basically many Rabbi's put together a logistical network with many volunteers. They got this stuff on a plane and sent to Israel ASAP. Because of efforts started right here in our district, now other states are following Virginia's lead including Florida, Nevada, and more to donate surplus body armor and tactical gear to to Israel. If you would like to help, this is the website used by Bob Marcellus and AG Jason Miyares. www.thesupportofisrael.org | Polls Show TRUMP Landslide | == | Watch this Benny Johnson video showing strong polling numbers for Trump in swing states. == | Congratulations Louisa County CA Rusty McGuire | | Congratulations to Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney, Virginia National Guard Colonel, and my brother Rusty McGuire for being appointed to Governor Glenn Youngkin's Criminal Justice Services Board. Those who have witnessed Rusty in the courtroom know he is confident and competent. The word on the street to criminals is you better not commit a crime in Louisa County because Rusty will not rest until all criminals are fully prosecuted. He will represent Louisa well on the board. We are proud of you! | Song of the Day, Creedence Clearwater Revival | == | For a little inspiration, Clearwater Revival - Fortunate Son (Official Music Video) | Supervisor Pat Obannon Retirement | | | | We attended Supervisor Pat Obannon's retirement ceremony. Thank you for your many years of service to Henrico County and our Commonwealth, | Rep. Bob Good Had 'NO PLAN" | | In addition to losing the House and the Senate in Virginia, a one vote majority in Congress is a very dangerous situation indeed. | Christmas Party Season | | | | | This is great time of the year for friends and fellowship. | Sunday Church Day | | | My wife and I attend our Church 8am each Sunday and then I attend a second or third church most Sundays since 2017. So far I've been to 355 different places of worship since 2017. This is a great way to gain truth, wisdom, and discernment. | Trump 2024! | Vote Trump! We do not have a country without a secure border. We the people are less safe at the local, state, and federal level because of dangerous anti-American Biden policies. The enemy is not at the gate, the enemy is through the gate. Our military must be merit based (remove CRT), have the best equipment, and the best training. Under Biden we have: -Open Borders -Violent Crime Way Up -Weak Military -Runaway National Debt -Cultural Warfare -Mass Inflation -Terrible Economy -Unaffordable Housing -Global Conflict The one man strong enough to fix it and Save America is Donald J Trump. Please make a plan to vote. We have 45 days of early voting, the first day to vote is January 19, 2024. The 2024 presidential Virginia primary final day to vote is March 5. We are praying for Trump and our nation. God will determine the outcome! Visit the Trump == | Trump Store Abingdon | | | | | | | | | Virginia Trump supporters got together in Abingdon, Virginia for the GRAND REOPENING of the Mountain Patriots Trump Store! It was great to see Ramona Christian and fellow Delegate Wren Williams there as well. We need elected officials who are TRUMP 100%! Looking for Trump related gift ideas? Visit Mark Matney's Mountain Patriots store in Abingdon for for Trump Merch needs. | Ashland Legislative Agenda | | | | We discussed legislative priorities in Ashland this week. | Christmas Parade Chatham, Virginia | | | | | | | | | | | I had so much fun meeting you and giving out Trump signs at the Chatham Christmas Parade! | Another Christmas Party With Friends! | | | | | | | | | Christmas is a great time of the year to catch up with friends! | Memes/ Messages | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The 5th Congressional District | == | == | I am looking forward to celebrating Christmas with family and friends. Our best days are ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the fifth Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | == | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

subject: Florida has been victim to some of the worst mass shootings in our country.
body:
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2d16a15-9ebe-4aef-a02e-1106ac48eeb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

| |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28f4bdc3-c93e-4025-ad1c-83606cd1050c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter — I’m writing to you today because I am proud to endorse Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for U.S. Senate in Florida. I love Florida, and am proud to call it home — but our state has been victim to some of the worst mass shootings in our country. Florida families, including mine, have been shattered by shootings in Parkland, Fort Lauderdale, and Orlando. I know from personal experience that Florida desperately needs a leader in the United States Senate who cares about public safety and fiercely defends the right of every Floridian to live free of gun violence. Debbie Murcasel-Powell is that leader. Meanwhile, as a Senator, Rick Scott has sided with the gun lobby every time. Debbie is up against a man who bought this Senate seat for himself last time round — and still only won by less than 1%! **[I hope you’ll join me in supporting Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for Senate by splitting a gift between her campaign and Blue Amp Action — with grassroots support, I know she can deliver the leadership Florida deserves. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9940801-130a-4932-bdb0-104966c8720b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

---
| Thank you for being in this fight. I know Debbie, and I know we can build a brighter future for Florida. Fred Guttenberg
Brady PAC National Advisory Council

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25e0be11-6cfe-4cf0-9bde-8d230f44898b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: WA Democrats are, collectively, the Christmas Grinch
body:
We're naming Washington's legislative Democrats as the collective Christmas Grinch for all the ways they managed to ruin 2023 for working families across our state. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62596417:skktJbiNk:m:1:2610672541:ADBD4F79BC437A98308419FC06BA4154:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

We here at Shift Washington want to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas and joyous holiday season!

Unfortunately, as in so many recent years, we know it's been a tough one for many families across Washington state. Inflation remains a problem. And, on top of high prices for basic services, the many new taxes imposed by Democrats in Olympia appear intent on making life more difficult - and far more expensive - for everyday families.

If there's one political lesson Democrats should have learned from 2023, it's that their policies are destructive and highly unpopular. Unfortunately, Democrats rarely engage in introspective thoughts. They are moving full speed ahead on enforcing their extreme measures. Here are a few examples:

* The Democrat carbon tax has left working families struggling to cover basic living expenses, from the cost of they pay at the pump to the cost of heating their homes, to their everyday groceries.
* The Democrats' long-term care tax promises to take even more money out of workers' paychecks, with little-to-no benefit in return.
* The Democrats' unconstitutional state income tax, starting with capital gains, is so sketchy that the U.S Supreme Court has it under review.
* Finally, the Democrats' soft-on-crime policies - like their ban on police pursuits - have effectively blocked law enforcement officers from doing their job, causing rising crime rates.

_It 's these policies that require naming Washington's legislative Democrats as this year's Christmas Grinch._

Shift WA has spent a decade as a voice of accountability in our state, from uncovering the liberal attack network pouring millions into the far-Left's agenda to the continual efforts to expose Gov. Jay Inslee's extreme plans. **[Will you help us continue our work in 2024 by contributing $10, $25, or $50 today?
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62596418:skktJbiNk:m:1:2610672541:ADBD4F79BC437A98308419FC06BA4154:r)**
[**By allowing this to continue this work, your donation is a gift to all other Washingtonians this holiday season.
**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62596418:skktJbiNk:m:1:2610672541:ADBD4F79BC437A98308419FC06BA4154:r)
Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62596419:skktJbiNk:m:1:2610672541:ADBD4F79BC437A98308419FC06BA4154:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14371866&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oskktJbiNk).
---

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop U.S. funds from supporting overseas pollution
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2203842?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Picture this: towering smokestacks releasing dark clouds into the air. A web of metal pipes snaking over the ground around a massive toxic facility. When the wind blows right, **you can smell the pollution sweeping into your community.** Would you want a natural gas plant next to where you live? How would you feel if you found out a **foreign government was funding a polluting natural gas plant in your community?** That’s exactly what the U.S. might do in Guyana, Friend. Only we’re not just funding a power plant. It’s a whole fossil fuel complex – including a natural gas separation facility, power plant, and reckless offshore pipeline. This project **undermines climate goals** and **threatens toxic pollution** for the Guyanese people. Yet, we’ve heard Vice President Harris is pushing for this fossil fuel disaster. [**_Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to urge Vice President Harris to OPPOSE U.S. support for fossil fuel pollution in Guyana! Sign the petition now!_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2203843?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2203844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This natural gas plant is completely unnecessary. In fact, installing solar panels on roofs in Guyana would _**cost less, generate local jobs, and meet the energy needs of Guyanese communities**_ – all without the pollution that will damage people’s health and destroy our climate.
Instead, our funds are poised to support this disastrous fossil fuel project that will **_make companies like ExxonMobil even richer while communities suffer._** And while the Guyanese people will feel the most direct impacts, the emissions this plant causes will have global consequences – climate-fueled **fires, floods, droughts, and storms will intensify.**
The U.S. has pledged not to support new fossil fuel projects like this one. **Without your help, we could violate our own commitment![_We need 219 more messages from your area by 11:59pm TONIGHT to hit our goal and help STOP the natural gas plant in Guyana! Add your name now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2203845?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2203844?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kate DeAngelis
Senior International Finance Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth **
|

# MONDAY, DECEMBER 18, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1917, the Senate passed the 18th Amendment to the Constitution, prohibiting the "_manufacture, sale, or transportation of intoxicating liquors._ " Prohibition became a loosely enforced law in 1920 and remained in force until 1933. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u6yAUAOCngS0WHH4zMNzFW-7a0QJzHJ8KG4vQoL59pc59gU_6Ph7LI1Kh8_k_Hhj6Vpe4dnrjIuEm_Q3UonkOGyKg4hikE3AX3lrJ95Bhc1YYWBOalKLSLm2wgpb-jtqbyCmAACVBeimMUXZSXqNbhQFn493mzLTATL226bPS2Xfcynd9Y5vWevAS9t6vF1P_GMwM5jHG1HcctZU8YptqezKYC8Z2Mphjql_9NgYxmK9Wd0rUqZ68hXwNKoVe1jEtnkek8sv3v7c_AQAA__8UL1bu)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbeg8x0YGDz8UsT007UjMvYB1xocETdV376qOjb7N32v4zR6SXKsL35nV5Y8-VDkwZPBi-kuSFOto1uYkUmzMy1gD521Rm-O-xkaG1rsG4gheJo5LNHDDJF8WIwWh4Bk0HQGmoZsRV3NbYAGW-t7G6OqgaOUfFZvWY6y8ZK-8oPPKuRdJ7eVcrsr-qdwUDj8JQqH0a8S_svx_mNoYEXXePuUlORuW1XDuntJv9Z-lF3RtQZ9uudGl-cD3wEAAP__PNJcRg). Today's edition is sponsored by [Kailo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdG5_OfOIMHhJStLCB1jEzu0hw4dZVYRbw9gpntmz7pdzlP5yxFbteXvHFqS53y3OTBk8GTiSe0k9OUFmZkqzmZHnCAGILRa7J2AAJkT2SDNz6_O0_BDEzg4wyLloSA1qCJBry3obPRcT-Dxz7kIRApB0zS6t59VLm1lZfyXR-8d3PddElra_dD2SeFo8KROJeju9bPLKV2UhWOaF-D92_hN417vgxR4aj3RPcvKUWO0CsH1y1L-Tu2_4E_AQAA__9-_k4d), a modern pain-relief patch that may be a great help to you. [Check it out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnsbdG5_OfOIMHhJStLCB1jEzu0hw4dZVYRbw9gpntmz7pdzlP5yxFbteXvHFqS53y3OTBk8GTiSe0k9OUFmZkqzmZHnCAGILRa7J2AAJkT2SDNz6_O0_BDEzg4wyLloSA1qCJBry3obPRcT-Dxz7kIRApB0zS6t59VLm1lZfyXR-8d3PddElra_dD2SeFo8KROJeju9bPLKV2UhWOaF-D92_hN417vgxR4aj3RPcvKUWO0CsH1y1L-Tu2_4E_AQAA__9-_k4d)!

_Editor's note: As of late last night, very little was known about the car that[smashed into a Secret Service vehicle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAQQH-NvRHB8emBoUu2dO1o4eOIr8J2hFGi_vsqnTs-veXpfd3mW-LK-_0zbRR7OeaEnZ80KxAqCNCzGXMsREB6pKi8hEkG59S4RjBSuwUsTMajc0sgPYGTwVtVsndu5AgStAIVlLRWu4sOhjxKC96lyeU8GEmZ-9Eu3wfvfaVSf44ntQse21jj2vvjHPTHANcBrumx0-t8qze0zlhpgOvCmXaBqYkX1433ez92gS2dqzgJG3VxUnsykijFeNIZFKIpGpNdgl1IpjQRUPbT2GJ-vLhWPp0fjLxvietfSv__zG8AAAD__-7FY6k) while President Biden was in the vicinity. The president heard the crash and was quickly driven away as the driver of the vehicle was surrounded. Here's a [video of the incident](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71utDAQAJ_G7g7Z67-lcPE1dPe1KdEeXg5H5jjB5lDePkrSphtpitG8Xccr1VYf9_-0cpZ5G2mS-uLRwsXiBdzodckzM7DTnG0y0BuM0eol92T6covBOCYMYQ4315MrFj0YNpPXNYMBZ8GiNSG42Dn0nCYTIEXqYynKGy5Vtr173-pDFp7b5_bivZu2Vbe8iDwP5f4pGBQMclaRX6dg2Ok8qPEuh4LhEJKPb7DJxYCAGIJ3HgMm1Hsuz7O2Vo-YlDf3lWr7Ccjfv18BAAD__60hU9w). _
|

## Israel Uncovers Major Tunnel at Gaza Border
The Israeli military uncovered an unusually large [concrete and iron-girded tunnel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL_GZEbuNtgQOLiEbC69EPXgBnwyeGR7Bt19_YqNN62SSq_en8f8oBDDuf2mg11d00xLDR-eASUMEvXcNd6tzMi6YQdW4agGY6DZ3TB042p6r0drNACM_kmkgBhg9XakJjhUqAFhANX32rR66NguqkdraDTei06xDzXl9m8KZ915jf_Sh3O7pKOJbq_1VYT-JXASOF3X1WZ-V87l7u8k5egFTkfwPrJkKlXgFEomjvJ9LvdUkc-wbVyq3OmgIuv7PDnKkynLjf6TfKbsOcubVN6nrcCpyc6_rhBjKMaKTm0HhfgNVX929BUAAP__BLZoLw) designed to carry vehicles from Gaza right to the border, the biggest Hamas tunnel the Israelis have found. The size and location of the tunnel ([See Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQxvGnMRvofHaMGTx0YUvXjuhiH-EqgyNwg9qnr9K5yzd90k_6f1ynK0mW7f5OK4c6l4lilSdPGlvtWzSTbVKYmZFNw0H3gAN453SzBEs343lASt4PEYhvcHMwWzbJQ2TbSEBAo1F7DZeLcZ3xlvsIF-wdDS4lZYGT1LJ3n0W2uvCcv8uT9y6WtclhqfVxKPOmcFQ4nufZPUqWKrG8DgrHjc9D4fhSFI4aX9MrHOXYiXNbv7aNc3unH2oXWuloAbRBPdhmD-lxSs5yuF5ZuK8k-U-t_0f4DQAA__9Rrlsw)), which would have taken years to build, raised questions about how Israeli surveillance missed it. The entryway is a few hundred yards from a heavily fortified crossing. The discovery comes while Israel is dealing with the fallout from the mistaken [shooting of three hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2v4yAQAH8N7taCxV8pXEQnucu1V1rELPZeMETABeV-_VNe_aopphnNn9t6M-w57L_NSXNxcTVb4RetCkFNgHrtGjs7IiTd0KxGiRc5DYNqjnnUqic3dtq5kXCaLkqTGsx9o7vsEFXDM0rUCtWkZN_rodVTR-MmexwHcxmsFZ0kyyWm9m_kUA5y_h1flNotno2fj1KeWeirwEXgUmttzxw-TuBCAf5lgUug-kGNyVuBC1sHJ-diHhT8Gx7sPVnQwDkZ8gxHzMXslIED7Oa_gXJwBs5QD1OgEjxCrJAjOJMELibB9ar8r6moJs32Wdl7zsMoOrmfhv13aPn521cAAAD__13Pb2M) by their own troops. The hostages were killed during intense fighting between Hamas and Israeli soldiers.
## Trump's Lead Against Biden Growing
New polls show Donald Trump's lead growing. In the GOP primary race, Trump's up 7 points since November and [26 points since February](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGnwR0WDDa2C4rbuMttt7SIGZJZYYOADcnbr5J62_MVR_q_LtvFUqDz9t8eaKqPm90rPXCTwOXMQW1D54xHBFQdGjkJWMSstezuZhl3Z7UTsHgL0yxnu4PzHhZU16tcrh0ZEKAkyFmKcVS6V_OA0y5GmLRdtHNsEOioxtx_RzrrHX14xQfmfo9HF8y91lSY-sdgZbC21nofnye28nYGa_SedrKBpxhCYbD6-ORv_wy85p8jFR7QOn6LiadMh80v3sjhWbpsXGoUAhU9sUHcDkvhc1z_7vAbAAD__wS5YVM). Fewer than one-third of Republican voters support any of his rivals, according to a new Fox News poll. In a Rasmussen poll of likely voters, Trump led President Biden in a head-to-head matchup [by 10 points, ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAUAH8NbETw-DIDQxdv6drRIuYRvwiD5aBU_fdVOnc76aST7uu6XBNVavfPtGMcpS9pHfTCRYFQkwC9GJ5jQQTUHKPyEoKcnFN8i1arW0435TD4bEJQSa6uJCgaPdpgOUWQoBWoSUlrtbvoyaBfpQXvUnA5MyMx0-jn5dGpjQ1L_ekvPC9r33mN2xjHk-kPBjODeWy4Ua1vx2DuBzXqjcG8pv1IdH-j0Q688oKe4tFR3ChjE9REORFFSbUymPkZ8_FNtdLTeWbkfU_0F-Xj___fAAAA__-4U1rF)48%-38%. In November, Rasmussen had Biden ahead 46%-42%. A Bloomberg poll shows Trump leading Biden in six key battleground states: Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin.
## Feds to Back Mortgages up to $1.15 Million
Government lenders Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac increased their maximum home loan [to $1.15 million for 2024](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhSAYRp8GNwj8IHoHhi5ut2tHQ-FHaUFuEK_x7Zs2HTp0-5LvDCfn7T7fbUxxW15tRtNCma1r8YmzACpGCnJWnTcBEVB2aMTA4cZHrUW3GiX8qFA5eIfe99y7ILWDGw_gJHzz0QAHKUCMgve91EyOCgfHexi0vWnvieLoYyuVfZS4tRVDusoTK3Mld8msrT12Il8ITASm8zyZtzFd2cbEXGHHJ4HpKkfNZcOLwJRLbYtdcCcw2dqiS0gFjLzng_xz02C3LSLNFmmo6P3PdnQtGWkqdtvpWo4d6aNGhztbW05dNf5xxpTirgei-PIrkbv2f7WvAAAA___SHm-3), a new record, to keep in line with rising house prices. That loan amount is only for specific high-cost areas. Most U.S. counties will be capped at $766,550 next year, up from $726,200 this year. In some high-cost cities, such as San Francisco and San Jose, 80% of the homes cost more than $1 million. Here's a ranking of the top 15 metro areas [by share of million-dollar residences.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOqzAQheGngQ5kj43BhYvbpMttt0QTPIFZGYzwBLRvv0rq7c-nI_1f9_GOnHib_-NKQZ55xEn4pFFDo4cGzGjrGJ5EQKamoHsFXg3O6XoJ6EB5Gx_kpsG7h-206z1a6wEpovY1B1BgNOhBq64zrjWDpX5SHfQOvYuxsooiSz7a78ybLPRMP_mko53yWqewiOylMv8quFVwu66rPbm8ME24s2DiIu9hBbeVU-K8NTGnhEez5JVK8yrNxMJUPtzMOc-JxpPnjUSoPkLcr7crrq-smlfk9PmVvzP8BgAA__8UG2Ak)
* * *

|

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6638ba27804d30a50d605862904eb7&_e=C7WKoCsb_gr2Ab5wtRsLmQzBEZl6stC28ysIZlrhgMJVjvmUJuUavtDc26nubifE96MkvHVsEsmvmb2aJYU_rMG1CrgpUiAglpNZJGZ2fgwQCTV-M-e84mDlrVXUuRJShMzK4zXaftfvLXVecKZnrpsRNFEvI9meEUQM3SkmHByxmX3AJXlUPBSgHsMrNlTGrCtygKyfyWZFr76JN-iA6qlgpb8WPlVruoaE9lvmzcPc5g_DItTOGIJhbSycozVELDQIuU4MQmvgqpTzuasXu1Zw3eFmMkcofxYYlbHzOO3ATbRLlQymfCNC63xd0yCp8PwROiBuTv054U0quZsDg7oEwb_DAqdBjSQ-OCsaW8qmxiDzwe-tJY10PDg0ZHl6Sgy6nWg4UlV7u0AzqWqZRg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6638ba27804d30a50d605862904eb7&_e=C7WKoCsb_gr2Ab5wtRsLmQzBEZl6stC28ysIZlrhgMJVjvmUJuUavtDc26nubifE96MkvHVsEsmvmb2aJYU_rMG1CrgpUiAglpNZJGZ2fgwQCTV-M-e84mDlrVXUuRJShMzK4zXaftfvLXVecKZnrpsRNFEvI9meEUQM3SkmHByxmX3AJXlUPBSgHsMrNlTGrCtygKyfyWZFr76JN-iA6qlgpb8WPlVruoaE9lvmzcPNeUUZ5R9mkaZVEnt3giEY40jNE1M2vRhYy_d6y7objSWdtMyp-ATOS_1bkJdIUOFm90NiZy4SxnuoRoaKWDcLf4XjcaajKShGvg_2vgcILDy92oofSW4wqUxeWTB1mHymG9_BUpPpGM3DqlB_i4ojik5fc_59Xra0m5UfM1FOgA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8f6638ba27804d30a50d605862904eb7&_e=C7WKoCsb_gr2Ab5wtRsLmQzBEZl6stC28ysIZlrhgMJVjvmUJuUavtDc26nubifE96MkvHVsEsmvmb2aJYU_rMG1CrgpUiAglpNZJGZ2fgwQCTV-M-e84mDlrVXUuRJShMzK4zXaftfvLXVecKZnrpsRNFEvI9meEUQM3SkmHByxmX3AJXlUPBSgHsMrNlTGrCtygKyfyWZFr76JN-iA6qlgpb8WPlVruoaE9lvmzcM8xzcxW6Y-XSwrUhKSChgzVrlB_G_P6By8gg6jvZk-ZwID3EO7X_aLYyhLBUhVQcTh6gbLBp3sKB_hF6C1mrGnP8qmpSuT_P_QK8Su1ScFFmBfXSFJZRlnnBJG6oMjMYiqGnjPmwuDumyEs-6C9YO9kGsJvDq8zpk0j4Rrhy4Cpw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Several blue states have deprived rural counties of the ability to
reject the massive green energy projects that corporations want to
site in their communities, while green industrial interests and

name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37937%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PKodKvH%2fUxDpl53zctZJcQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37938%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZQlW9GLKCfvH2naSNCKH4w&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37939%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xwB8eICE7BDpURMyQB0hxw&sysid=1)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1af7adba0c3c4eadb64ea578b8583959&_e=0L_SSc0k2E6RaAd2mUJC3BNWr2Py9GF9SSWbOSHyTRmMUic5iFvs9a3wufMqVmXoCxZIQ4a1g786D9XElt-DAwWCd8koe-ANOjHB-BWncTXZUmIwrpYHWMYIak5-SDh4FGzK-GlvLSOsv3qNlS4fftfRdsoCHQL85CpcTVFeNbJ8OlEymTCgMPs4-hx2BByCEJKqt07JNkI3VN2ng9PwDnX1Ib_Myz4aZ5tcgaGy_Ja5RPR-lhA47fzylACjIf7g3ryGPO7kZ7iLt2MoNVM6pm_IX0oRULc87jGnePg18oZV0Uyp2AqrVcNfUUnKANygo7qlUGudKe697lgTJSjzG47QlUE_LOmxaCcmp-fh8s9Z7ptwGG33O9U6KBwxkyMrI3PK1KzMC3iu4wU6rRzxhw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1af7adba0c3c4eadb64ea578b8583959&_e=0L_SSc0k2E6RaAd2mUJC3BNWr2Py9GF9SSWbOSHyTRmMUic5iFvs9a3wufMqVmXoCxZIQ4a1g786D9XElt-DAwWCd8koe-ANOjHB-BWncTXZUmIwrpYHWMYIak5-SDh4FGzK-GlvLSOsv3qNlS4fftfRdsoCHQL85CpcTVFeNbJ8OlEymTCgMPs4-hx2BByCEJKqt07JNkI3VN2ng9PwDnX1Ib_Myz4aZ5tcgaGy_JZr2JMCSSIPe38xRGqKlwbpzQ0RUskOCoVKuzKpPFbDrZ_20_FU-uAGDrWPVJ4bLeKltQo5TisxxXYBAAfBnHOg3ol-0gl3FWyBKKPOf6tg-0I0jIkIlEAsROXZ2DqLZyWm9Wneangxt87L5LF_Hhie5V8YaMYWDoKYM4vQnYPFWw%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1af7adba0c3c4eadb64ea578b8583959&_e=0L_SSc0k2E6RaAd2mUJC3BNWr2Py9GF9SSWbOSHyTRmMUic5iFvs9a3wufMqVmXoCxZIQ4a1g786D9XElt-DAwWCd8koe-ANOjHB-BWncTXZUmIwrpYHWMYIak5-SDh4FGzK-GlvLSOsv3qNlS4fftfRdsoCHQL85CpcTVFeNbJ8OlEymTCgMPs4-hx2BByCEJKqt07JNkI3VN2ng9PwDnX1Ib_Myz4aZ5tcgaGy_Jay2Ose-Nu0nUJk558PSdcddRj_-1WQdjdT8vfsi7Mr7cloa8_dEVf6FKPbGy3eOyOU8E0-NUZpGyFAWHNWbG_73flQOe85UoxSN_XvwKAaWRSJsjceoznQ6D32K_JHjkO0BGjNszD3an1mEZmpskhfhFYGNMi8eXYvK4_orwEsgA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
