name: Governor Chris Sununu
subject: I am proud to endorse Nikki Haley
body:
I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States, and I am asking you to join me in being a part of this movement.

We must support the best conservative candidate in this race who can win in November 2024 to deliver results in 2025.

New Hampshire has never looked to candidates of the past who had their chance but failed to deliver on their promises. We never settle -- we look to the future at the candidate who can offer a fresh vision with a real opportunity to deliver on their promises.

In six weeks, Granite Staters will head to the polls in record numbers and uphold our 100-year responsibility of hosting the first-in-the-nation primary.

**[We have an obligation to get it right-- and Nikki Haley is the best person for the job.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zz%2bqkV15NZXvoDOxp%2bBrgQ&sysid=1 "We have an obligation to
get it right — and Nikki Haley is the best person for the job.")**

---
| | [SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=abpbkHa3lAFFIkIR52wZCA&sysid=1)
---

The polling is clear -- Nikki is the best Republican candidate to beat the Democrats this November.

Just recently, a new poll from the Wall Street Journal showed that in a head-to-head matchup with President Joe Biden, Nikki Haley beats him by 17 points -- an astronomical number that should give confidence and momentum to Republican candidates up and down the ballot.

With Nikki Haley at the top of the ticket, Republicans will win the presidency, the United States Senate and House, retain the New Hampshire governor’s office, and expand majorities in our state legislature.

Nikki Haley is running to save America. She will crack down on illegal immigration and stop the flow of deadly fentanyl pouring over our southern border. In these uncertain times, she offers a steady hand to right the ship here at home and abroad.

Nikki Haley is surging in New Hampshire because she’s running a true “Live Free or Die” campaign. She’s pounding the pavement, meeting voters in their living rooms, holding town halls, and going diner-to-diner. She’s not just talking wherever she goes, she’s listening -- and that’s what it takes to be a great leader. She’s looked us in the eye, answered our questions, and taken the time to build trust.

We must consolidate behind one candidate -- the candidate who has the best chance of victory.

**[I hope you will join me in supporting Nikki Haley for president. Please consider making a contribution to her campaign today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vnC%2f54K1Bu5DozhIiwld3w&sysid=1 "I hope you will join me in
supporting Nikki Haley for president. Please consider making a contribution to her
campaign today. ")**

Thank you,

Gov. Chris Sununu

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687198%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iOn%2figBYR9Nj9N4vlEzVew&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687199%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6VaTJhUayjSncFasv7Fmww&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687190%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AALTW%2bzaNvlVq5OkLSuTiQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JhcfYlKhW%2blKdQcDsyHPuQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RJMXRjmfTIpEWhHSudYuMg&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l%2fVyxof3BTYkPCNmNT90%2fA&sysid=1 "DONATE")

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3iak8vecfa4t4bh792pqsrcatjpringbemghivg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cji61o76c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7si2gne336nem5hh15ikofgmqepqv9lnnuc1i9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cji61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjag82282a6i2hnnm1m9ii5586j1br722t9qhcro_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cji61o76c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zttrgm9m6cjglc26nm4qmv9q14pq941j5rrkuc0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cji61o76c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: An opportunity to save our nation
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z137ch5ekk15gv7ft2q6t27lbp4mvcu15chc8ido_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh60or2clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tn621s4v5721e1slhlnkn6vs4o9p9sa043iqa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh60or2clh2bs)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. Please make a tax-deductible contribution today to help us defeat the leftist deep state and create major conservative victories for America using this secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50u7ssh9k2tiad66o1dmu6j1nhe8iopf5aauc7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh60or2clh2bs)
**
---
| |
---

---

While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9cik6qg4gvkto1k3ag3rdkiv6dbrhfu6vv38s98_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh68pb2chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41v0g7qj7ee6e9sf1q032s4j4q3tkk9hand1n08_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh68pb2chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

# We Can Do This!

**Peter -**
I am so grateful for the outpouring of support and kindness I have received since launching my campaign.

With you by my side, I know that we can make a positive impact on communities here in TX-8, and if we flip this seat, **we can potentially change the entire electoral map!**
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=0bd6472545&e=a2a46ff12c)
I want to raise awareness of kitchen table issues that matter most. Things like education, access to healthcare, and the struggles that everyday Texans face in our trying times.

These are the things that Texans want to change. We deserve fair and compassionate representation that works to improve our lives, and that is what I aim to provide.

[**If you are ready to see real representation and see one of us deliver for all of us, please donate to our campaign today to ensure that we have the support needed to flip Texas**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=7c42792882&e=a2a46ff12c)[**BLUE**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=766a20d433&e=a2a46ff12c)[**.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=8e2fa1dbf1&e=a2a46ff12c)

Attack On Your Freedom

In the wake of the controversial Executive Order 14067...

[Pres. But the work is only starting. I know running in a primary takes money so we still need help. Any contribution makes a difference.

John

name: American Update
subject: Blue States Are Stripping Rural Counties Of Ability To Prevent Green Energy Takeover Of Their Communities
body:
And EXCLUSIVE: Swing-State GOP Senate Candidate Announces Slate Of New Law Enforcement Endorsements Ahead Of 2024

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AEcEDT5rYeDysjCiF0vy%2bA&sysid=1 Blue States Are Stripping Rural Counties Of Ability To Prevent Green Energy Takeover Of Their Communities

Several blue states have deprived rural counties of the ability to reject the massive green energy projects that corporations want to site in their communities, while green industrial interests and environmentalist groups have poured money into state capitals. Michigan, California, New York and Illinois have all passed legislation that consolidates authority over land use issues and rules with state-level bureaucrats at

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PiSXxHCqEVIBpRroqrwzjw&sysid=1 EXCLUSIVE: Swing-State GOP Senate Candidate Announces Slate Of New Law Enforcement Endorsements Ahead Of 2024

Former Michigan Republican Rep. Mike Rogers’ Senate campaign is announcing 24 new endorsements from sheriffs across the state on Monday, the Daily Caller News Foundation first learned. Rogers is an Army veteran and a former FBI special agent who served as chairman of the House Select Committee on Intelligence during his time in Congress.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c687137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PiSXxHCqEVIBpRroqrwzjw&sysid=1

When Emma Lazarus wrote her famous line in 1883, “Give me your tired, your poor,/ Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free,” there was no Medicaid, food stamps, housing vouchers and government-run shelters. Those who came knew they were on their own. Now they arrive with their hands out.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: The UNITED States of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.

|
---
| | | **Uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
This campaign is picking up a head of steam that the Mainstream Media can no longer ignore, censor, or caricature.
This campaign is about Healing the Divide between Democrats and Republicans, conservatives and liberals - by uniting the nation around the ideals we all share.
This campaign is about restoring the right to free speech and ending censorship, which has no place in America.
**This campaign is about...**
* Protecting and re-building the hollowed-out Middle Class by ending the "forever wars". There will be NO MORE WARS under my watch;
* Getting corrupt corporate influence out of government, so that our agencies can protect the public instead of enriching the corporations;
* Using the “peace dividend” to rebuild America's infrastructure and create millions of well-paid, skilled jobs;
* Flipping the script on immigration - instead of a flood of illegal immigrants and a trickle of legal immigrants, let's seal the border to stop illegal immigration and allow an appropriate level of lawful, orderly immigration; and,
* Making housing affordable again by building hundreds of thousands of new homes and giving first-time home buyers access to low interest rates.

**This campaign is about returning America to the path we were on before the assassinations of JFK, RFK, and Martin Luther King.**
Reigniting our shared American values is a costly endeavor–an extremely worthwhile one, which is why our end of year funding goal of $6 Million is so important.
[Please chip in today to help us achieve ballot access in each of the 50 states](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=2)**— and begin healing and uniting America.**
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=5)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $1,000 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=1000&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=8)
High poll numbers don’t matter if you’re not on the ballot for voters to choose, and _only our campaign has the ability to secure that spot_. It will be a grassroots effort with in-person centers in all 50 states, because no corporate-funded Super PAC will do it for us.
We are at a critical moment. We're headed toward victory, and we are at crunch time to get the resources to see us through. **Now is the moment!**
[This is why we are turning to you again for help.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=united_12_16_23_email_1_2_nd&n=9)
The future of our country is in question today. Now we must stay the course! We hope to hear from you.
Team Kennedy

While America slept, FedNow was silently 'installed' across millions of US bank accounts.

Biden and his scheming cronies want you to believe it's a harmless money transfer network, but insiders know the truth:

["FedNow Is A Trojan Horse For The Digital Dollar."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6ba9d9c99a574c7991ac5670a4c3e67b&_e=2T9TjPq4X7d5m76_Qoqo13-dDplE6xmeBeLOa96VXyhXKruTZvYYYFe0-QwAjoFPPQ4B-MWU9VdS54i57vmMygIaEKbgj-A25Pnrfa0_yID9Z4R4qZmeNrO3zAeJox4GlndVTCXwTe1sv45-UeCjzN_EQ7nLQg38OZd2J8Uv8Ml79M3Zad11b_cfLJGVJ-jJIfxoJs9jjirOGE1gZvNUAtaMjMWoxtRI9yoN20dG_i92lyzx0XQKfgKsIJSCRhuuyWNRSjGqBZZeDnyCaw7wH3fyjS9IEPrVzy9gI2kV65g0bcF8ZGs4VWj1zM83a5jMQI0bwsiVA1MkAR8MLpTkD3Rzwge7Ul5b7PikydoXXeU6BeVQmGh5cgTXK0tmqlST76DYIfwFrrX8dG4bxGHAF5DaJ_iU0q1D9MKvPMk4YpPQriDMQXx4YBdWHgyFed6Xkd4ZdPgfDuKob0W8L8rYZuWfPzi8Vd9GHCF_tgPcCNI%3D)

You see...

The FedNow can reroute TRILLIONS of dollars in daily transactions... ... bypassing the traditional banking system and placing your savings directly under the government's microscope.

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/28b316ae76d23484c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
Friend, Late last week, I joined a press conference with Atlanta law enforcement and first responders about the new training facility — the one that’s been targeted with arson and violence by a bunch of radicals. **[**Watch a clip here or below.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/66fd15fef6166254c3d6b838967d376c/41703)**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/6c80587429187068c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
|
---
**This is a personal matter for me. I trained at the Atlanta police academy on Key Road, back in 1985, at a temporary facility. ** I know from firsthand experience that Atlanta’s LEOs and first responders need a permanent, world-class facility. It will better equip them to build bridges, solve crimes, and keep our streets safe. **I refuse to sit by while a bunch of out-of-state radicals target the facility, and the workers making it happen, with domestic terrorism. ** **We must stand with law enforcement, and we must lock violent criminals up. Pretty simple.****[I hope you’ll watch this clip of my remarks here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/e64749dd7d8cda91c3d6b838967d376c/41703)**** Thank you for standing with me.

---
John KingGeorgia Insurance Commissioner
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/7f2e6c3915b2c269c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---

---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/e92b749fa7245ef03947229f28c3afba/b1c395d8ed1c790bc3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
Commissioner John King got his start as a beat cop with the Atlanta Police Department. He worked various assignments, including Red Dog and Organized Crime, before joining the Doraville Police Department. Before becoming Chief of Police, he served as a Detective and Deputy Chief.

During his 17 years as Police Chief, Commissioner King tackled corruption, implemented community policing in at-risk neighborhoods, and cracked down on gang violence through early intervention programs at local schools.

In addition to his career in law enforcement, Commissioner King spent four decades serving in the U.S. Army National Guard — enlisting as a private and retiring as a major general.

He deployed to Bosnia, Iraq, and Afghanistan — earning the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, El Salvador gold medal for achievement, meritorious service medals, and a NATO award along the way. Commissioner King retired from active duty in 2023.

As Georgia’s Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner, Commissioner King has disrupted the status quo, put Georgia families first, and held the powerful accountable. He was appointed by Governor Brian Kemp in 2019 and elected to a full term in 2022, making him Georgia’s first Hispanic statewide elected official.

He deployed to Bosnia, Iraq, and Afghanistan — earning the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, El Salvador gold medal for achievement, meritorious service medals, and a NATO award along the way. Commissioner King retired from active duty in 2023. As Georgia’s Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner, Commissioner King has disrupted the status quo, put Georgia families first, and held the powerful accountable. He was appointed by Governor Brian Kemp in 2019 and elected to a full term in 2022, making him Georgia’s first Hispanic statewide elected official. | | These emails are our most important way to keep supporters in the loop, but if you'd like to receive fewer updates or unsubscribe, . USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. OF DEFENSE OR THE U.S. ARMY. PAID FOR BY GEORGIANS FOR JOHN KING

name: American Defense News
subject: Elon Musk: “Go F--- Yourself!”
body:
When you’re the richest man in human history, you can say exactly what you think

| Dear Reader, When you’re the richest man in human history, you can say _exactly_ what you think That’s why Elon Musk recently told the CEO of Disney, "Go f--- yourself." Elon was responding to “getting blackmailed” over ad dollars on Twitter. He just doesn’t care because he’s THAT rich... He’s THAT free. And you know what promises to make Elon the world’s first trillionaire? His [new AI startup.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4uuuib2920ls1o27qib0le6m04674l816jfebto_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh62oj4clh2bs) I know that sounds crazy, but consider his last three startups: PayPal, SpaceX, and Tesla. Just $300 into those startups could’ve turned into $647,000. I think Elon’s AI startup could be even bigger than that. Because it promises to be [100X stronger than ChatGPT.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqedpnusiu9qrh0fl1deolr6uoj8vifqihhiteu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh62oj4clh2bs) I just recorded a 2-minute video demonstration of Elon’s AI in action. It’s pretty crazy because it goes 65 miles per hour and I put my life in its hands. | | [See Elon Musk’s AI right now

Colin Tedards

name: Jerry Evans
subject: Help Us Change The Narrative
body:

|

| Friend,
Our campaign continues to gain momentum day by day. Thanks to the people of this district and to supporters like you we will continue to show that we are the best campaign to win this March primary and retire Bill Foster in November! However, this mission is going to require all of us in order to be victorious on Election Day.
As you know, we had tremendous success last fundraising quarter in reaching our goal of $100,000 in just 19 days. The reason for this success was because of fellow patriots who support our vision for America and for the Illinois 11th district. Every day we continue to travel and meet voters and share our ideas on how to improve Washington and make politicians work for the people, but we need your help to do that. [Please donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001znyXwyBQrlLr0J-73bE4aJ9FajD464zSrAW4zE_PS8vmjnAET4l52Zy7USCbqAssQ6Ewk0G_PDZt-CC3ArEHt7pAHNP0aTYeyhT8YnwLVwxVvmwhq15zdTOlr_yJBdTk6PLN9pPyRS1x-M2zynJDXkCxr0znjJMDVsCzb6endL2pkw74ucIc3v2jwvIBHm_f6O0iKmZuxEirloAbMZM00umilxWrIT00&c=MWVIAaM47SaPvgSDebVnpIAfGP8DYzlg-4qrKv1jErKphvmVO7z9OA==&ch=EVQbqT2K4Lclz-87i0KrfdCMAWcuQlLHLjvAxe8znTNqraYxVGMWfw==) to our campaign so that we may continue growing and fighting for you. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Income inequality isn't the problem...
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWk8Tnbi2N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWk8Tnbi2N

Dear
Friend,
There is
a lot of talk these days about the idea of income inequality.

While
these two words are often repeated, the actual impact of income
inequality is rarely considered. Is income inequality actually
increasing? What about poverty? More importantly, is all income
inequality necessarily a bad thing?

Hoover
Research Fellow David Henderson addresses these urgent questions
and more in his thought-provoking new commentary for the Hoover
Institution, Income Inequality Isn't the Problem.

From
showing how income inequality could be a good thing in the right
circumstances, to showing from the data that poverty in America
is actually on the decline, this brief but thought-provoking
commentary is truly a must read, if you care about our nation's
future economic success.

Friend, I
invite you to read what I think is one of the strongest counter
arguments to the prevailing rhetoric on this hot-button issue
today.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of Income Inequality Isn't
The Problem right now.

Thank
you,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26a830ed-dba1-440a-8dbf-6ecfa2e8cbbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Donald Trump leveled yet another vile personal attack against me recently at an Iowa campaign rally, riling up his crowd and online MAGA supporters, and here’s why it matters: California’s Republican presidential primary and our Senate primary elections both fall on Super Tuesday, March 5. Trump’s legions of MAGA supporters are all eligible to vote in our Senate primary election. We will have to respond to Trump’s lies and attacks by then. So before I share the ugly details, [will you rush a split contribution of $25 or anything you can afford between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help fight back and respond?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T216d5212-0838-464e-9472-4ed84329286f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2eff2b22-5142-4d80-9e6d-42abe589adce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) “Adam Shifty Schiff, with a neck like a pencil. I said, how does he hold up that fat, ugly face, with a neck — Pencil Neck. We call him Pencil Neck. What a dishonest guy.” Peter, I have to tell you — being accused of dishonesty (let alone a fat ugly face) by none other than Donald Trump is a badge of honor that I will always wear proudly. Because it shows he is afraid of me. And he should be. I hold him accountable and don’t let him run over me like he does so many others. But this is bigger than just me. Trump loathes being held accountable to the Constitution and our democracy, and he lashes out against anyone who will defend them. His attacks on me, on judges and prosecutors, on the press, are an attack on our entire constitutional order of government, and with California’s 22 million registered voters preparing to vote on Super Tuesday, we cannot let Trump’s attack go unanswered. [So Peter, rush a split contribution of any amount between Blue Amp Action and my Senate campaign to help me respond to Trump’s latest vile personal attack. I need you with me today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a7e05d1-3f18-488e-9321-89d04c0100a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf333eed7-ab11-4ff1-9a4d-85ff94e6189a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c91852b-3e9e-4e8b-968b-8aab3098a6b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc95c790f-a86e-45e0-9265-f0dcf88c01b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76c05095-607f-4c4a-9647-a889e541b7cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Trump would not attack me so often if he wasn’t terrified of seeing me elected as California’s next U.S. Senator. **[With your support today, we’ll make his worst fears come true — and ensure that neither he nor any other demagogue can damage our democracy the way he did, ever again.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0722c2ec-aaf3-4069-a2ef-f9085951587c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** — Adam

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Debbie
subject: the folks we’re up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
you shouldn’t be able to buy your way to the Senate
| | |
---
Friend,
Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign. Your input guides our strategy, your support builds our momentum, and your donations make everything that we do possible.
**I’m proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. But that’s not the kind of campaign we’re up against.**
I’m running against one of the richest Senators in Washington — a guy who spent _$64 MILLION of his own fortune_ to buy this Senate seat last time around. That’s not even counting all the millions that he raised from far-right megadonors.
You shouldn’t be able to buy your way to Washington. **But that’s exactly what Rick Scott did — and he’s trying to pull the same stunt in 2024.** Last year, he gave his campaign $4 MILLION to boost his end-of-quarter fundraising.
At the end of the day, this isn’t really about fundraising numbers or big checks. It’s about Rick Scott absolutely failing the Floridians he swore to protect: He wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security, pushed Trump’s election conspiracy theories, and advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions.
I’m running for Senate to give Floridians the leadership they deserve — and putting up big fundraising numbers is how we’re going to do it. **That’s why I’ve set a big $150,000 goal before our final end-of-quarter of 2023 to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race.[Please, will you donate $5 or more to invest in this grassroots campaign and flip Florida blue? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75363122/444467609/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk500-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjcwZWU1ZTctYWY5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SK8mCrdCyNb7rSDtCqdEYoTXP7TdHCrx3CTo7u2vmi8=)****[I’m counting on your help to compete with Scott’s massive fortune.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75363123/444467610/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk500-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjcwZWU1ZTctYWY5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SK8mCrdCyNb7rSDtCqdEYoTXP7TdHCrx3CTo7u2vmi8=)**

The Japanese Nippon Steel Corporation (NSC) announced Monday that it
is acquiring the iconic United States Steel Corporation after the
company entertained multiple offers. NSC will purchase U.S. Steel for
$55.00 per share and assume the company’s debt equating to $14.9

I’ve talked with a lot of people across Pennsylvania about a lot of issues — but there’s one thing I hear over and over again: **Voters are sick and tired of the partisan games.**
Pennsylvanians don’t want an Attorney General who puts special interests and DC politics over the needs of everyday people — they want someone who knows how to defend our rights and deliver progress to working people without resorting to extreme partisan politics.
_That’s exactly what I did as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, and it’s what I’ll do as your next Attorney General._
This movement has the opportunity to show the pundits that a positive, pro-democracy campaign can win big here in Pennsylvania — _but only if we work together right now._
[_**Voters across the Commonwealth are joining our grassroots campaign — will you chip in to help support this must-win election? →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75364884/444474770/-396087986?refcode=email_121823_Road-trip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjAxOGNmZC1iMTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wjN8jmXts07xe_kvPr63rP7y-Yk4aF5ClzysGvf3piA=)
I’m so grateful to have you on this team.
– Eugene

Fellow American, right now, it seems to me like a popular thing in Washington, D.C., is to tell people you will do one thing and then do another. Growing up, my mother would call that fibbing.

You might know it as lying. Others might even refer to it as hogwash. Baloney. Poppycock.

Frankly, I can't stand it. I'm not always the most brilliant guy in the room or the best-looking, but I pride myself on being honest and never giving you the runaround.

If I tell you a flea can pull a wagon, load it up.

Right now, we're in an all-out brawl against the Socialist Left for common sense in our country.

I'm happy to be on the front lines every single day.

Fighting to keep your family safe by securing our Southern Border.

Fighting to keep money in your wallet by helping straighten out the economy.

Fighting for your values every day from the Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist workers.

All that I ask from you is to have my back.

Anything that you can spare today below to help me hit a **CRITICAL DECEMBER FUNDRAISING DEADLINE** will go miles to help me.

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztcp3a1cfhomrheubmqr9vvqlo0euvfj964fekg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj294pchfo5s9dr5i349shlq5mk67n4jm061pkn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs)
---
|
---
| It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zine7lqm0i6d913n6tlaeqb9igij819gba6a5s00_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn’t usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvln878u0t5subnifp22sbp55umt030chcdq2f8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you’re interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. That’s why SmartAsset created a [free tool](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbtg6tn4h60ha28mrc7clbqf8egutpnbrpj3rtv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors who serve your area. All advisors on the matching platform have been rigorously vetted through a proprietary due diligence process.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1 It's never too late to work towards a more comfortable retirement.
### [See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0dksi0e4ea579dll2cu93vdgu46kn7vc651hedg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjh6eo70cth2bs)
---

The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: Bud Light...forgiven? - New Hot Topic Episode on No Doubt About It Today
body:
Peter why is EVERYBODY asking for a tip these days? | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6906ccc113&e=567664f14c)

We're excited to share the [latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=870ab88e9f&e=567664f14c) with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti. In this episode, the question is raised: **Should we forgive Bud Light?** Dana White and Kid Rock seem to think so, but Krysty has a different take and shreds both for letting Bud Light off the hook.

→ [**STREAM NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e7145d5294&e=567664f14c)

The lively conversation dives into when does cancel culture go too far or not far enough. Mark and Krysty come down on opposite sides on this one.**
**
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7146aaef49&e=567664f14c)
The Ronchetti family history takes center stage as Mark's brother, Peter Ronchetti, joins the show from the Cowboys Bills game in Buffalo. Prepare for laughter as they recount a hilarious story of how Mark and Peter managed to miss one of the great Cowboys comebacks, despite being at the game.
| [STREAM EPISODE 61 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=659f18838e&e=567664f14c)
---
As the episode unfolds, Mark and Krysty delve into the impact of a worsening economy on family budgets, discussing the challenges many are facing. The discussion then shifts to a hot topic – the controversy surrounding biological men being given scholarships intended for women, with Mark and Krysty sharing their thoughts on the matter.
| [STREAM EPISODE 61 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=28dc3ef4ee&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
If you find this episode as fun as we do, please consider supporting us by liking, subscribing, and leaving a review on your preferred podcast platform. Also, don't forget to subscribe to our YouTube channel for more insightful content.

For those looking to provide financial support or snag some exclusive podcast gear, visit [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=941b36d503&e=567664f14c).

Thank you for being a valued member of our community, and we can't wait for you to join the conversation!

Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=906c095007&e=567664f14c)
|
---

Our mailing address is:
8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=4bda4afc96) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=4bda4afc96)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: A View From The Campaign Trail: A Week of Progress and Community Engagement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
I️ have some exciting updates for you as we continue this exhilarating journey on the campaign trail!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

What a thrilling week of progress and heartfelt community engagement! From traversing the state to attending impactful fundraisers, our journey has been filled with engaging meetings and invaluable connections with Hoosiers. I'm eager to bring you into the loop and share some of the exciting highlights from the past week.

Let's dive in!

** IN THE NEWS: Economic Angst in the Heartland (https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2023/12/12/economic_angst_in_the_heartland_150187.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Bidenomics is crushing American households, favoring a privileged class and leaving the majority "stressed, polarized, and losing faith in society’s future."

By mid-2024, only the top 1% will be better off than before the pandemic, JP Morgan economist Marko Kolanovic projects.

In Indiana, we understand the urgency to address these challenges. By axing the state's individual income tax, we can bring tangible relief to ALL Hoosier households.

It's time for leaders to step up and take action. Enough is enough.
https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2023/12/12/economic_angst_in_the_heartland_150187.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2023/12/12/economic_angst_in_the_heartland_150187.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IN THE NEWS: IN Focus: Crouch discusses race for governor (https://cbs4indy.com/video/in-focus-crouch-discusses-race-for-governor/9261275/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
When my opponents claim axing the tax is impossible, what they're really saying is, 'Government needs more money, and Hoosiers need less.' My stance is crystal clear—we can and must achieve this.

I️ recently spoke to an older gentleman in Winamac who had tears in his eyes as he shared how he wasn't sure how he was going to cover the cost of his rent and prescriptions. Instances like these underscore the urgency of putting money back into the pockets of hardworking Hoosiers.
https://cbs4indy.com/video/in-focus-crouch-discusses-race-for-governor/9261275/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
WATCH (https://cbs4indy.com/video/in-focus-crouch-discusses-race-for-governor/9261275/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** SEEN ON SOCIAL: Prioritizing Hoosiers' Mental Health (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid02GzTuPbicxkX4JpMQmZLZ8A4RmxWWU3gbAp97bwiFfUQkCZAvBoDEZXZh5XH4fKWHl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Indiana's mental health crisis has a staggering human cost and profound impact on all those who serve and protect us.

I've testified, fought, and stood up for expanded resources, and as Governor, I'll keep fighting to ensure every Hoosier has the chance to thrive.
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid02GzTuPbicxkX4JpMQmZLZ8A4RmxWWU3gbAp97bwiFfUQkCZAvBoDEZXZh5XH4fKWHl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.indianapolismonthly.com/news-and-opinion/politics/out-of-darkness/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Gubernatorial Panel at Dentons Legislative Conference
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

At the Dentons Legislative Conference, I had the privilege of participating in a gubernatorial panel.

I laid out my vision for Indiana—#AxeTheTax, prioritize mental health, and unwavering support for our law enforcement. Together, we are building a safer, stronger, and more prosperous Indiana!

** Meeting with Indiana State Police Alliance President Scott Krueger
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Ensuring the safety of Hoosiers is paramount.

Last week, Indiana State Police Alliance President Scott Krueger and I️ discussed bolstering support for those who dedicate their lives to keeping Indiana safe.

** Building the foundation for Indiana's future
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had productive discussions at the Build Indiana Council meeting that focused on strategies to meet the infrastructure needs of the Crossroads of America.

I'm ready to contribute to the planning and development of a better-connected Indiana!

** Meeting with Fort Wayne FOP President Mitch McKinney
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Our conversation centered on ensuring officers have the support and counseling needed to navigate the challenges and stresses of their crucial roles.

My commitment to our law enforcement community is unwavering.

** Pamper Me Women’s Event With Susie McEntire
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

It was an honor to speak at the Pamper Me Women’s Event alongside country gospel singer Susie McEntire!

This was a one-day women's conference that featured empowering discussions, a style show, and more.

** Christmas Concert and Toys for Tots Benefit
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Keynoting the 10th annual Christmas Concert and Toys for Tots Benefit was a heartwarming experience.

I had the privilege of presenting the prestigious Sagamore of the Wabash Award to two deserving individuals—country gospel singer Susie McEntire and her husband, Mark Eaton.

The award presentation followed heartfelt video messages from Reba McEntire and Dolly Parton. What an awesome experience!

** Last Week's Endorsements
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne is the person most qualified to be our next Governor. She has the boldness, the judgment, and the experience to lead Indiana into the future. She has my full and enthusiastic endorsement.”
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

“Suzanne has been my friend and a friend of Southwest Indiana for decades, and I am proud to support not only her campaign for Governor but also her drive to ‘Axe the Tax.’ Hoosiers will keep more of their hard-earned money and prosper because of Suzanne’s leadership."

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=1530c3ef15-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_12_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-1530c3ef15-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Suzanne Crouch will keep Hoosiers safe, and that’s why she has my endorsement for Governor. We need someone who will stand up to fentanyl dealers and career criminals. Suzanne will work with and support our brave men and women in law enforcement.”

clean_body: I️ have some exciting updates for you as we continue this exhilarating journey on the campaign trail! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, What a thrilling week of progress and heartfelt community engagement! From traversing the state to attending impactful fundraisers, our journey has been filled with engaging meetings and invaluable connections with Hoosiers. I'm eager to bring you into the loop and share some of the exciting highlights from the past week. Let's dive in! IN THE NEWS: Economic Angst in the Heartland () Bidenomics is crushing American households, favoring a privileged class and leaving the majority "stressed, polarized, and losing faith in society’s future." By mid-2024, only the top 1% will be better off than before the pandemic, JP Morgan economist Marko Kolanovic projects. In Indiana, we understand the urgency to address these challenges. By axing the state's individual income tax, we can bring tangible relief to ALL Hoosier households. It's time for leaders to step up and take action. Enough is enough. ARTICLE () IN THE NEWS: IN Focus: Crouch discusses race for governor () When my opponents claim axing the tax is impossible, what they're really saying is, 'Government needs more money, and Hoosiers need less.' My stance is crystal clear—we can and must achieve this. I️ recently spoke to an older gentleman in Winamac who had tears in his eyes as he shared how he wasn't sure how he was going to cover the cost of his rent and prescriptions. Instances like these underscore the urgency of putting money back into the pockets of hardworking Hoosiers. WATCH () SEEN ON SOCIAL: Prioritizing Hoosiers' Mental Health () Indiana's mental health crisis has a staggering human cost and profound impact on all those who serve and protect us. I've testified, fought, and stood up for expanded resources, and as Governor, I'll keep fighting to ensure every Hoosier has the chance to thrive. ARTICLE () Gubernatorial Panel at Dentons Legislative Conference At the Dentons Legislative Conference, I had the privilege of participating in a gubernatorial panel. I laid out my vision for Indiana—#AxeTheTax, prioritize mental health, and unwavering support for our law enforcement. Together, we are building a safer, stronger, and more prosperous Indiana! Meeting with Indiana State Police Alliance President Scott Krueger Ensuring the safety of Hoosiers is paramount. Last week, Indiana State Police Alliance President Scott Krueger and I️ discussed bolstering support for those who dedicate their lives to keeping Indiana safe. Building the foundation for Indiana's future I had productive discussions at the Build Indiana Council meeting that focused on strategies to meet the infrastructure needs of the Crossroads of America. I'm ready to contribute to the planning and development of a better-connected Indiana! Meeting with Fort Wayne FOP President Mitch McKinney Our conversation centered on ensuring officers have the support and counseling needed to navigate the challenges and stresses of their crucial roles. My commitment to our law enforcement community is unwavering. Pamper Me Women’s Event With Susie McEntire It was an honor to speak at the Pamper Me Women’s Event alongside country gospel singer Susie McEntire! This was a one-day women's conference that featured empowering discussions, a style show, and more. Christmas Concert and Toys for Tots Benefit Keynoting the 10th annual Christmas Concert and Toys for Tots Benefit was a heartwarming experience. I had the privilege of presenting the prestigious Sagamore of the Wabash Award to two deserving individuals—country gospel singer Susie McEntire and her husband, Mark Eaton. The award presentation followed heartfelt video messages from Reba McEntire and Dolly Parton. What an awesome experience! Last Week's Endorsements “Suzanne is the person most qualified to be our next Governor. She has the boldness, the judgment, and the experience to lead Indiana into the future. She has my full and enthusiastic endorsement.” “Suzanne has been my friend and a friend of Southwest Indiana for decades, and I am proud to support not only her campaign for Governor but also her drive to ‘Axe the Tax.’ Hoosiers will keep more of their hard-earned money and prosper because of Suzanne’s leadership." "Suzanne Crouch will keep Hoosiers safe, and that’s why she has my endorsement for Governor. We need someone who will stand up to fentanyl dealers and career criminals. Suzanne will work with and support our brave men and women in law enforcement.” "I have known Suzanne Crouch for almost 30 years. I am proud to endorse Suzanne for Governor of Indiana!" Last but not least... Thank you all for your unwavering support. Our journey is one of shared values, commitment, and the belief that together, we can build a brighter future for Indiana. Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! name: DeSantis Petition Team
subject: Will you stand against satanism?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5756a38f0bcad61820187f0c9b0ef72113ebc077f882b7cc2c88b53cab73a92deccd192b293c1ab5eb0f1968a80d4da1ce0158139c3be556f28429060fffaecce65acb34278743c57400cd21fe587bac

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b

SIGN THE PETITION:

Keep satanism from being a recognized religion by the federal government.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b
ADD YOUR NAME

Friend, we never thought we would need to put together a petition on this, but in light of recent events, we cannot stand by.

A Christian veteran is FACING CHARGES for tearing down a satanic temple statue constructed in the Iowa State Capitol.

When his conviction is pending in a courtroom, it will be based on whether the federal government recognizea satanism as a religion.

WE CANNOT LET THIS STAND. We must fight to make sure evil does not prevail over the good in our country, and we need YOUR SUPPORT to do it. Please, add your name to our petition to keep the federal government from recognizing these vile acts from being protected a legitimate religion.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b
SIGN THE PETITION TODAY

— DeSantis Petition Team

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d62001cf8819227862633403be6f30ddcaf892be04276a67cf09c0fbaf0a938a0472131ec7e3be0222794ae70bc505e7e9362d6b07ff6d9b71
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=56130e74aca617d61e18d6f41faac6e08e61bf683989d9474ecc1a8c9e5549c2e41bf82400fda54a22a405ae691d38ba4f31808df66dd2d88b209ab3d1b0964b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I’m spending my morning going over our plan for 2024, while also
reflecting on all we’ve accomplished together — and how far we’ve still to
go.

As a part of this grassroots team, I truly value your
opinion, Peter, and
I’d love to get your input on a few things regarding our campaign strategy
before we head into the election year.

and it would mean the world to me if you could spare a minute or two to

I really appreciate everything you’ve done already,
Peter, and I hope you know how
much I value your feedback.

Thanks!

—Angela

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: The Biden campaign needs to fight harder against Trump NOW!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Tell the Biden campaign fight hard against Trump NOW, not later! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f514335-507d-43da-8346-3747f731bf61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b8b6add-1976-4e64-b61d-bcb77c0578c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump remains the clear frontrunner for the 2024 Republican presidential nomination, making a Trump-Biden rematch a near certainty. **So why aren't the Biden campaign and other Democratic officials going after Trump much, much harder?** They seem to be waiting to see how the GOP primary plays out before going on the offensive, but we can't afford to wait that long. **We need to blanket the airwaves with ads, fill the key states with volunteers, make the case against Trump, and[act like election day is tomorrow, not a year away.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb011cc8-b31e-4215-9f44-8b4fb0cc3c7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** President Biden is right to be proud of his achievements, and to promote those aggressively. But if Trump is not challenged directly and hit HARD, those achievements alone will not win the day. The more Trump is allowed to spew his hatred and lies unchecked, the stronger his support grows. The Biden campaign needs to start going after Trump HARD – immediately! They need to call out Trump for his lies and deceit and fight back against his dangerous attacks. [**Add your name: Tell the Biden campaign to start fighting harder against Trump NOW, not later! >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cbc9d85-94c0-4058-ba3d-67528c753a4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36799f2f-55a4-45c5-a150-2a74acd4e543/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

**Friend, did you see the stunt Hunter Biden pulled last week? **

He ignored a subpoena from Congress for a closed-door deposition. Instead, he showed up, held a press conference, and played the victim.

**Even for a Biden, Hunter 's entitlement is staggering. He, along with Joe Biden, truly believes there is one standard for the Bidens... and another for everyone else.

| | _**_Meet Tom Cotton_**_

Tom Cotton was born and raised on his family's cattle farm in Arkansas, served as an Army infantry officer in Iraq and Afghanistan, and is fighting for working Americans in the U.S. Senate.

The tragic attacks of September 11, 2001 occurred during Tom's final year of law school and changed his life's trajectory.

After clerking on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit and spending a short time in private law practice, he joined the United States Army as an Infantry Officer, spending nearly five years on active duty.

Between his two combat tours he served as a platoon leader with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery, the unit responsible for military honors funerals.

Tom's military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, and Ranger Tab.

In the U.S. Senate, he's fighting the tough battles for Arkansans and Americans, and delivering real results. He knows that only the strong can survive in a dangerous world, and he's building a movement to make America strong again.

---

---

NEVER SURRENDER!
