name: Jim Gaughran
subject: This race could flip the House
body:
https://jimgaughran.com/ [https://jimgaughran.com/]
Hello Peter,
My name is Jim Gaughran, I’m running for Congress here in Suffolk County on Long Island, New York. President Biden won this district, and if we flip it back, Democrats will be that much closer to a majority. The problem is, Republicans know this seat is in danger - that’s why Speaker Mike Johnson was here raising money for my first term opponent the other week.
Can you chip in to help flip this seat blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress]
I’m a former State Senator with the right kind of record to run on and win. I protected reproductive rights in New York, strengthened our gun safety laws, and held environmental polluters accountable. I also made sure that middle class Long Island families didn’t see their taxes rise or services cut - instead, I brought record education funding to our district.
I’m the kind of candidate that can win - with your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress]
I’d greatly appreciate a donation of whatever you can afford. And I’d love a chance to talk to you about the race and my campaign.
Please shoot me a reply and I’ll be in touch shortly!
Jim Gaughran
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Gaughran for Congress
P.O. BOX 20574
HUNTINGTON STATION, NY 11746
United States

[**Your donation, no matter the amount, is a crucial investment in a better future for New Jersey and good governance as a whole. name: Gloria Johnson
subject: My priorities 👇
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
We have to do better for Tennessee.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75371172/444496728/-849459103?refcode=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk3MGU2My1iYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdTNu-K9KbYEcXobyOR-_GOiXhKP4otQskPCqMzQ3Wk=&emci=b98f54f7-979b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=46764483)
---
Look, for way too long Tennesseans have been represented by politicians who don’t care about most of us. It’s clear to see where Marsha’s priorities lie as soon as you check her voting record: it’s with the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and MAGA extremists. We deserve better. But defeating Marsha Blackburn won’t be easy, and I can’t do it alone. **I’m ready to stand tall to make Tennesseans’ lives better, no matter who stands against me._[And I want to share some of the priorities that I’m fighting for, but first, I have to ask you to donate before my end-of-year fundraising deadline at the end of the month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75371174/444496730/209297649?refcode=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk3MGU2My1iYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdTNu-K9KbYEcXobyOR-_GOiXhKP4otQskPCqMzQ3Wk=)_** | [**RUSH A DONATION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75371177/444496732/209297649?refcode=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk3MGU2My1iYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdTNu-K9KbYEcXobyOR-_GOiXhKP4otQskPCqMzQ3Wk=)
---
_As your next Senator, I’ll advocate for policies that:_
* 👩🏽 Restore & secure women’s reproductive autonomy
* 🗳️ Protect access to the ballot box
* 🎒 Fully fund our public education system
* 🧒🏼 Give kids in foster care the resources & support they deserve
* 🦺 Prioritize keeping communities safe — NOT the profits of the gun lobby
* 🏥 Make health care more affordable & accessible for everyone

**Before I can fight for these priorities in the Senate, I have to defeat Marsha Blackburn and the special-interest donors lining her campaign coffers. That’s why I’m reaching out now.**
Folks, in less than two weeks, I’m facing my most important fundraising deadline yet. After the end of the year, I have to file a _public_ financial report with the FEC. In that report, we need to show that we have the financial strength to take on Marsha’s campaign war chest.
Our end-of-year goal of **6,932 donations** is a stretch, I won’t deny it. But showing an incredible outpouring of grassroots enthusiasm is the ONLY way we can show pundits and pollsters that we can defeat Marsha Blackburn.
**_[Please, join me in the fight. Donate $5, $25, or anything you can afford BEFORE time runs out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75371191/444496741/209297649?refcode=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ms=ea.01970e63-ba9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk3MGU2My1iYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdTNu-K9KbYEcXobyOR-_GOiXhKP4otQskPCqMzQ3Wk=)_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We have to do better for Tennessee. | Look, for way too long Tennesseans have been represented by politicians who don’t care about most of us. It’s clear to see where Marsha’s priorities lie as soon as you check her voting record: it’s with the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and MAGA extremists. We deserve better. But defeating Marsha Blackburn won’t be easy, and I can’t do it alone. I’m ready to stand tall to make Tennesseans’ lives better, no matter who stands against me.= | = As your next Senator, I’ll advocate for policies that: 👩🏽 Restore & secure women’s reproductive autonomy 🗳️ Protect access to the ballot box 🎒 Fully fund our public education system 🧒🏼 Give kids in foster care the resources & support they deserve 🦺 Prioritize keeping communities safe — NOT the profits of the gun lobby 🏥 Make health care more affordable & accessible for everyone Before I can fight for these priorities in the Senate, I have to defeat Marsha Blackburn and the special-interest donors lining her campaign coffers. That’s why I’m reaching out now. Folks, in less than two weeks, I’m facing my most important fundraising deadline yet. After the end of the year, I have to file a public financial report with the FEC. In that report, we need to show that we have the financial strength to take on Marsha’s campaign war chest. Our end-of-year goal of 6,932 donations is a stretch, I won’t deny it. But showing an incredible outpouring of grassroots enthusiasm is the ONLY way we can show pundits and pollsters that we can defeat Marsha Blackburn. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: January 6 prisoner Jesus Rivera
subject: The FBI illegally arrested me, and I served 8 months in prison
body:
Hello, my name is Jesus Rivera. I’m a U.S. Marine combat veteran and a patriot.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6kuocjs8bnueer0crnj8vc3223epkib4gi9qj3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj68ob2clh2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqu1s9huch61o80a309erpd1mojfvsns24j8p8f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj68ob2clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my crucial lawsuit to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4daah3ehk9pnu1clk2v86grn4t5887grfo54nk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj68ob2clh2bs)**

Hello, my name is Jesus Rivera. I'm a U.S. Marine combat veteran and a patriot.

On January 6, 2021, I recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. for a local news station back home in Florida.

I shot that video on my smart phone and a digital camera to provide for my wife and kids.

I didn't attack police or even protest.

I jubst recorded what was happening, and peacefully entered the Capitol like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided my home with guns drawn. It was terrifying. They had no probable cause, and their search warrant was obtained through lies, even outright fraud.**

Let me tell you, I felt shocked and confused.

**And frankly, I was scared my family would get hurt!**

I was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

My wife asked for the search warrant several times, but didn't get it until after the FBI agents finished searching our home.

**As a U.S. Marine, I survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to the people of Iraq and Afghanistan. But then my freedom gets trampled on right here at home by FBI agents!**

Can you imagine being treated like this in America?

I sure couldn't ... but then it got worse.

**Leftist District Judge Colleen Collar-Kottelly sentenced me to 8 MONTHS in federal prison!**

Between you and me, my wife and kids spent those brutal 8 months with knots tied in their stomachs. They lost sleep. Because they didn't know if I'd get killed or badly beaten by the real criminals in that prison.

**Well, I 'm free now - and I'm fighting back in court with a game-changing, class action lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means our criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And our criminal trials MUST STOP.**

My lawyer, Larry Klayman, filed this crucial lawsuit.

Larry is founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

He's a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 41 years.

You've seen him on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**Larry took on Bill Clinton, and is the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President committed a crime.**

Larry knows what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.

**And with this critically important case, Larry can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

The shocking, un-American conduct alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can illegally arrest me, an innocent U.S. Marine ... and if the DOJ can throw me in prison unjustly for 8 months ... they can do it to you, our families, **

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c4f70ee21dad/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6685918?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
# In The News....
This week, General Teichert joined Keleigh Beeson on NewsNation and John Scott on Fox News to discuss President Biden’s recent meeting with Zelenskyy, national security spending, and Middle-Eastern threats against the U.S. by Iran.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=d87e989e9a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined[ NewsNation ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7b97b178a3&e=1b1fb1ad9f)on Tuesday to discuss Biden’s meeting with Zelenskyy and American interest in funding Ukraine. Teichert stated in part, **“And right now with the stalemate there's no clear path forward to achieve the types of objectives that we've heard from President Zelenskyy. And part of the reason that American support has fallen off is because while Ukrainians have been very brave and skillful in fighting the war for the last 22 months, there's no clear end in sight that would meet our objectives and Zelenskyy’s objectives. We need to figure out how to best allocate our funds to manage that portfolio of national security concerns around the world.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=8fc4d128e0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined [Fox News](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=863b0c9fbb&e=1b1fb1ad9f) on Saturday to discuss the recent attacks on the U.S. Embassy in Baghdad. When discussing Iran’s collaboration in the attacks, John responded, **“All of this that’s gone on in the last two months has been greenlit by Iran. Fortunately, there at the embassy in Baghdad there's an air defense system to help protect them. My team brought that in when I was the Senior Defense Official there in the summer of 2020. But all of these malign activities that are going on, including the 85 attacks and 70 Americans injured and one American killed, have all been prompted by an Iran that has not been deterred, and frankly has been emboldened, by the weakness of the Biden Administration for the last three years.”**
|
---
# ICYMI...

General Teichert was privileged to give the keynote speech on Saturday at the Crownsville Veterans Cemetery as a part of Wreaths Across America.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
# Endorsement Alerts!
Endorsements continued to roll in this week for John Teichert, a retired Air Force Brigadier General and candidate for U.S. Senate out of Maryland.
Teichert is excited to announce that he’s received support from Sheriff Joe Gamble of Talbot County. Read Sheriff Gamble’s full statement [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e2a28893c2&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
# On the Trail...
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a648ce0df7&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=901e6d2e03&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3298ad2f46&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0bae7cce85&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
# Thoughts...
On December 12th, General Teichert launched the ‘Veterans for Teichert’ coalition – the first coalition group of his campaign for the U.S Senate. The honorable group of military veterans met at a roundtable event to discuss the need for leadership, not politics, in Washington D.C. Read more about the coalition [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=215abb6e58&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
December 14th, Teichert released “Our Classrooms are in Crisis”, addressing his vital concerns on the education crisis in Maryland. Teichert dives into teacher’s union overreach, poor student performance, and the lack of parent’s rights in their children’s education. Read Teichert’s full article [here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a3bc572202&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out [teichertformaryland.com](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=57381d0389&e=1b1fb1ad9f) and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list!
|

subject: Elon Musk: “Go F--- Yourself!”
body:
When you're the richest man in human history, you can say exactly what you think

| Dear Reader, When you're the richest man in human history, you can say _exactly_ what you think That's why Elon Musk recently told the CEO of Disney, "Go f--- yourself." Elon was responding to "getting blackmailed" over ad dollars on Twitter. He just doesn't care because he's THAT rich... He's THAT free. And you know what promises to make Elon the world's first trillionaire? His [new AI startup.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=518dd987ae45440daa4df51b30ba7ef0&_e=i0dTey5YGKZZfyqUQpL2fvhvXXHbzeS--7OSCsslvLavoCkPL9HfLi50uYvl-UTBU1-0ZfOc27wKcbjCpKcLwTa92gaUYwQPTVKuCN-Psmd50WGO9DgDBeLoz1RpxHkUhmT2nNWEBLJri9NJgqVplv3zX0wn0mUxkInDcKRDWd7qjaIymtKmxoW_nRUYQdeBZKAnsO0owcahauQfTHLJM0ZU9bxfg3UbvKlkc8zso0DWSUdIB-VCYc3JKLpabt4ViKHUINoBfWWTnyatJI-qD5hRZRDANmNsqYOj56d1WWU%3D) I know that sounds crazy, but consider his last three startups: PayPal, SpaceX, and Tesla. It's pretty crazy because it goes 65 miles per hour and I put my life in its hands. | | [ See Elon Musk's AI right now

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61d97fe2486740ed8e7585eaaa5dc291&_e=mABYM_AN4OEppEH4s7u0cXflZ63_qNEQLdylGsoTP9UErT7Byfef8msvTyh0BG_kBRRN6tIvaPu2mdXlESKAJGuSAYWkk9R-fQaK3RCpxgYxoh6x0ajenk2BSn9xe8TatNWI09MtPpG-ZJoBtTPt6zeIw156IccBTk-kh64DQLjoUf-K9x3kEjgQjBmDKe5IXPXvXqrtME0zfWj7wj-qbw3P3RUp4m4q6AUrqHLXk8MJScoLc4df9a8Xa0VzyRCYXiUEbbTKYyNUoN5sa43NBDFgOf1zR8BBOP11hhs0ZYzRMr07oKt-IaUIROY4Tp3f4sr4jJUKbVVTk2QCrDI9U84sZRTBghJ_vxloBSEsQVk5_XQCSBaUu6NwY7EmYp0PpiGkQR2-ivZsPNQyfySe_A%3D%3D)
Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force
---
Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=61d97fe2486740ed8e7585eaaa5dc291&_e=mABYM_AN4OEppEH4s7u0cXflZ63_qNEQLdylGsoTP9UErT7Byfef8msvTyh0BG_kBRRN6tIvaPu2mdXlESKAJGuSAYWkk9R-fQaK3RCpxgYxoh6x0ajenk2BSn9xe8TatNWI09MtPpG-ZJoBtTPt6zeIw156IccBTk-kh64DQLjoUf-K9x3kEjgQjBmDKe5IXPXvXqrtME0zfWj7wj-qbw3P3RUp4m4q6AUrqHLXk8MJScoLc4df9a8Xa0VzyRCYqisu8LR-lAGOdOq5wRoE2jY1Gpd3FGANH8uhTpoN1h1yG7NLcLnIbZxWYzEjJe62Birrbi1n-hTniIHsf5mc_hAjR9OYB69s6nxfOC8uy1LLMbuxYUj1b1YcdHmiUoCHP3uF8IM6spiEEnaUrbPx6w%3D%3D)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First.

These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies!

I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight.

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight. | | | God Bless, Brian Mast | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzUyLWIwZmEwYWU2N2U0NDRiZDFhNDAzOTUzY2YxNzQwY2UyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQ0OTc4Jm9sYz0zNzAxMiJ9/2slp1cH5k8b2lTze7W08LA)
---
| | Hi Friend,One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is “equality”, that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzUyLWIwZmEwYWU2N2U0NDRiZDFhNDAzOTUzY2YxNzQwY2UyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQ0OTc4Jm9sYz0zNzAxMiJ9/biWC2EVYQsX1Zp5YcHWE_w)

| | In this **[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzUyLWIwZmEwYWU2N2U0NDRiZDFhNDAzOTUzY2YxNzQwY2UyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQ0OTc4Jm9sYz0zNzAxMiJ9/GGqAXdf2bipomEA0ytTqRA)[25-page commentary](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzUyLWIwZmEwYWU2N2U0NDRiZDFhNDAzOTUzY2YxNzQwY2UyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwOi8vcmVzb3VyY2VzLmhvb3Zlci5vcmcvY3JlYXRlZC1lcXVhbC1zaWdudXA_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNyZWF0ZWRlcXVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQ0OTc4Jm9sYz0zNzAxMiJ9/ZRfO6TXtbVcyfWH9kEqiXw)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You’ll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words “created equal” in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You’ll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of “equality”, Friedman’s words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you in advance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=929%2E135344%2EqIFG7B)

Friends -
I am reaching out today to ask if you can make a $3 contribution today before our official FEC fundraising deadline at the end of this month.
**Here's why I am asking for your support:**
You can rely on me to work hard. I will listen to every voter I possibly can in this campaign. I will visit every city and town possible across the state. I will show up in communities that many Democrats ignore, and in communities where voter turnout is low. Then I will do it again and again and again. And at the end of this campaign, I will bring a new kind of leadership to the U.S. Senate: pragmatic, sensible, fresh.
But no one — not me or any other candidate out there — can win a U.S. Senate race all alone. Running statewide is a whole different ballgame than running in a congressional seat. It's something we can only accomplish as a team, with people all across the country coming together to defend this seat.
So far tens of thousands of people have donated to this campaign. It means so much to me that supporters would take the time to do that. But now I am relying on you to make your first online donation. Because before this month ends, we need to stay on pace to meet the fundraising goals that we've set for our campaign.
[**I'd love it if I could earn your support today.Can you add your $3 contribution today? Any amount you can give will make a big difference for our campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231218-1-tt&t=2&akid=929%2E135344%2EqIFG7B)**

And at the end of this campaign, I will bring a new kind of leadership to the U.S. Senate: pragmatic, sensible, fresh. But no one — not me or any other candidate out there — can win a U.S. Senate race all alone. Running statewide is a whole different ballgame than running in a congressional seat. It's something we can only accomplish as a team, with people all across the country coming together to defend this seat. So far tens of thousands of people have donated to this campaign. It means so much to me that supporters would take the time to do that. But now I am relying on you to make your first online donation. Because before this month ends, we need to stay on pace to meet the fundraising goals that we've set for our campaign. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for chipping in. Running for office, and especially a Senate seat, isn't easy. But the stakes make the challenge well worth it – especially when we’re all in it together. Elissa PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

We have no other option but to protect and expand our Senate majority in 2024. **__[Will you pitch in $2 right now to help me make sure the Senate is under Democratic control next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75379551/444513982/-1318550807?refcode=mw_em_231218_1&amount=2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDVmNDQ4ZS1jMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ZQux16RLalS7Rfsj_PTgvPsbL9utzUQwU_Ifmr-aWI=)__** Thank you, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75379553/444513983/-1318550807?refcode=mw_em_231218_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDVmNDQ4ZS1jMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ZQux16RLalS7Rfsj_PTgvPsbL9utzUQwU_Ifmr-aWI=)********

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=de4fdc26bf1236812fa4495d624d1fc95f6e1524681ba23d1bbe67680fb6f82ceec804867e2c88e01601bc7200a5e4c36a2fade990d53103 That’s a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign…Blossom. People often ask…how did I get that name? Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a “girl power” kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets. There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more “feminine,” but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets. Although the helicopter community doesn’t use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the “Blossom” stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story! It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me the importance of service. Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong….but that’s not service. As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community. While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service. Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. After I pulled off a historic victory in 2022 and helped flip the House from Democrat to Republican control, I’ve had a target on my back… Democrats have made me their #1 target because they know I won’t just go along with the party line. No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do…I’m going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some “master” in Washington, D.C. If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=de4fdc26bf1236812fa4495d624d1fc95f6e1524681ba23d1bbe67680fb6f82ceec804867e2c88e01601bc7200a5e4c36a2fade990d53103 I’m asking you to send me some help today. Because I’m a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to defeat my Democrat opponent. Democrats are already spending BIG on ads and billboards attacking me, so it is critical our campaign has the resources to FIGHT back. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=de4fdc26bf1236812fa4495d624d1fc95f6e1524681ba23d1bbe67680fb6f82ceec804867e2c88e01601bc7200a5e4c36a2fade990d53103 RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I’m coming from and why I need your help. Whether it’s $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C. It’s time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that’s what I promise to always do…are you with me? With the courage to fight, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=de4fdc26bf1236812fa4495d624d1fc95f6e1524681ba23d1bbe67680fb6f82ceec804867e2c88e01601bc7200a5e4c36a2fade990d53103 -Jen Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. OF DEFENSE OR THE U.S. NAVY P.O. Box 5042 Virginia Beach, VA 23471 https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=1b43ce76db7bddb321cbb75266b3c9efe2d3c6c3e6c8adf7bd7e05557c44b7508a4b8a0db8c91fe00f7b7ce3cfba9fcb393caf4a0845e850 Privacy Policy To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here

subject: Republicans’ announcement BACKFIRE

Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7d089906c984d7981e8d22627343548&_e=CSP8HVhF5qUc2Hg6l5dSJaaWfX3QKT2XWfiZVh92vlYcy0C3L-uTLZEl30LBDItfAuwaKD5uuCmL532GdEhMaDQrm9VWzcC2cK-LgALGFtdbcXUlFB6SC4cdMAdtMdLlKayHsLuH16aAPe33__R3EZpg7mxoEucbcKBnmiOq1hpqscQdJL7W7so_AqLBJrW4d3X-yV8oa7cDf1M-5zmyT5ZwOFk54CuLzQF5CvUrkbfCufczQZtLWMWZXB1vJ93iSgts-7OA8WYC6V21fuwmJObNs6EmbcZjMVWRUp9FAS7woHwBG0oWocT8O-MWlVmCuEHrs7S4_tbJ2ppWCDSk1dZejTs_ZFNsWOHnWI-zdEdxsBeZkjBnr-zquNQPHT5LPxOiYzSYSkRZsVT9vm37Luuqehve_QXrKWPA_xxzcR8%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7d089906c984d7981e8d22627343548&_e=CSP8HVhF5qUc2Hg6l5dSJaaWfX3QKT2XWfiZVh92vlYcy0C3L-uTLZEl30LBDItfAuwaKD5uuCmL532GdEhMaDQrm9VWzcC2cK-LgALGFtdbcXUlFB6SC4cdMAdtMdLlKayHsLuH16aAPe33__R3EZpg7mxoEucbcKBnmiOq1hpqscQdJL7W7so_AqLBJrW4d3X-yV8oa7cDf1M-5zmyT5ZwOFk54CuLzQF5CvUrkbfCufczQZtLWMWZXB1vJ93inhgzLlQn2zJPSlBXslEag0emUujfeDLLmb8aL3oc-iS1Bayd9en6fGx6eIC2b16jEKK4c4nyTJBkHyDqtG38fRms4tAb6GXh-uAFSxGTuMkXWyLqemL5Fv0RcrlvVOYo2FVdiJjjBYaZVM6heOqt2JmhN6SsjUgb6iknQ_bEtOA%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7d089906c984d7981e8d22627343548&_e=CSP8HVhF5qUc2Hg6l5dSJaaWfX3QKT2XWfiZVh92vlYcy0C3L-uTLZEl30LBDItfAuwaKD5uuCmL532GdEhMaDQrm9VWzcC2cK-LgALGFtdbcXUlFB6SC4cdMAdtMdLlKayHsLuH16aAPe33__R3EZpg7mxoEucbcKBnmiOq1hpqscQdJL7W7so_AqLBJrW4d3X-yV8oa7cDf1M-5zmyT5ZwOFk54CuLzQF5CvUrkbfCufczQZtLWMWZXB1vJ93i37JNkjx6WfqSh8p1J_5f9t8wahZOgIIp2Lx31LlyxWhLAgB0cYEHCZbvueDNADZn6U1NwFbrS0b3MFuuanwIt5J-vxHUajzPZ9ueHVjdvzfzcQsgFupzrp9AnNbX2kYfGzQUL80qM7TFjp-uM_h-gMshELMjk6jRqs318JEdIPQ%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

And it all starts with $1. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for standing with us! This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=20158e2db61c4f3f9dacfef6ab5c58fe&_e=MSC9qq6nu_Q3Yt6q4nCAQDrPi8e0McU-4uBJPoYhUsMfh3iPcnEmQrejJq34QhAhISyC0HdNslYpEaUgi__ZbLpiFyAnxaBf4mb84wXzJM2f3jeALGqTdDMgM0G43UrX9WgDugnCQVmSD5rJRyMjPEJoI1OUwkcM574ePp6OlwYboTIc6oV-emfX5mTVawEAVvbWPj5gt_1WNGVSA78n_AwEGLho2OtXzzGRdYhvDkswOS9JxcH7reabBWSYLI_dm-NTsWUnOeD_LOb3li7w8mPfO98KsNbKP9nlHar3cfzOKe9H_jBXkL_dJPDB4GBqzcnwmI9iJZExQl7wXopzHh8t8vxO5eg-CcybcDapwJTvTAuGghsohp-Xn-4pFL6-DJ3636Fk-e8WBGmrHhXGGw%3D%3D)

name: Governor Chris Sununu
subject: I am proud to endorse Nikki Haley
body:
I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States, and I am asking you to join me in being a part of this movement.

We must support the best conservative candidate in this race who can win in November 2024 to deliver results in 2025.

New Hampshire has never looked to candidates of the past who had their chance but failed to deliver on their promises. We never settle -- we look to the future at the candidate who can offer a fresh vision with a real opportunity to deliver on their promises.

In six weeks, Granite Staters will head to the polls in record numbers and uphold our 100-year responsibility of hosting the first-in-the-nation primary.

**[We have an obligation to get it right-- and Nikki Haley is the best person for the job.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70831a15fa92402db33a129234152a21&_e=OtOWYrqsRyFp3E3KeVqB6BxpE_EG49YNvr1ilPPXGZLp7O2RgbwdU4bi3F7Vv5ap4p3y_9S7dUJl2m9EGCNjoYuIiKZZHOoYyaRW-wz78jH3e49bJT2IWFiqST8oRcy_5X_9yAwc46tJ0b7gE_SFQRO9v7T5Idqegh6wqecbqE0y-JGGgo48ruIqO6DsMpWX6F0D3lvw4rcY-HEVf8ukANyv2QVAlnEeQ6qWe73D8kcIWszMznVf3OIeu6vDGLfl9eZG8MFd3I1zEfJEH6n6WZo_MWXm306kBiqUDRtoGKXHJPOIEJ8zjU1okkxO_jBKQqnjG8HF48vPfkEwEw_hClMQC4EybWJstWjsm72uqoFuT85Zdx6n1fYIjh45-NKqewwVS2CFr9oIess0UhrzXjsSaM-XOxMHTHqc7TJdgN7f3xfZBl_QLbpHdtq5yC83KoBTqGgtH13TG6Ni89kOEf0dyt4fSWGdv0mIG5-iZF2eB1NLZaicVS3pYkL-f0OaQmwCYYxktjuM9PCnH1i9XN1Pnc_3C5BYZInDArLdym8_vZ8P74Gta8kCeMNMTHZLOmQVTzu5C8fqX5J2mpXzLGc-BhLCGhlOuIDW4TkDYaS6i1Ybv4bXLJ2Nlh4ZafIUANKrLEtBkPoKEz6gOJJC9h-hwAOlPHHhzsfnFoaGopQ%3D "We have an obligation to get it right — and Nikki Haley is the best person for the job.")**

| | [SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70831a15fa92402db33a129234152a21&_e=OtOWYrqsRyFp3E3KeVqB6BxpE_EG49YNvr1ilPPXGZLp7O2RgbwdU4bi3F7Vv5ap4p3y_9S7dUJl2m9EGCNjoYuIiKZZHOoYyaRW-wz78jH3e49bJT2IWFiqST8oRcy_5X_9yAwc46tJ0b7gE_SFQRO9v7T5Idqegh6wqecbqE0y-JGGgo48ruIqO6DsMpWX6F0D3lvw4rcY-HEVf8ukANyv2QVAlnEeQ6qWe73D8kcIWszMznVf3OIeu6vDGLfl9eZG8MFd3I1zEfJEH6n6WZo_MWXm306kBiqUDRtoGKXHJPOIEJ8zjU1okkxO_jBKQqnjG8HF48vPfkEwEw_hClMQC4EybWJstWjsm72uqoFuT85Zdx6n1fYIjh45-NKqewwVS2CFr9oIess0UhrzXjsSaM-XOxMHTHqc7TJdgN7f3xfZBl_QLbpHdtq5yC83KoBTqGgtH13TG6Ni89kOEf0dyt4fSWGdv0mIG5-iZF2eB1NLZaicVS3pYkL-f0OaQmwCYYxktjuM9PCnH1i9XEfVZcZyczD3-OhH-7v0O1zW48nixmNJsxSK2DTX6hGXrxf-oT2EzhOxw9EEVe5egt5qsmgf3Ag10VwmsV75G2d7Rz1ktE6K5sVAvSxikrAYBdVGi9ExZmknn0rcruyUPMkC-uw9OlEEZL3ls4Nd_lc%3D)

The polling is clear -- Nikki is the best Republican candidate to beat the Democrats this November.

Just recently, a new poll from the Wall Street Journal showed that in a head-to-head matchup with President Joe Biden, Nikki Haley beats him by 17 points -- an astronomical number that should give confidence and momentum to Republican candidates up and down the ballot.

With Nikki Haley at the top of the ticket, Republicans will win the presidency, the United States Senate and House, retain the New Hampshire governor's office, and expand majorities in our state legislature.

Nikki Haley is running to save America. She will crack down on illegal immigration and stop the flow of deadly fentanyl pouring over our southern border. In these uncertain times, she offers a steady hand to right the ship here at home and abroad.

Nikki Haley is surging in New Hampshire because she's running a true "Live Free or Die" campaign. She's pounding the pavement, meeting voters in their living rooms, holding town halls, and going diner-to-diner. She's not just talking wherever she goes, she's listening -- and that's what it takes to be a great leader. She's looked us in the eye, answered our questions, and taken the time to build trust.

We must consolidate behind one candidate -- the candidate who has the best chance of victory.

**[I hope you will join me in supporting Nikki Haley for president. Please consider making a contribution to her campaign today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70831a15fa92402db33a129234152a21&_e=OtOWYrqsRyFp3E3KeVqB6BxpE_EG49YNvr1ilPPXGZLp7O2RgbwdU4bi3F7Vv5ap4p3y_9S7dUJl2m9EGCNjoYuIiKZZHOoYyaRW-wz78jH3e49bJT2IWFiqST8oRcy_5X_9yAwc46tJ0b7gE_SFQRO9v7T5Idqegh6wqecbqE0y-JGGgo48ruIqO6DsMpWX6F0D3lvw4rcY-HEVf8ukANyv2QVAlnEeQ6qWe73D8kcIWszMznVf3OIeu6vDGLfl9eZG8MFd3I1zEfJEH6n6WZo_MWXm306kBiqUDRtoGKXHJPOIEJ8zjU1okkxO_jBKQqnjG8HF48vPfkEwEw_hClMQC4EybWJstWjsm72uqoFuT85Zdx6n1fYIjh45-NKqewwVS2CFr9oIess0UhrzXjsSaM-XOxMHTHqc7TJdgN7f3xfZBl_QLbpHdtq5yC83KoBTqGgtH13TG6Ni89kOEf0dyt4fSWGdv0mIG5-iZF2eB1NLZaicVS3pYkL-f0OaQmwCYYxktjuM9PCnH1i9XKw-O4rmmAqlRaBVUKgs4kS_e8Gn_i4Q1APCeA-RcWLZ5d25MI8vzgi12nD5tj4SX-aq_bINnGwPg4V6JSLBBR3HhsBfBECsY4C7SqIXx0Gl9kYfSLwvajh80DRsJsunIsX66EftZu5jvrlX6bMEz_4%3D "I hope you will join me in supporting Nikki Haley for president. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States | | | | | Friend, I AM enthusiastically endorsing Nikki Haley for president of the United States, and I am asking you to join me in being a part of this movement. We must support the best conservative candidate in this race who can win in November 2024 to deliver results in 2025. New Hampshire has never looked to candidates of the past who had their chance but failed to deliver on their promises. We never settle -- we look to the future at the candidate who can offer a fresh vision with a real opportunity to deliver on their promises. In six weeks, Granite Staters will head to the polls in record numbers and uphold our 100-year responsibility of hosting the first-in-the-nation primary. "We have an obligation to get it right — and Nikki Haley is the best person for the job." | | The polling is clear -- Nikki is the best Republican candidate to beat the Democrats this November. Just recently, a new poll from the Wall Street Journal showed that in a head-to-head matchup with President Joe Biden, Nikki Haley beats him by 17 points -- an astronomical number that should give confidence and momentum to Republican candidates up and down the ballot. With Nikki Haley at the top of the ticket, Republicans will win the presidency, the United States Senate and House, retain the New Hampshire governor's office, and expand majorities in our state legislature. Nikki Haley is running to save America. She will crack down on illegal immigration and stop the flow of deadly fentanyl pouring over our southern border. In these uncertain times, she offers a steady hand to right the ship here at home and abroad. Nikki Haley is surging in New Hampshire because she's running a true "Live Free or Die" campaign. She's pounding the pavement, meeting voters in their living rooms, holding town halls, and going diner-to-diner. She's not just talking wherever she goes, she's listening -- and that's what it takes to be a great leader. She's looked us in the eye, answered our questions, and taken the time to build trust. We must consolidate behind one candidate -- the candidate who has the best chance of victory. "I hope you will join me in supporting Nikki Haley for president. Please consider making a contribution to her campaign today. " Thank you, Gov. Chris Sununu | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | - "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

### UPCOMING EVENTS
## Join Us for Rallies and Events Near You
**[Dec. 20th, 2023 -- Phoenix, AZ,](https://www.kennedy24.com/phoenix-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=1)** ballot access rally at Legends Event Center, 6:15 PM MST [**Dec. 20th, 2023** **\-- Phoenix AZ, Private reception**](https://www.kennedy24.com/phoenix-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=2) prior to the rally, 5:00 PM MST **[Dec. 21st, 2023 -- Newport Beach, CA](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception-12-21?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=3)** Private Reception [**January 1st, 2024 -- Aspen, CO**](https://www.kennedy24.com/aspen-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=4), Spend New Year's Day with RFK Jr. [**January 6th, 2024 -- Oregon**](https://www.kennedy24.com/lake-oswego?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=5), **Private event hosted by Lisa and JB Handley,** founders of Generation Rescue
**
**
---
* * *
---
## When We Hit 100% Participation
The latest polls show RFK Jr. ahead of Biden and Trump among voters under age 45. But we need your help getting on the ballot in all 50 states. "I am resolved to give you 100% of my resources and energy to get on the ballot in all 50 states**. If 100% of my supporters make a contribution, even just $1 or $5, together we WILL win this election.** Go to **[kennedy24.com/donate and donate today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/contribute?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=6 "donate") " -- RFK Jr.**

[ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/participation-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=7)
---
---
|
## Win a Day of Falconry with RFK Jr.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. discovered hawking when he was 9 years old and has been involved in the sport ever since. And now, he’d like to share his love of hawking with you. **You and a guest could win a trip to meet RFK Jr. to enjoy an afternoon of falconry and conversation.** The prize winner will receive round-trip airfare from a major city, 2 nights hotel stay, and an afternoon of falconry with RFK Jr., including lunch. **[Enter now!](Win%20a%20Day%20of%20Falconry%20with%20RFK%20Jr.%20Robert%20F.%20Kennedy,%20Jr.%20discovered%20hawking%20when%20he%20was%209%20years%20old%20and%20has%20been%20involved%20in%20the%20sport%20ever%20since.%20It's%20one%20of%20the%20great%20joys%20of%20his%20life.%20%20And%20now,%20he%E2%80%99d%20like%20to%20share%20his%20love%20of%20hawking%20with%20you.%20%20For%20a%20limited%20time,%20the%20Kennedy%20campaign%20is%20hosting%20a%20sweepstakes%20and%20offering%20a%20trip%20for%20you%20and%20a%20guest%20to%20.%20The%20prize%20winner%20will%20receive%20round-trip%20airfare%20from%20a%20major%20city,%202%20nights%20hotel%20stay,%20and%20an%20afternoon%20of%20falconry%20with%20RFK%20Jr.%20including%20lunch.%20%20%20%20%20No%20donation%20necessary%20to%20win,%20see%20the%20%20for%20details.%20%20%2410%20donation%20equals%20one%20entry,%20multiple%20%2410%20donations%20grant%20you%20multiple%20entries.%20%20Enter%20to%20win%20by%20%20Enter%20now!%20Deadline%20to%20enter%20is%20December%2031st,%202023.) Deadline is December 31st, 2023\. **No donation necessary to win, see the [official rules](https://www.kennedy24.com/falcon-sweepstakes-rules?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=8) for details.
---

### On the Campaign Trail in Lincoln, Nebraska
Kennedy spent the majority of the rally appealing to issues that he says impacts young voters. The campaign is strongest with young voters as indicated by recent polls. His speaking points mainly focused on issues that impact middle and lower class voters, specifically affordable housing, wealth distribution, and political polarization. [Read more](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=T9YzwumsqncChRaccwfjWv3QieHipzI5-7_mNrUHeakZ8KmyxHWIud4g4wvIMV897gqAPS9a19HdbFj7CEyo60Mbmx5BiRLJx3-JGIyFEe8vYCwo3Rx-fYnny5nMw1zaTkrqF-MV1LV66CoBQfBWTi3tx_AfVmB9k-j4Mns2cEYseDA4qDWiEMtyK0vb3F4ouY_TRNSAxghF923KzwVgNNyG_W404uNoa4NyTPeY2NQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=news_reveiw_and_upcoming_event&n=10)

|
### In the News: Cuomo and Carville on RFK Jr. Poll Numbers
NewsNation’s Chris Cuomo interviews legendary democratic political strategist James Carville on why my polling numbers are so “extraordinary.” Carville describes the widespread dissatisfaction with President Biden and the Democratic party as so apparent that it would be “evident to an amoeba.”

subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zooje8te1hvsujqcjka692clrioe1rbki6jatvkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj66o74cjh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeu28klese8orrlmihrvga94o43igtlqoj92ms5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj66o74cjh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4oqm3pl7rs30nphaqqbq4jkiscc98q7thh900bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj66o74cjh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo37g2os6gdhk6ppntgmid07ff3hingpbq328fi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo32cjj66o74cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Action News
---

name: The EMILYs List Campaigns team
subject: 3️⃣ swing state Senate races we can't afford to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Control of the Senate could be determined by swing states this cycle |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75392281/444531254/2084576589?sourceid=1052579&refcode=20231218_SwingStateDeepdive_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFEL31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY3NDFlYi1jODlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGuKl6Aw10l6SAcFDE2NiWeG-_rurbyPXIy9PjBvtTM=) Peter,

Control of the Senate is up for grabs next November, and our Democratic majority is _razor-thin_. Democrats are defending more than twice as many seats as Republicans this cycle, three of which are in _quintessential_ swing states — Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin.

That's where EMILYs List-endorsed candidates **Elissa Slotkin (MI-SEN)** and Sens. **Jacky Rosen (NV)** and **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** come in. ****Control of the Senate will be determined by swing states this cycle. So before we jump in, Peter: Can Democratic pro-choice women count on your support in majority-defining Senate races? Here's what you need to know about **Elissa** , **Jacky** , and **Tammy's** races:
* In Michigan, **Elissa Slotkin** is fighting hard to protect a newly-open blue seat in a deep purple state. In 2016, former President Trump won the state with _less than 1%_ of the popular vote, and in 2020 the state swung blue, electing President Biden by a narrow _2.8%_ of the vote. Early polling in Elissa's race found that 25% of voters remain _undecided_ — this race WILL come down to the wire.
* In 2022, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto's reelection victory in Nevada came down to _less than 1%_. In the same election, Silver State voters unseated their Democrat governor. So Republicans are _counting_ on Sen. **Jacky Rosen's** reelection race to be neck-and-neck this cycle.
* States do not get swingier than Wisconsin. Sen. **Tammy Baldwin's** counterpart in the Senate, Republican Sen. Ron Johnson, was reelected by a 1% margin last November. And while Wisconsonites reelected their Democratic governor this past cycle, _both_ state chambers are controlled by Republicans.

Our ability to protect these three seats will help determine whether we hold the Senate next November. It's as simple as that. Make no mistake: **Elissa** , **Jacky** , and **Tammy** will need the _full support_ of our pro-choice community to WIN.

name: Jon Lovett
subject: Great sandwiches and mean people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Nowhere is more important than PA.
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Lovett. I love Pennsylvania.
It’s home to Philly, the city that dares to ask the question: what’s the opposite of Southern hospitality?
One thing I learned about myself by visiting the Commonwealth is that I don’t care how you treat me, as long as the sandwiches are good, and you’ve got the best sandwiches in the country. (Cry about it, Chicago.)
Pennsylvania is also home to Bob Casey, who’s facing a tough re-election.
The senior Senator is up against David McCormick, an out-of-towner rich guy (PA Republicans sure do have a type) who supports extreme abortion bans with no exceptions for rape or incest.
This guy could self-fund this race and has a bunch of right-wing money hanging over the race like a piano on a fraying string. Republicans could spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ in PA to flip this seat red.
[**That’s why I’m doing one of these classic emails asking you to chip in a few dollars to support Senator Bob Casey’s re-election campaign, because we need to do everything we can to help him win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231218-1?refcode=em20231218-1&refcode2=1419_552475_5c_J2K&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)
We all know that Pennsylvania will be a top presidential battleground in 2024. It’s part of both Democrats’ and Republicans’ path to victories.
**That puts an even bigger spotlight on this Senate race, where Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in for the mega-millionaire hedge fund exec (that’s McCormick, who I mentioned earlier).**
[**This is going to be a tough race, and we just can’t afford to lose this seat. Can you chip in to Bob’s campaign today? Every dollar counts!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231218-1?refcode=em20231218-1&refcode2=1419_552475_5c_J2K&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)
**[Donate to help re-elect Bob Casey ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231218-1?refcode=em20231218-1&refcode2=1419_552475_5c_J2K&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)**
This race could determine the Senate majority. _We have to win._
Thanks for the sandwiches,
Jon Lovett
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231218-1?refcode=em20231218-1&refcode2=1419_552475_5c_J2K&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Speechwriter to President Obama

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1419%2E552475%2E5c_J2K)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

subject: Join me at Mar-a-Lago!

Friend,
I’m hosting a very special reception at Mar-a-Lago in February (_right after we will have posted MASSIVE VICTORIES in both the first caucus and primary of 2024!_) to outline our path to winning back the White House in a historic landslide.
After securing our status as the presumptive Republican nominee to defeat Crooked Joe, I will deliver remarks and a pep talk to our team as we shift 100% of our time and resources to the _REAL_ MISSION of 2024: **firing Crooked Joe and SAVING our country!**
_...And as a critical part of Team Trump, I’d love to have**YOU** there._
**That’s right, I want YOU to join me at Mar-a-Lago as my VIP GUEST for this once-in-a-lifetime MAGA reception on February 16! **
_I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice out to the event for FREE. I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy drinks and hors d'oeuvres on me, you’ll get a hat signed by me, and to top it all off, you’ll even get to take a special photo with yours truly so that you can remember this amazing night forever!_
Because come January 20, 2025, when I am sworn in as your 47th President, rest assured, _this_ will be the night you recall as YOUR defining moment in our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

clean_body: I’m hosting a very special reception... and I want YOU as my VIP! | | | Friend, I’m hosting a very special reception at Mar-a-Lago in February (right after we will have posted MASSIVE VICTORIES in both the first caucus and primary of 2024!) to outline our path to winning back the White House in a historic landslide. After securing our status as the presumptive Republican nominee to defeat Crooked Joe, I will deliver remarks and a pep talk to our team as we shift 100% of our time and resources to the REAL MISSION of 2024: firing Crooked Joe and SAVING our country! ...And as a critical part of Team Trump, I’d love to haveYOU there. That’s right, I want YOU to join me at Mar-a-Lago as my VIP GUEST for this once-in-a-lifetime MAGA reception on February 16! I’ll fly you and a guest of your choice out to the event for FREE. I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy drinks and hors d'oeuvres on me, you’ll get a hat signed by me, and to top it all off, you’ll even get to take a special photo with yours truly so that you can remember this amazing night forever! Because come January 20, 2025, when I am sworn in as your 47th President, rest assured, this will be the night you recall as YOUR defining moment in our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
| Milwaukee Sheriff David Clarke doubled down on his plans to challenge Tammy Baldwin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1724%2E35263%2E7vplvr)
Peter — The GOP primary in Wisconsin’s Senate race is already getting messy. Last week, Senate Republicans confirmed megamillionaire Eric Hovde will enter the race to defeat Tammy Baldwin. **But that hasn’t stopped former Milwaukee Sheriff David Clarke from doubling down on his plans to challenge Tammy himself.** Clarke even called out national Republicans for recruiting wealthy candidates who can self-fund their campaigns — in addition to Hovde, Tammy’s facing a potential challenge from yet _another_ megamillionaire who would be propelled by a virtually unlimited campaign war chest. **Peter, ANY of these extreme right-wing candidates would be bad for Wisconsin — and all of them would spend a fortune to attack Tammy’s record and drown out our campaign. That’s why we need your support today:** **[Will you donate to Tammy’s reelection campaign and help her find off right-wing attacks to keep Wisconsin blue? It’s only a matter of time before more GOP opponents enter this race.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231218_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1724%2E35263%2E7vplvr)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231218_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1724%2E35263%2E7vplvr)

Last week, Senate Republicans confirmed megamillionaire Eric Hovde will enter the race to defeat Tammy Baldwin. But that hasn’t stopped former Milwaukee Sheriff David Clarke from doubling down on his plans to challenge Tammy himself. Clarke even called out national Republicans for recruiting wealthy candidates who can self-fund their campaigns — in addition to Hovde, Tammy’s facing a potential challenge from yet another megamillionaire who would be propelled by a virtually unlimited campaign war chest. Peter, ANY of these extreme right-wing candidates would be bad for Wisconsin — and all of them would spend a fortune to attack Tammy’s record and drown out our campaign. That’s why we need your support today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for pitching in. — Team Baldwin P.O. body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88677f28019a4ed582cff2c8cfdf639a&_e=ECVwqIJWcbactRHT-vQe8uEH7eUtkiRQFPelkoyNxw8vW3p-osLXpRDXuolsoBVOLONl99O9XUmQd8f1d2PpNwTteEhvaoep9ceAm6sSpoCn-jrzFIhMlKmsG6D0Qna_XYPM_hhjc8Uad2HwSgK-4SN1Jv696zI0ntmY3tH4TmcaIifM9OS-I3t2XZc20kjV2bZPK1AChHuj0E9ROhjR8RDmtqg_U3xdHPTuaPvy2hyvvKM5Hxlknbw4cgxGwwruBtgVG6M3BoxbgvRnBH2YJIynUY-1FpSMi6mFjGh01BieG3YP8v2h0UUcMcSV5FaDD87-FL0JT7xzERkLLipkqvAREZlB3bBXgYy35qoBYBN2FSNgVANMRpQnqi3uatzZpqFa0LFGqGiTlCH5NLt0K3u5ZqVFxin_bkLM7sD0yTA%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
