clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Before the break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
I wanted to email you before the holiday season hits full stride to give you a brief update on my campaign.

As you may know, our next race is right around the corner, on March 5. Ballots will start hitting voters’ mailboxes in less than two months, which means we have to hit the campaign trail running in January.

My main opponent is a right-wing extremist, who, if elected, would vote lockstep with Speaker Mike Johnson’s conservative agenda.

In addition, our fundraising quarter closes on December 31, and national Republican strategists will be watching our numbers closely to determine how much outside money they should funnel to my opponent.

This could be our most critical fundraising deadline to date, and I need your help to make it our strongest quarter of the year.

Will you visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/zmwtXan58kG2nPCZu2OmHw2 to chip in $25 or more today?

I don’t need to tell you just how important it is to take back the House majority next year. Republicans are committed to doubling down on their extremist MAGA agenda, but we can’t let that happen! That is why I need your support today. Visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/zmwtXan58kG2nPCZu2OmHw2 to chip in.

Thank you for helping to keep our momentum strong as we go into an election year. Your donation makes all the difference, and I appreciate your support.

Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
PO Box 1290, Santa Barbara, CA 93102
info@saludcarbajal.com; www.saludcarbajal.com

name: Powered By People
subject: This week in Texas - Dec. 18
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here’s what Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Overcoming GOP voter suppression

Attorney General Ken Paxton is [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60598?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1001&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]trying to pack the courts with judges
who will help him overturn elections.

He’s currently seeking to replace the judges on the Texas Court of
Criminal Appeals who barred him from unilaterally prosecuting [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60599?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1002&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]phony
“voter fraud” cases — a tactic he has frequently used to harass voters and
election workers.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231218.RL7qwN&refcode=ema20231218-236545&t=1003&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ][IMG]

As Republicans continue their fight to undermine our elections, Powered by
People is putting in the work to overcome voter suppression and elect
leaders who will uphold our democracy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231218.RL7qwN&refcode=ema20231218-236545&t=1004&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]Please chip in $3 today to help us register and organize the voters we
need to elect pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot in 2024.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231218.RL7qwN&refcode=ema20231218-236545&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]DONATE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Organizing against local abortion attacks

Tomorrow, the Amarillo City Council [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60600?utm_source=twitter%3Fsource%3Dema20231218-236545&t=1024&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]will consider an ordinance to ban
women from traveling out of state to seek an abortion.

This comes just days after the [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60601?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1025&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]story of Kate Cox gripped the nation —
Cox was [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60602?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1026&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]forced to leave the state to get a lifesaving abortion after
Ken Paxton and the Texas Supreme Court blocked her from getting the health
care she needed in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231218.RL7qwN&refcode=ema20231218-236545&t=1027&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ][IMG]

These
travel bans are the GOP’s latest attempt to control the lives of Texas
women. At least six Texas cities and counties have already passed them.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60603?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1028&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]If you live in Amarillo, contact your City Council members to urge
them to turn down this dangerous proposal.

If you live elsewhere and are aware of similar measures being considered
in your community, please let us know by responding to this email so that
we can work together to fight back.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fighting extreme anti-immigrant proposals

Congress is currently considering the most draconian immigration
legislation that we’ve seen in over a century. This includes measures to
restrict legal immigration pathways, all but eliminate asylum, and
increase deportations in our communities.

Senate Republicans are holding Ukraine aid hostage in a cynical effort to
ram through these measures — and in a troubling move, the White House and
some Senate Democrats have [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60604?source=ema20231218-236545&t=1029&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]signaled openness to taking the deal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231218.RL7qwN&refcode=ema20231218-236545&t=1030&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ][IMG]

If these failed Trump policies pass, it will [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60605?s=20%3Fsource%3Dema20231218-236545&t=1031&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]worsen the chaos at our
border and likely hurt Democrats in the 2024 elections and beyond. It will
also set a dangerous precedent of allowing Republicans to force through
extreme, unpopular legislation by holding our national security objectives
hostage.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60606?Sort=ASC%3Fsource%3Dema20231218-236545&t=1032&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4 ]Please call your U.S. Senator today to urge them to reject this
dangerous deal.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for taking action on these issues of such great importance to
our state and our nation. We hope it’s a great week for you.

— Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1033&akid=236545%2E444211%2E4PWSA4

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

My final fundraising deadline before we head into end of quarter is in less than 48 hours. I came to this country as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, and my mom worked double shifts to pay the bills. I got a job at the local doughnut shop to help her make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393730/444536785/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk501-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBlZjAxM2YtY2Q5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ojJUEUDdOR7mnQ4AXjmREGRdW-8af8YT5o_qlJocFG8=)
I’ve seen firsthand just how difficult it is for working families to get by. **But I’ve also seen the incredible opportunities that are only possible in America.**
I was able to attend college, give back to my community, and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. And, after years of long shifts and late night classes to learn English, my mom was able to retire with dignity thanks to Social Security and Medicare.
Make no mistake: There’s a lot of work that we have to do to make sure that every family has the chance to achieve their American Dream. That’s why I’m running for Senate — to protect and expand the opportunities that made my story possible.
I’m running against Rick Scott, who’s spent his career attacking those opportunities and threatening vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. He has a personal fortune of up to a quarter of a billion dollars to fund his campaign. **I’m counting on a grassroots army made up of people like you to fight back.**
**[Please, will you donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393731/444536786/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk501-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBlZjAxM2YtY2Q5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ojJUEUDdOR7mnQ4AXjmREGRdW-8af8YT5o_qlJocFG8=)****[or more before midnight tonight to help me hit my $150,000 fundraising goal and protect the opportunities that make the American Dream possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393732/444536787/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk501-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTBlZjAxM2YtY2Q5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ojJUEUDdOR7mnQ4AXjmREGRdW-8af8YT5o_qlJocFG8=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: let me explain | | | Friend, My final fundraising deadline before we head into end of quarter is in less than 48 hours. We’re statistically tied with Rick Scott in a recent poll, so we need to show strong fundraising numbers to make sure he can’t pull ahead of us. But right now, we’re $15,228 short of my final $150,000 goal. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a $5 donation to my campaign. But first, will you let me explain why I’m in this race?= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I came to this country as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, and my mom worked double shifts to pay the bills. I got a job at the local doughnut shop to help her make ends meet. = I’ve seen firsthand just how difficult it is for working families to get by. But I’ve also seen the incredible opportunities that are only possible in America. I was able to attend college, give back to my community, and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. And, after years of long shifts and late night classes to learn English, my mom was able to retire with dignity thanks to Social Security and Medicare. Make no mistake: There’s a lot of work that we have to do to make sure that every family has the chance to achieve their American Dream. That’s why I’m running for Senate — to protect and expand the opportunities that made my story possible. I’m running against Rick Scott, who’s spent his career attacking those opportunities and threatening vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. He has a personal fortune of up to a quarter of a billion dollars to fund his campaign. I’m counting on a grassroots army made up of people like you to fight back. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| | Peter — There are a lot of different jobs you can work in politics. From plush gigs for a powerful incumbent, to grassroots organizing knocking on doors in far flung parts of the country for a Presidential hopeful, to polling voters, or canvassing for a ballot measure. So why'd I pick this one? **Beyond the obvious fact that I believe in Lynn, her mission, and that she's got the credentials to get things done — it comes down to where the important fights are.** There's no reason that OR-5 should be red, let alone the type of red that has MAGA policy priorities. Right now, the balance of power in Congress is pivotal in shaping the nation's trajectory — and boy, are we at a crossroads in 2024. As we approach election season, we need to come in on the offensive. As we've seen with the evolution of politics in the last decade — the consequences of who holds the majority in the House now significantly impacts critical issues affecting every American's life, from voting rights and reproductive freedom to healthcare costs and environmental protections. **One of the primary concerns lies in safeguarding voting rights, a cornerstone of democracy.** Unfortunately, the rise of ✨certain factions✨ within the Republican Party, are now the dominating narrative and loudly threaten to undermine these fundamental rights. Efforts to restrict voting access have gained traction in some states, posing a severe risk to the democratic process. And I'll be damned if Oregon joins their ranks. [**Flipping House seats is a critical to countering the regressive policies of folks like Lori Chavez-DeRemer — and that's why I'm here. And, it's why I'm asking if you can make a contribution ahead of our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393799/444537078/974409837?refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393800/444537079/974409837?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393801/444537080/974409837?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=)

[OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393804/444537083/974409837?refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=)
As a man, I feel an added responsibility to protect reproductive freedom. This is an essential aspect of personal autonomy, and instead of being treated as such, the rights of people to govern their own bodies is under attack. It's inappropriate beyond measure and has real, life-or-death implications. And frankly, I want to know how _that_ is aligned with the "small government" that the GOP has been pushing for the last few decades?
**It's not. And that's why we need people in leadership like Lynn, instead of Lori. Someone willing to step up, speak out, and actually do the right thing for her constituents.**[**Will you join this movement by chipping in $3 today before our end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393805/444537084/974409837?refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=)
Health care costs continue to burden millions of Americans. The House's role in shaping health care policy is undeniable, and the difference between a Congress that advances accessible and affordable health care versus one that seeks to undermine it has grave consequences. **Sending Lynn to Congress will help pave the way for progressive health care reforms that so many are relying on.**
Finally, when I look at my own child and think about the world I'll leave behind — environmental protection demands urgent action. MAGA Republicans like Lori Chavez DeRemer refusal to pass robust climate policies and environmental protections threatens our entire planet's future. **Flipping seats to a more environmentally conscious majority will catalyze a more sustainable future.**
Every House seat counts. The need to elect representatives committed to progress, inclusivity, and safeguarding fundamental rights is paramount. Flipping red to blue isn't just about partisanship; it's about shaping policies that align with the values of fairness, equality, and forward-thinking progress.
[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75393806/444537112/974409837?refcode=2023-12-18-kyle&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=54db6b5e-cd9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGRiNmI1ZS1jZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eDOeOIqv3ON2-bTiGjaiJy-7Nx2EpkSv9oaquQwWBA=)
**So, the stakes are high — and I'm with Lynn because she'll meet that challenge every. single. time.**
If you're ready for a representative dedicated to inclusive policies, protection of civil rights, and a vision for a better future, then you're in the right place, too.

_Kyle Linhares, Campaign Manager_

name: John Fetterman
subject: What gives ME hope re: PA 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!

| Hey Peter, it’s John. I really need to talk to you about my friend Bob Casey.

The 2024 election is approaching fast —and **the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.**

Republicans are zeroing in on 2024’s battleground states as we speak. You can bet Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires will spend hundreds of million$ to attack Bob.

This is *seriously* scary stuff, but you know what gives ME hope? This amazing grassroots team!!!

The way we stopped the GOP in 2022 is the same way we fight back and re-elect Bob now: by bringing together an **✨** all-star grassroots team**✨** that can stand up to the GOP’s money by folks chipping in $5, $25, or more at a time.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3aab57b34ed94f14a9d50e91a9e3f3e9&_e=anlvBEOOCwic_IFqq86C-L2L71q6f5HTfMWN8UZweodnnFwWLzxoPt-wF6fUQjCuYHHZDY6KeeR6MjjiW362EX8_sppTN_k2KzV-gxC4MGlCUdg_3fneHBYaUBDXUGZVRwEr1o5QZamcaFw1b2fLBvunabQVhRhozlO7UOO-EVl8Er5kfFceFaIULSnsLJzhGEQPK_sq5fVZBBjgIsHijHDBiLY_4RcIYj4c_OTgAYPhECRnkShMdVQcGHfZQDNM3xlpqBmDmHlZyFlY_U3L7Av2TFGosZfLD-rAj9xYHU2o2dm_akZCkTPhC5xFFNYf8PXT74Iph1ttnc5NMHaJTZ2Ua9hRMGPGU6MKjsqJVzVzlaiasLfPvp3T7Q4hPWO1BeP_CHnGbYPAjquLsU68cts-1ozuyhSXof5ig1c2_jQ%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3aab57b34ed94f14a9d50e91a9e3f3e9&_e=anlvBEOOCwic_IFqq86C-L2L71q6f5HTfMWN8UZweodnnFwWLzxoPt-wF6fUQjCuYHHZDY6KeeR6MjjiW362EX8_sppTN_k2KzV-gxC4MGlCUdg_3fneHBYaUBDXUGZVRwEr1o5QZamcaFw1b2fLBvunabQVhRhozlO7UOO-EVl8Er5kfFceFaIULSnsLJzhGEQPK_sq5fVZBBjgIsHijHDBiLY_4RcIYj4c_OTgAYPhECRnkShMdVQcGHfZQDNML7JNWUdWgX0ZnP6MjS-EjN4-_48xEArAEUL051YUvAZcrp_AZUXNGw7amg0uTEXbURgHtP-fPfr--DBF3wEr9jgToq_1SttgDId3KKTBZVuLj2QhnGs0SaL04Tpyqv6ymfA3J1VEAv8SphaGPoYVY2uNJ4rMdt1_qPzgBUPahmg%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3aab57b34ed94f14a9d50e91a9e3f3e9&_e=anlvBEOOCwic_IFqq86C-L2L71q6f5HTfMWN8UZweodnnFwWLzxoPt-wF6fUQjCuYHHZDY6KeeR6MjjiW362EX8_sppTN_k2KzV-gxC4MGlCUdg_3fneHBYaUBDXUGZVRwEr1o5QZamcaFw1b2fLBvunabQVhRhozlO7UOO-EVl8Er5kfFceFaIULSnsLJzhGEQPK_sq5fVZBBjgIsHijHDBiLY_4RcIYj4c_OTgAYPhECRnkShMdVQcGHfZQDNM4Tw3HT1MQQJ-L6N2FtfkkGe01R2LC4LXwKCBzIv5buXqb23PCvrhQD3azEEap4OvsiO59CG5D7tsFUrlwWCeJ61ZTou2wbS8i4CQOa0WIcYO9jjKeOh2U56XsdkpcVk4HQZUlEa3ohzFM3_dTf7Tt-MRuYV5yrK8XaXaD2dlJro%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

subject: I just set an ambitious goal Friend!

body:
|

| | |
Friend.

I'm honored to be the 56th Speaker of the House of Representatives, and I can't wait to get to work! Together, we will fight back against Joe Biden's reckless agenda and enact common sense conservative policies!

To ensure that we start off strong, I have set an ambitious goal. _**I need to add a record number of new donors to our team as quickly as possible to secure a Republican victory in 2024.**_
[**Will you help me hit my donor goal to start my Speakership off on the right foot?**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=660614d52da64ef394ee3656a4378d76&_e=n2nNY0v6fEf30RuyQzIlwRgKXUyGSa7JJF_2srKYBAC_sgPhAJsDSo8O6OyUW1M89C78ed45fM6b2vAIy_0qflooS4dNGk2doI3eo7Qc_NYSwnPP3aLPnhcE9iWbNKTqJ-AtJ9CZwlS3T7F1TmeN3DLTpcJ-XKoJSTw0YaCfHxAfLQKS_XzztNfHvW2CCsCIlT-Wa03OuqLqtkASaUJaRitfdBQv21sha3sncXeZkrA3P3YOHR8uZo56QA4fDLGQZ-S7Jml48OGbLFjooCyycGzOAvBvL1jmhQhVedS9mu6Gx1K9fB8W4oTMvVVLLaSuQcxyVUrB-hE-c5PXlgSvMRnd2JVeaXZV_X5Ky7A39EOg1wJC7ICIr56IOt1gfv7T "Will you help me hit my goal of 5,000 donors to start my Speakership off on the right foot?")

Hey, Peter, Patty here – I want to tell you a quick story:
Back in the '80s, local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I spoke out, and a male legislator told me I couldn’t make a difference because I was "**just a mom in tennis shoes.** " _Well this mom in tennis shoes organized a grassroots coalition of 13,000 parents –**and together, we saved the program. **_
That's when I knew governments are best run by the people they represent – so I ran for school board and then the state legislature. Fast forward to today, and I'm still fighting for families in the U.S. Senate.
**But here's the thing, Peter: Politico __ has reported that the Senate map is "hell" for Democrats this cycle.** To keep our blue majority and keep delivering for the people of Washington state and beyond, I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you –****[so please, will you help make sure we’re on track to keep and expand the Senate in 2024 by rushing $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75395312/444542057/254407035?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFmZDUwNi1kMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rz-h1k2gdoQEP0x7tPiGih0FfhVXl08yLFSCp3UuQOA=)

body:

(Amazing)

following message from our sponsor.

If you're struggling with endless

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | This is it, Peter. We’re coming up on the deadline at the end of this year that will decide EVERYTHING. The end of 2023 means it’s OFFICIALLY the start of the ON YEAR. That means we need to get boots on the ground NOW to help turn out and organize voters before we fall behind. Grassroots activism like this isn’t cheap, which means we have to meet EVERY fundraising goal between now and Election Day 2024 to compete AND WIN. THAT'S WHY WE NEED YOU TO STEP UP AND HELP US REACH OUR $50K GOAL. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, we’re just 2 weeks from the end of the year and we’re starting to get REALLY nervous about reaching our end-of-year fundraising goal. We know it’s not going to be easy to take back the House majority, expand our Senate majority, elect a Black woman to the Senate and block Donald Trump’s path back to the White House all in one cycle , but we also know that the future of our democracy hinges on our ability to do so — and that starts with knocking this $50,000 goal out of the park. name: Abolish the Electoral College (via FFR)
subject: here's what you missed:
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
We need you now more than ever
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b)
---
| _**WE TOLD YOU**_ donations to our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign were drying up...

_**WE TOLD YOU**_ experts are predicting that the Electoral College will hand Trump the presidency again – without winning the popular vote!

_**AND WE TOLD YOU**_ that Democrats like Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, and Adam Schiff are warning us that the Electoral College hurts our democracy!
---
[]()
But you must have missed our messages, because you didn’t step up and **we MISSED our goal to relaunch our Abolish the Electoral College Ads.**
[_BUT OUR FINANCE TEAM IS EXTENDING OUR DEADLINE ONE LAST TIME – UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT._ WITH JUST $2,047 LEFT TO RAISE, WE’RE COUNTING ON YOUR $7 DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34618?t=7&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b)
---
Trump is THRILLED to see efforts to abolish the Electoral College get thwarted – he knows the Electoral College is his one-way ticket back to the White House!

**We need you now more than ever** – our very democracy is at stake with Trump so close to another win against the will of the American people.

**We’re practically begging:** [**Chip in $7 before our extended deadline passes to fund our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34618?t=8&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34619?t=9&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34618?t=13&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b)
Thank you,

– FFR

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20534%2E4449941%2EWPrV5b).**

name: Team Cori
subject: The Former white supremacist-in-chief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush has constantly called out the GOP for its harmful rhetoric and legislation | |
---
Peter, **** **** **Today marks the four year anniversary of former white supremacist-in-chief Donald Trump’s first impeachment.** He was impeached for his abuse of power and for soliciting foreign interference in our elections. Despite all this, **he is the leading Republican candidate for President by a longshot.** This is the Republican party we are dealing with: putting its most extremist and bigoted leaders in the spotlight. **Cori Bush has constantly called out the GOP for its rhetoric and legislation** which have harmed countless Black and brown communities, LGBTQ+ communities, and working class people. She’s been fearless in combating systemic racism since she first took office. **** [**Cori will always stand up for the disenfranchised and the right-wing will always demand she sit back down! We need you to have her back. clean_body: Cori Bush has constantly called out the GOP for its harmful rhetoric and legislation | | Peter, ** Today marks the four year anniversary of former white supremacist-in-chief Donald Trump’s first impeachment. He was impeached for his abuse of power and for soliciting foreign interference in our elections. Despite all this, he is the leading Republican candidate for President by a longshot. This is the Republican party we are dealing with: putting its most extremist and bigoted leaders in the spotlight. Cori Bush has constantly called out the GOP for its rhetoric and legislation which have harmed countless Black and brown communities, LGBTQ+ communities, and working class people. She’s been fearless in combating systemic racism since she first took office. Today mark’s Trump’s first impeachment, but a little over a year later, he was impeached yet again for inciting the far-right insurrection on January 6th, 2021. Lest we forget: Donald Trump himself engaged in the January 6th insurrection when he incited white supremacist attacks and an attempted coup that left five people dead and hundreds of people injured. After sending the mob to the Capitol and urging them to “fight like hell,” for hours Trump did nothing to stop them as they assaulted police officers and dragged them into the crowd to attack them with their own tasers and the sharpened ends of flagpoles. We need strong leaders who will push back against Trump and MAGA Republicans’ racist, hateful attacks on our democracy and attempts to overthrow our government. We must continue building momentum to dismantle white supremacy and defend our democracy. Cori is doing that and that’s why far-right groups and billionaire-funded super PACs are trying to unseat her. They don’t want our movement’s vision of a more equitable, just future to come to fruition. But as we’ve seen time and time again, our people power has and will continue to to defeat the oligarchs and far-right extremists. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70b4c337374ea991d2686e4408e4c1&_e=BJJNE27SZ1U_6wELnctT2GFaH2R5qMKGOsdF6ZLWEzwh0u2uzBXuOfCwP82jrKYHoLfJvh9hSFDLVsWiHPIllKBzmzpkDp9HzNql92SstcEXA1CbZWWqSTL8vFt7sboLNVptcsczCzUISssjh9Y9A2GlMWeRTZbykJ6XQLg_PxfRnM4dZZAF_XnBDaofGKaVpj0L2uHRUC3FhV28wP91PVHsxTHDCFslpaLIHA232DZPBvaSByafv20S0MEj8FGeFdrn7IAHS7rv2Rf7Qz7O_qHARFVv2Wu4CvtNIZLSwz3f1lRP6Y6_lMPtW_BzCSMdbvGZYj96ssu5VNa2R_z7uVTLHgispXUbrTGSDLkoKDRfWYPaXHkl-YsdbAmJsmJWihus-2XLtRQd9_SiUrixlg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f70b4c337374ea991d2686e4408e4c1&_e=BJJNE27SZ1U_6wELnctT2GFaH2R5qMKGOsdF6ZLWEzwh0u2uzBXuOfCwP82jrKYHoLfJvh9hSFDLVsWiHPIllKBzmzpkDp9HzNql92SstcEXA1CbZWWqSTL8vFt7sboLNVptcsczCzUISssjh9Y9A2GlMWeRTZbykJ6XQLg_PxfRnM4dZZAF_XnBDaofGKaVpj0L2uHRUC3FhV28wP91PVHsxTHDCFslpaLIHA232DbVVWDZkvDggYNP4n48wfZzyn9AJ02AgMwrpb0xjdKZ8dr8j8BLtER6cbWpiAJBDRmF-gQPsgWPNUsPm73O8zBrgplBBV-Z79bndE4j2loTGYkNXCgL_-iTpWx_PUeK3OC2is_S7EdCCn6Ro6k11sZIzdGGnDFndgLL_KsqvP8Xhg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Elon Musk: “Go F--- Yourself!”
body:
When you’re the richest man in human history, you can say exactly what you think
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| Dear Reader, When you’re the richest man in human history, you can say _exactly_ what you think That’s why Elon Musk recently told the CEO of Disney, "Go f--- yourself." Elon was responding to “getting blackmailed” over ad dollars on Twitter. He just doesn’t care because he’s THAT rich... He’s THAT free. And you know what promises to make Elon the world’s first trillionaire? His [new AI startup.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/xGWZVvAuyV1sWHEleQ5j6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnY0AEP0RgaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYnJvd25zdG9uZXJlc2VhcmNoLmNvbS8_Y2lkPU1LVDc4MDEyMCZlaWQ9TUtUNzg0ODM0JmFmZl9jbGlja19pZD1STS1ST04yLTIwMjMxMjE4VwNzcGNCCmV9wpOAZdS147hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) I know that sounds crazy, but consider his last three startups: PayPal, SpaceX, and Tesla. Just $300 into those startups could’ve turned into $647,000. I think Elon’s AI startup could be even bigger than that. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Burn pits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
A story about how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in whatever you can before our next major end-of-quarter deadline later this month.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) But first, I wanted to take some time to share a bit about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.**
Please let me explain:
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)**
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at grassroots campaign today so we can stay on track for our end-of-quarter deadline, get this message in front of Missouri voters, and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40288?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40287?refcode=em20231218-4414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for being part of it,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231218-4414-footer&t=13&refcode2=4414_614464_FHe1au&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=4414%2E614464%2EFHe1au). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter. Thanks for being part of it, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

| It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms stack up so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3d3f87ea1004154a4c90a07c6b0bc46&_e=xg1DvB1DYZIlKUghSfWV2Evk73vpghxf7bt1Z0lchRziFlaG6ZPHNlCAgqI1SOWrGi1edVsgmZYfmFfxvoXrsRo0Ia4qLd3chuHn2alThD-lNQABBJQMClK1kWcq8jEaHu8SrP6jkGLUV2hshiHedtoljlepb0Bpt9iQshasa5RXTodTztQ66DleiYyWJltmQAzINGURtpU4_3abX5Q5S1j6Guax_3QjAJXyECOEKThO5J_1Mx-2Jo9YLvDHDuB9_BP1BcxesXEM5-PamsSyiZsemmUso2brM7WcHyvxJl5wBf1gh19pdj85jKsa3_Owcl3GCMI6Qg1QdZUwBw16Dj-VItJRi-QTFs3EIjAy57EpMM5F_DTbjKylERF7UrWn5yAfMfFbi0UPhaH9GzblDuOsV8FlKutaMjLjGIjhGyUZUZf9W8JyMgOww5LwhBdS8wEPDl4H6yOv8rca87kKRHWnQnXm5uMKC0m2jIEuo0M%3D)
### Overview of Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
Vanguard made a name for itself by creating and offering low-fee investment products such as mutual funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs). It still does this, and even non-Vanguard clients can buy Vanguard funds via a brokerage account. The firm has grown to now offer non-proprietary investment products and funds.

Fidelity is perhaps best known for its personal investment products, namely brokerage accounts that allow users to trade stocks. Clients can invest in a wide range of stocks, bonds and other investment products using a Fidelity brokerage account. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models.

Schwab has a number of passively and actively managed funds that you can invest your money into. You also have the option to trade individual equities. It also offers free robo-advisor services, and those who want to work with a real advisor will have that option as well. [Learn how the fees compare here.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c3d3f87ea1004154a4c90a07c6b0bc46&_e=xg1DvB1DYZIlKUghSfWV2Evk73vpghxf7bt1Z0lchRziFlaG6ZPHNlCAgqI1SOWrGi1edVsgmZYfmFfxvoXrsRo0Ia4qLd3chuHn2alThD-lNQABBJQMClK1kWcq8jEaHu8SrP6jkGLUV2hshiHedtoljlepb0Bpt9iQshasa5RXTodTztQ66DleiYyWJltmQAzINGURtpU4_3abX5Q5S1j6Guax_3QjAJXyECOEKThO5J_1Mx-2Jo9YLvDHDuB9_BP1BcxesXEM5-PamsSyiZsemmUso2brM7WcHyvxJl5wBf1gh19pdj85jKsa3_Owcl3GCMI6Qg1QdZUwBw16DgKvtxGVUqqVpCr8105S_p4n1-xaZyzzm2hvoYrkVAGNBjrHAE9p8ayz1j7gjGS8Lv2VWvyJh_WDMM6iRDWq3O5HfNV5dZYfAe1rLOaQqFeT_pz5v0ultFZjqq1kvp7QCIKOmk9B0g0UT99gMsBLTA8%3D)

### How to Speak With a Financial Advisor

If you're interested in getting financial advice, consulting a fiduciary financial advisor can be a great first step. Fidelity also makes an effort to provide investment resources to its clients and doesn't usually charge fees on all trades, though more and more brokerages and broker-dealers are moving toward fee-free investment models. | Peter,
---
| | Big news! [Matt Gaetz just gave us a shout-out.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=299b99e177&e=54a81bd33c) He's seen our hard-hitting video on border security and is calling for reinforcements:
---
| [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7d90e96bdc&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| This is[ a battle cry for all of us who are dead set on putting America first.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6a885d828d&e=54a81bd33c)

Here's the deal: securing our borders isn't just another policy point – it's the cornerstone of our nation's safety. And right now, I'm in the trenches fighting for this cause. But let's be real – I can't do this alone.

Peter, I need you in this fight with me. I'm here to be your voice, your champion in this fight to safeguard our country.

Your support is what fuels this fight. [Whether it's $5 or $500](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1eebf60a83&e=54a81bd33c), every bit you chip in takes us closer to a future where our borders are strong and our country is secure. We're in this together – patriots united with one goal: America first, no compromises.

With your support, and nods from folks like Congressman Gaetz, we're not just dreaming of change – we're making it happen. This is our time to stand tall, to make our voices heard, and to take back control from the Radical Left.

Thanks for being the backup we need. With you as my backup, we will be unstoppable.

---

We work year-round to give back.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75397901/444551841/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231218back_N_NP_90DO_11_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmY2EzZWI3LWQ3OWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wGzZz4JqXTIdaGxM0YJr-xKP_RB5uyJ77rHGk4GR4nY=)
| Hi there,

As we near year-end, an affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund, is heading out into the community to give back!

The New PA Project Education Fund is hosting give-back days across the state, such as volunteering at local soup kitchens, shelters, and more, to continue supporting community members in the focused regions across Pennsylvania. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75397907/444551856/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231218back_N_NP_90DO_11_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmY2EzZWI3LWQ3OWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wGzZz4JqXTIdaGxM0YJr-xKP_RB5uyJ77rHGk4GR4nY=)
**Here is a look at what each of the regions is up to:**

❄️ **Allegheny:** Volunteering at the Homestead Carnegie Library and Community Kitchen.

❄️ **Capital:** Volunteering at the Brightside Community Center, Christmas attics, and packing food boxes at the Central PA Food Bank.

❄️ **Berks/Lancaster:** Volunteering at the Brightside Community Center.

❄️ **Chester/Delaware:** Handing out Blessing Bags – providing hygiene products to unhoused folks.

❄️ **Bucks Monco:** Volunteering at an unhoused shelter in Pottstown.

❄️ **Poconos/Lehigh:** Cooking and handing out food at OATH, a shelter in the Lehigh Valley.

**We are so proud of our team for hitting the streets not only to register and turn people out to vote around elections but also to give back to our community year-round. This is the impact that the New Pennsylvania Project and the affiliated New PA Project Education Fund are having.**

**Inspired to help move PA forward?** [**Consider donating $25 today to help fund the New Pennsylvania Project as we head into the critical 2024 election cycle.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75397912/444551870/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231218back_N_NP_90DO_11_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmY2EzZWI3LWQ3OWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wGzZz4JqXTIdaGxM0YJr-xKP_RB5uyJ77rHGk4GR4nY=)

Thank you,

Team NPP | __The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth.__ __**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75397918/444551882/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231218back_N_NP_90DO_11_G_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmY2EzZWI3LWQ3OWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wGzZz4JqXTIdaGxM0YJr-xKP_RB5uyJ77rHGk4GR4nY=)**__

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I won’t sit on the sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, With almost 3,000 farms and some of the most fertile soil in the country, it’s no surprise that agriculture is the number one economic driver in communities throughout Central and Southern Illinois. That’s why I was proud to join colleagues on both sides of the aisle to vote for an extension on the Farm Bill last month. While I am happy that we were able to keep vital nutrition programs like SNAP going, we owe it to farmers across the country to put aside the partisan games to finally pass a bipartisan Farm Bill that prioritizes our communities. **There is too much on the line to sit on the sidelines, so I will continue holding the line to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves.** So I will be working around the clock to ensure my colleagues are standing with me to pass a bipartisan Farm Bill that will expand job opportunities, put food on the table, and provide our farmers with the resources they deserve. **[I need a strong team standing with me in the fight to finally pass the Farm Bill. That’s why I was proud to join colleagues on both sides of the aisle to vote for an extension on the Farm Bill last month. While I am happy that we were able to keep vital nutrition programs like SNAP going, we owe it to farmers across the country to put aside the partisan games to finally pass a bipartisan Farm Bill that prioritizes our communities. There is too much on the line to sit on the sidelines, so I will continue holding the line to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves. This election is our historic opportunity for Democrats to take back the House. | | | = = Extreme MAGA Republicans are out of control. They’ve raked in millions to unseat us for exposing their plans to impose a nationwide abortion ban and cut funding to Social Security and Medicare. They’ve peddled dangerous conspiracy theories. They’ve coddled serial fraudsters like Rudy Giuliani and George Santos. Enough is enough. = = = = = = I’m so proud of our incredibly strong track record. House Democrats are: – Bringing manufacturing jobs back home – Investing in our communities and keeping Americans safe – Protecting Social Security and Medicare benefits for our seniors We will continue to build upon the work that has been done to move America forward – not from the top down, but from the middle out and the bottom up. And that’s what we as House Democrats intend to do For The People – but we need you by our side. That’s why I’m counting on seeing your name on our list of 2024 Democratic Members. | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T968ff4f4-04a2-4e88-bbad-99d553c9122b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Hi! Cliff Schecter here. Today I’d like to introduce you to a very special guest who is running a grassroots campaign to keep the most vulnerable Democratic U.S. House seat in Maryland blue: Geoffrey Grammer, a physician, retired Colonel, and a friend of mine. I’m giving Geoffrey the mic here because as a 25-year U.S. Army veteran I know he has what it takes to win this tossup seat. And here’s the brutal truth: If Republicans flip this seat red, they are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the U.S. House. So this couldn’t be more important. If you’re already sold, please split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Geoffrey’s campaign right now. I’m dropping my personal link below. Otherwise, take it away Geoffrey! **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-grammer-2023](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf729632-0eda-480f-ba16-6f662c14b09b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b2443d1-6b5f-4cf6-85c5-6235a1dde2ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff, thanks for the intro. It’s great to meet you, Peter. I’m Geoffrey Grammer. I’m a 25-year Army veteran, family man and physician who just launched his campaign for U.S. Congress in Maryland’s 6th District — a critical swing seat that we need to win to have any chance to flip the U.S. House. [**Will you split a donation of $20.24 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to ensure that Maryland’s most vulnerable swing district stays blue?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17a2d2d3-cf12-4a8a-ad75-df1a2279ed74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| When I served in the Army, I swore an oath to defend our country and its values. I know firsthand that our democracy isn't gifted to us. I have witnessed soldiers die in front of me fighting to secure our freedoms. **But Republican leaders across the country are disgracing those sacrifices and our values by trying to strip away our rights.** They don’t represent the America I fought for. That’s why I’m running to restore real integrity and leadership to Congress. **Peter, I’ll be direct:** This is Maryland's most vulnerable Blue seat, and _if Republicans win here they are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the U.S. House._ We’re off to a strong start, but national Republicans are already pouring money into this seat and I need your support to fight back. **[Will you chip in a split donation of $20.24 or whatever you can afford to keep this crucial open seat blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a76e550-d689-4651-bf00-270f17e4be0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: Could change everything

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5db87c2860cc4fcea14143d908bb0772&_e=Hq2lvtoRlN9bqBdGbNSHEm3XWSDmRQ03A7qbf8wf3bcOGp3pwN2wO94dfmoZzvjGGrUfSsiz5WKrj1vvtI030EZVcNV90jVOUlpS9aGE516soVwwXs2vLyvXaOJ-C-EIj3kU64J-AIkOTd3u8ctnn9zf51NHIDgVbqAE2kxmvw--gCAxhhZjTAaCpuYLYnRyzFETelXimzQfbiZqrIHpisS9wTYGjiBS1w86f93paAbKtwvF5xnPjofl40iE7o7Xgj9YpGLu7ARcrvNZqgd3TNoEphvD12Btlh1LJoF8RVNwytYRamFM_ytDcD-6FSa-XVyGEkWRxMzVjxotXyV0gbshHr1udhJOsJsj2IqOx3sN4tf-uXFME1JC3CHCQmJv9sZB1p89rFam7C4G2XMbMA%3D%3D)
Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force
---
Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5db87c2860cc4fcea14143d908bb0772&_e=Hq2lvtoRlN9bqBdGbNSHEm3XWSDmRQ03A7qbf8wf3bcOGp3pwN2wO94dfmoZzvjGGrUfSsiz5WKrj1vvtI030EZVcNV90jVOUlpS9aGE516soVwwXs2vLyvXaOJ-C-EIj3kU64J-AIkOTd3u8ctnn9zf51NHIDgVbqAE2kxmvw--gCAxhhZjTAaCpuYLYnRyzFETelXimzQfbiZqrIHpisS9wTYGjiBS1w86f93paAbKtwvF5xnPjofl40iE7o7X-UGtMxRqPhd1ulTSvQc6AyuqNZeMEwZhli4AOyVORaGyJLWvgIUvSs5Qu-1EJboh_3K1HuBXWFWfnSf1hpFfRfYm-dz-3abFtRDX2a14C2PGSbuDQ0Fd0pMjuzn8En81Ti4nGKbLbnfzqSRily82qA%3D%3D)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

| [**CONTRIBUTE $15**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5db87c2860cc4fcea14143d908bb0772&_e=Hq2lvtoRlN9bqBdGbNSHEm3XWSDmRQ03A7qbf8wf3bcOGp3pwN2wO94dfmoZzvjGGrUfSsiz5WKrj1vvtI030EZVcNV90jVOUlpS9aGE516soVwwXs2vLyvXaOJ-C-EIj3kU64J-AIkOTd3u8ctnn9zf51NHIDgVbqAE2kxmvw--gCAxhhZjTAaCpuYLYnRyzFETelXimzQfbiZqrIHpihd3I4qji1MTgY6O6mNSMxa_7SxBZdSBQvKgzhoAMDvFCDzPEnVpZqJC9k_B0WPV8A6M0L-mjXPsPuAXAbYZnlCowqPIXamS-jAx7GhJ7Hbt4jUz-Pg4ei2bBbA69j4htubBMKe38Sv_K_esvgV3xHqNOh9sMphbq6CbfJNTL0hJapoJatq2TW_AvpjmgmYKTJYuoBONSt2o8NeJQ_PiWaQ%3D)

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight. | | | God Bless, Brian Mast | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. subject: 🚨 The GIFFORDS Gun Law Scorecard was just released 🚨

body:
Each year, states with stronger gun laws tend to have lower rates of gun violence.
#

Friends -
For more than a decade, GIFFORDS Law Center has released a scorecard to grade each state on its gun laws.
Here’s a look at where your state ranked this year:
**GIFFORDS GUN LAW SCORECARD**
**Your State:** Pennsylvania
**Pennsylvania Gun Law Grade:** B
**Gun Deaths per 100,000:** 14.8
**Gun Law Rank:** **16**
Every year, the data is clear: states with stronger gun laws tend to have lower rates of gun violence.
**The unfortunate truth? When it comes to gun safety, 21 states receive an F.**
It’s up to all of us to keep striving towards a future where someday every state will earn an A on our scorecard. But we can’t get there without the support of people like you.

subject: the hypocrisy is STUNNING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Meet the prosecutor who goes after cops instead of criminals| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0aa50fe40bd844d9bc92e8b7eef23445&_e=7hiWxlo-gGapMw3ZE1E9Quctjes0tDIrrLEHhC79EVteMe2npZ-CSwip0eKQ11mg5ZezNTnEkBd-6Njlt-Q_1CAmjPz-Gh-bMg_a_I2bLbOEK7bTMhK0a9LkhyANkiOb2MeOzF9-CL17qbfUEpPsWklWiKIg1MlM8F7MN8fcNXqI-ZWtC70GuctPo-r7qhCpYltt26H8AP8OIdbR-MOYDJUDIeVy7uoqUnzd6noDyIfDZko02KBO08Zk2XQpbvF5fHeOqS_Hychy3PsJEvUGXzTrcKKTvdgKqDn2H3XGjZ9rcs2vsk9SXAt_NMzAw6m6GnmBFfYdzOGMK6mGJO8ZqRW3tgC4kc05fPrkn0-hoiadj4wNZEcMBCQps73akG5E)
---
Peter, In 2020, violent BLM riots were ripping through Austin. Rioters armed with rocks, bleach, and even a Molotov cocktail roamed the city. That day, the police stepped up to keep the streets safe.

And the Travis County DA José Garza took action, too, filing charges against 20 people.

Unfortunately, that DA was a radical Soros prosecutor... _**_and all of those charges were against the cops, not the rioters._**_

---
[**UNSEAT SOROS PROSECUTORS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0aa50fe40bd844d9bc92e8b7eef23445&_e=7hiWxlo-gGapMw3ZE1E9Quctjes0tDIrrLEHhC79EVteMe2npZ-CSwip0eKQ11mg5ZezNTnEkBd-6Njlt-Q_1CAmjPz-Gh-bMg_a_I2bLbOEK7bTMhK0a9LkhyANkiOb2MeOzF9-CL17qbfUEpPsWklWiKIg1MlM8F7MN8fcNXqI-ZWtC70GuctPo-r7qhCpYltt26H8AP8OIdbR-MOYDJUDIeVy7uoqUnzd6noDyIePPXxShm80s2J851A4roQnK_ZUGuyBLvr2vq_cqt5dGXbzCZ2grunD7v8x089F1lcsyhpM37D-Eq5cnsFVx3f-FnnNg1cwVU4SUB6Hy8piaWh0RfE3vi8OJ3P7RKM4C7f4KB9nuO-hmNlJnwW_jbLl)
---
These were purely politically motivated charges. Want proof? 17 of those charges were quietly dropped just this week.

But Garza achieved precisely what he wanted with this smear campaign: _The police were demoralized... and criminals were emboldened._

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0aa50fe40bd844d9bc92e8b7eef23445&_e=7hiWxlo-gGapMw3ZE1E9Quctjes0tDIrrLEHhC79EVteMe2npZ-CSwip0eKQ11mg5ZezNTnEkBd-6Njlt-Q_1CAmjPz-Gh-bMg_a_I2bLbOEK7bTMhK0a9LkhyANkiOb2MeOzF9-CL17qbfUEpPsWklWiKIg1MlM8F7MN8fcNXqI-ZWtC70GuctPo-r7qhCpYltt26H8AP8OIdbR-MOYDJUDIeVy7uoqUnzd6noDyIcjYCQgaVys7ppAq4hYlDDt17hqedKB1RjI3avlPkE5i-RAIxV3TUcneAw0t8FPMBPqsBVcxLxSC_dka28LgBdUUhKUiFo0M-4WWOYnjBIOB-9jNH2jq_sw0r7c_5nTwNLn3WJbao8_wI7TCnQ9Ep83)
---
This is what George Soros’s pet prosecutors want: to use the law as a tool to crush their enemies, not to administer justice.

---
[STAND WITH THE POLICE ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0aa50fe40bd844d9bc92e8b7eef23445&_e=7hiWxlo-gGapMw3ZE1E9Quctjes0tDIrrLEHhC79EVteMe2npZ-CSwip0eKQ11mg5ZezNTnEkBd-6Njlt-Q_1CAmjPz-Gh-bMg_a_I2bLbOEK7bTMhK0a9LkhyANkiOb2MeOzF9-CL17qbfUEpPsWklWiKIg1MlM8F7MN8fcNXqI-ZWtC70GuctPo-r7qhCpYltt26H8AP8OIdbR-MOYDJUDIeVy7uoqUnzd6noDyIeacGHIbPyEXEA1wqfMqDW93tx4c9tPjfk_Ydp5hrW2onlLI00TxyAEUwsA9SUAr1H7fkS3IcTsoTRZsBHUcvxdC3t-zMxF7shaVdYh8obg4XvI4Rr5LekctnkbImDwbpnpF1XvXJMJetOlgpuUlfYA)
---
**We’re _[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0aa50fe40bd844d9bc92e8b7eef23445&_e=7hiWxlo-gGapMw3ZE1E9Quctjes0tDIrrLEHhC79EVteMe2npZ-CSwip0eKQ11mg5ZezNTnEkBd-6Njlt-Q_1CAmjPz-Gh-bMg_a_I2bLbOEK7bTMhK0a9LkhyANkiOb2MeOzF9-CL17qbfUEpPsWklWiKIg1MlM8F7MN8fcNXqI-ZWtC70GuctPo-r7qhCpYltt26H8AP8OIdbR-MOYDJUDIeVy7uoqUnzd6noDyIfS7QPBzWU5m3dZ3Ta6Ku3I-hOUBwbX2XHwxhG2YWx2XZseDOoLXKUQrDwgmTGS9G2O6JZmgPT5YVO2Fht0dtQnCbpIvj9G2K_4RS5QnqTMH7ZVKP2n_Ea8Av3KR2Fn_Oj2SpuRi_AKzsYyokjniXOf)_. clean_body: Meet the prosecutor who goes after cops instead of criminals| | | Peter, In 2020, violent BLM riots were ripping through Austin. Rioters armed with rocks, bleach, and even a Molotov cocktail roamed the city. That day, the police stepped up to keep the streets safe. And the Travis County DA José Garza took action, too, filing charges against 20 people. Unfortunately, that DA was a radical Soros prosecutor... and all of those charges were against the cops, not the rioters. These were purely politically motivated charges. Want proof? 17 of those charges were quietly dropped just this week. But Garza achieved precisely what he wanted with this smear campaign: The police were demoralized... and criminals were emboldened. This is what George Soros’s pet prosecutors want: to use the law as a tool to crush their enemies, not to administer justice. We’re . We are the ONLY organization taking a direct stand against George Soros’s scheme to take over America’s judicial system — in every office from the Supreme Court to local prosecutors. But tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of dark money influence... until now. subject: We never want to BS you, but this recent poll is bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie’s fallen to third.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)
Derek, we never want to BS you, but this recent poll is bad news:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231218-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_POL_20231218_V1_F&refcode2=34984_3422442_S0yLpr&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)
**[More on the details and what we can do about it below, but first, can you chip in $5 today to help us reach the voters we need to keep Katie serving in Washington?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231218-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_POL_20231218_V1_F&refcode2=34984_3422442_S0yLpr&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)**
This is the first poll to show Katie trailing our Republican opponent, Steve Garvey. The former LA Dodger is relying on his personal wealth and fame to win over voters, and he seems to be inching closer to a second place finish in the primary.
Remember, the top two vote getters in March’s primary, regardless of party, move on to the general election in November. So if Katie doesn’t finish first or second in March, her time in Washington will come to an end—welcome news for Big Oil and Wall Street.
**We know we still have what it takes to pull off a win.** Polling shows that 20-30% of voters remain undecided, so winning over these folks will be key. And primaries tend to have lower turnout, so we’ve got to make sure we’re communicating with our voters to get them to the polls (or, just to their mailbox to drop their ballot).
The #1 way we’ll reach voters is through TV and digital ads, alongside campaign stops and events throughout the state. **But we haven’t been able to get up on TV because our fundraising is way below where we predicted.** This is likely contributing to the widening gap between Katie and our opponents.
**[So, Derek, is there anything you can contribute today to help us ramp up our campaign and make sure Katie Porter is California’s next U.S. Senator?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231218-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_POL_20231218_V1_F&refcode2=34984_3422442_S0yLpr&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231218-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_POL_20231218_V1_F&refcode2=34984_3422442_S0yLpr&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)
Thanks so much,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_POL_20231218_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34984_3422442_S0yLpr&akid=34984%2E3422442%2ES0yLpr)**
