clean_body: Katie’s fallen to third. Derek, we never want to BS you, but this recent poll is bad news: This is the first poll to show Katie trailing our Republican opponent, Steve Garvey. The former LA Dodger is relying on his personal wealth and fame to win over voters, and he seems to be inching closer to a second place finish in the primary. Remember, the top two vote getters in March’s primary, regardless of party, move on to the general election in November. So if Katie doesn’t finish first or second in March, her time in Washington will come to an end—welcome news for Big Oil and Wall Street. We know we still have what it takes to pull off a win. Polling shows that 20-30% of voters remain undecided, so winning over these folks will be key. And primaries tend to have lower turnout, so we’ve got to make sure we’re communicating with our voters to get them to the polls (or, just to their mailbox to drop their ballot). The #1 way we’ll reach voters is through TV and digital ads, alongside campaign stops and events throughout the state. But we haven’t been able to get up on TV because our fundraising is way below where we predicted. This is likely contributing to the widening gap between Katie and our opponents. Thanks so much, Team KP Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: AFSCME Endorses Dave Min
body:
America’s Largest Public Employees Union Latest to Join Min’s Massive Coalition | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e4126b16705e/afscme-endorses-dave-min-15667256?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** December 18, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**AFSCME Endorses Dave Min**
_America’s Largest Public Employees Union Latest to Join Min’s Massive Coalition_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, State Senator Dave Min, who is running to succeed Katie Porter in California’s 47th Congressional District with her full support, announced that he was being endorsed by the American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) and the 1.6 million employees it represents. Following the formal endorsement of the AFL-CIO last week–as well as the public support of teachers, laborers, and police–Dave Min has emerged as labor’s consensus candidate in this race.

**“Dave Min has been a champion for working families his entire career,”** said Alia Griffing, Political and Legislative Director for AFSCME California.**“As an enforcement attorney at the SEC, he worked to hold Wall Street accountable. As a policy director for the Center for American Progress, he advocated for family-first economic policy. And as a State Senator, he has taken the hard votes to benefit the lives of California’s least well off. We are proud to join his coalition of support.”**

As part of the AFL-CIO, AFSCME is one of the nation’s leading advocates for working women and men. Its 1.6 million members provide the vital services that make America happen, and AFSCME believes everyone deserves a chance to fulfill the American dream. Their mission aligns with the work Dave Min has done throughout his career, and he is proud of his 100% rating from AFSCME California.

This announcement continues State Senator Dave Min’s incredible momentum, as he has racked up a slew of major endorsements in the past few months, including from the California Democratic Party, Equality CA, the Southern California Armenian Democrats, NeverAgain CA, PORAC, UFCW, IBEW, OCEA, NUHW, the Laborers, the Carpenters, and a host of others. Min is the unanimous choice of organized labor in this race, as he is the only candidate to receive support from national, statewide, and local unions. Min received early endorsements from Rep. Katie Porter, the outgoing incumbent, as well as from Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers, and over 150 local, state, and federal officials. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=245407b5ab&e=7017cc100e).
###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| | The GOP is so desperate to defeat Joe Biden in 2024 that they launched a sham impeachment investigation despite zero evidence of ANY wrongdoing.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=765097817b7f4ddd94f51139a8f93d5b&_e=8XLSs-KSE0OoB3tfD5btoI-fqxuWLNYTeenUSVFMWIXz3nw5fFmuDgUg1Z-zN6MjoHOO4VhycZG05_tOn9pYFEEhUgAL00KKfS1Q-K2UPEqpKGjsdhXCbHsyRqOvy8x-LcNt6XG8MP0FxcFVDEYOtmHP7ZArlHM1zxQckr0Y4Dyif9FAf8E3N6emYXbXOOPNUWAjYMyog2cASZHWxjJ7qdD6vsQvnx6zGlA_fYvDA3njMuqKHYPo9C-RPl4ead88rPaM_b91x5sCCdZzVV_bG22NXPra76g4eoF86wDgK5pC-YlpsFnVVcirvjR_LeVRad5mpRqV81VICGkYpe0ONaRbIKaB79YVYkSdTKIQ8b8%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=765097817b7f4ddd94f51139a8f93d5b&_e=8XLSs-KSE0OoB3tfD5btoI-fqxuWLNYTeenUSVFMWIXz3nw5fFmuDgUg1Z-zN6MjoHOO4VhycZG05_tOn9pYFEEhUgAL00KKfS1Q-K2UPEqpKGjsdhXCbHsyRqOvy8x-LcNt6XG8MP0FxcFVDEYOtmHP7ZArlHM1zxQckr0Y4Dyif9FAf8E3N6emYXbXOOPNUWAjYMyog2cASZHWxjJ7qSu-UeOIxJQTgM1xB9uoxlXA9q17EU5654VLdpzCoBg6M-BLwI0FNB80PRR4kvu-sFWDmxcfW1fr6ySoNTbzYIgDKV7WEIuWv-6z7XtV2SnAEJCJioWQ4QekKUgB5I_8JvxCKAMi_PCVSx0IKuATHMI%3D)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. Please make a tax-deductible contribution today to help us defeat the leftist deep state and create major conservative victories for America using this secure link below: [https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=765097817b7f4ddd94f51139a8f93d5b&_e=8XLSs-KSE0OoB3tfD5btoI-fqxuWLNYTeenUSVFMWIXz3nw5fFmuDgUg1Z-zN6MjoHOO4VhycZG05_tOn9pYFEEhUgAL00KKfS1Q-K2UPEqpKGjsdhXCbHsyRqOvy8x-LcNt6XG8MP0FxcFVDEYOtmHP7ZArlHM1zxQckr0Y4Dyif9FAf8E3N6emYXbXOOPNUWAjYMyog2cASZHWxjJ7qYx0bgvXaBGHNcxVK1HJoCOvtFYaTSfELym9t0qYHcoa13cMSHeskSO8KpyjmDsmuGw_-YsRm2XJk2IeOIS2eAu62-h6Qj9MzgL2_1xDJ6n5Bu0ITIgL_Ejf0b3aUpAQnMQJJ4v3nepqXVAsECGxodo%3D)
**
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

body:
We will be the PRESUMPTIVE NOMINEE right out of the gate...| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0443aec46b8549d4a32980d611a39cbd&_e=Luqs-OnKjfmDE1UbyteLhd8gorohIgm1qAXB4moHbY0L41ZOh5oMDSpsxjjxt189TgGG3_Rmg2_9Rm2jLO3UYhMi46NGGzTRP381PgpptVAb1qw36wIS0T2H6_PgCw2ehsDQR5r-Si874l7nyRk2iz42HnIxJ5qNhGSy5-TV_5owqstyFTuZRDSXjq9WqM0c2lL9TIezWRQgXCr4RCMSMcr2p6u0EZt_BvrmxwEWrmNcBKxmL00scThVesxeMbxRN_Qw28w8PXUJm0vwwxLdw_ohbPijsMKFjqE-d2WM39kU7tnZvItp4tmk7CE_okwZM5w0K2JB8Ezjsg8leeynYV_qsDQHacM7x_-klkQn9J0mj2PujdCn3vA7TH7snzvFJeBbaal1vkMVl63gmpmWivixrNQtd4P229It3R609k7_8aSi7V7LRh6CmzBpfQtU46sstmOmk4OgSCLS3pUxbNi3duPX2d52NVnt5CM-a07-tUmeQ5jB_j9zhb9ParmO)
---
| | Patriot,

---
With exactly 4 weeks until the very first vote of the 2024 election is cast in the great state of Iowa, we are on track to become the PRESUMPTIVE NOMINEE right out of the gate!
---
In fact, the latest _“gold standard”_ poll in Iowa shows that we’ve amassed an **outright majority (51%)** of support.
---
_And what’s more, we’ve grown our lead among_ __FIRST-TIME caucusgoers__ _to more than 50 points over the entire field._
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0443aec46b8549d4a32980d611a39cbd&_e=Luqs-OnKjfmDE1UbyteLhd8gorohIgm1qAXB4moHbY0L41ZOh5oMDSpsxjjxt189TgGG3_Rmg2_9Rm2jLO3UYhMi46NGGzTRP381PgpptVAb1qw36wIS0T2H6_PgCw2ehsDQR5r-Si874l7nyRk2iz42HnIxJ5qNhGSy5-TV_5owqstyFTuZRDSXjq9WqM0c2lL9TIezWRQgXCr4RCMSMcr2p6u0EZt_BvrmxwEWrmNcBKxmL00scThVesxeMbxRN_Qw28w8PXUJm0vwwxLdw_ohbPijsMKFjqE-d2WM39kU7tnZvItp4tmk7CE_okwZM5w0K2JB8Ezjsg8leeynYfsgxc7Mb9KNkIHKsAxfxizjED-6CUd6Sr4dhYQUj5devAxL-2_dCR_K6hi77x-qjmcDN-IV9f43_IyqXMQY_3GlXghug9FnN1fwlYUa7m6B8kGU8W_6VPy_ydtD1wlXoUFWlNkT-ZlUTndCyyjgMw08FgtzIE20e13s5STds8b7)
---
Quite simply, we are LEADING by HISTORIC margins!
---
But one of the reasons our beautiful movement is so strong and resilient is because we don’t take _anything_ for granted, Patriot.
---
_You can never underestimate the special-interest RINOs’ desire to amass power at all costs and betray voters like _YOU_. _
---
**And we can never forget that even after their $370 MILLION plot failed, just the other week, shadowy RINO megadonors hatched a**** _NEW_****plot behind closed doors to spend****TENS OF MILLIONS**** _MORE_****at the final hour to try and stop us!**
---
Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas.
---
But with YOUR sustained support, we will SWEEP the Iowa Caucus just 4 weeks from today – and as the presumptive Republican nominee, we will shift all our attention to the __REAL__ mission: **firing Crooked Joe and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
---
**[Please make a contribution to our Primary Victory Fund with ONLY 4 WEEKS LEFT until the FIRST VOTE of 2024 is cast.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=0443aec46b8549d4a32980d611a39cbd&_e=Luqs-OnKjfmDE1UbyteLhd8gorohIgm1qAXB4moHbY0L41ZOh5oMDSpsxjjxt189TgGG3_Rmg2_9Rm2jLO3UYhMi46NGGzTRP381PgpptVAb1qw36wIS0T2H6_PgCw2ehsDQR5r-Si874l7nyRk2iz42HnIxJ5qNhGSy5-TV_5owqstyFTuZRDSXjq9WqM0c2lL9TIezWRQgXCr4RCMSMcr2p6u0EZt_BvrmxwEWrmNcBKxmL00scThVesxeMbxRN_Qw28w8PXUJm0vwwxLdw_ohbPijsMKFjqE-d2WM39kU7tnZvItp4tmk7CE_okwZM5w0K2JB8Ezjsg8leeynYXgq0PS_jvrvvYyQFNRWhUU2hxeXtcQXdV74TIjKuq4lsjcfNt1ffpwbkas0NtQtT4dgvOkuhQJzZ4paFiHG8hH2cpR7YoGnz82_FQxYCUm3u0I-r0Kxaei-aNjiGTcAvzml5_7XHmm9DvHiIDNpfAhdJjHdIpIPLi0NoAzimCjk)**

In fact, the latest “gold standard” poll in Iowa shows that we’ve amassed an outright majority (51%) of support. And what’s more, we’ve grown our lead among FIRST-TIME caucusgoers to more than 50 points over the entire field. Quite simply, we are LEADING by HISTORIC margins! But one of the reasons our beautiful movement is so strong and resilient is because we don’t take anything for granted, Patriot. You can never underestimate the special-interest RINOs’ desire to amass power at all costs and betray voters like YOU. And we can never forget that even after their $370 MILLION plot failed, just the other week, shadowy RINO megadonors hatched a NEWplot behind closed doors to spendTENS OF MILLIONS MOREat the final hour to try and stop us! Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. name: Adam Schiff
subject: December 18, 2019
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Trump is still the same existential threat. In recent weeks, he’s vowed to be a dictator on Day One — and his loyalist MAGA supporters cheer.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4792%2E5257348%2EhA7Xr1)
Dear Derek,
Four years ago today, the House of Representatives voted to impeach the President of the United States, Donald Trump. So today, I felt it appropriate to share some of my thoughts on the path we’ve taken in the four years since — and reflect on the road ahead.
**Did you know** recent expert reports find more than twice as many countries are moving toward authoritarianism as those moving toward democracy?
The evidence is clear right here in the United States — in the four years since Trump’s first impeachment, we had to impeach him a second time after he incited a violent insurrection that threatened our democracy’s very existence.
**Trump is still the same existential threat.** In recent weeks, he’s vowed to be a dictator on Day One — and his loyalist MAGA supporters cheer.
**He has tried to cheat in every election, and he will again.** I said as much on the Senate floor during his trial. _You can’t trust this president to do the right thing. Not for one minute, not for one election, not for the sake of our country. You just can’t. He will not change and you know it._
In the 2016 election, it was by attempting to secure Russian help to obtain his opponent’s emails and then making full use of what Russia stole. It involved his campaign manager giving Russian intelligence their internal campaign polling data while Russian intelligence was doing a clandestine social media campaign to help him in battleground states.
In the 2020 election, it was by extorting Ukraine’s president Volodymyr Zelenskyy to open an investigation of Trump’s opponent — by threatening to withhold military aid for their war against Russia’s ongoing military occupation.
**And when he lost, he attempted the first presidential coup in American history.**
Trump’s threats are not empty. And authoritarians across the globe have taken Trump’s cue to tighten their grips on power. On January 8 of this year, the Brazilian far-right stormed their Congress in their national capital after the incumbent far-right president lost his reelection. And there are more examples the world over.
I have stood up against authoritarianism and in support of democracy for my entire career. From my chairmanship of the House Intelligence Committee to serving as the lead impeachment manager in Trump’s first Senate trial, to serving on the January 6 Select Committee, I have always put my oath of office and the Constitution first.
**We are not out of the woods yet.** Authoritarians like Trump will repeat the same outrageous lies over and over again in the hopes that we will tire, give in, and stop fighting back. They seek to overwhelm us with misinformation, divide us with prejudice, bigotry, racism, and xenophobia, and obscure their corrupt misdeeds with constant campaigns of projection onto their opponents.
**It’s why Trump and his MAGA allies have called me a liar so relentlessly.** They hope voters will not know what to believe. That we will stop fighting back when they go on the attack. That they can eventually overwhelm us with a Big Lie after we are too tired to fight back.
**But we must fight.**
That’s what this campaign is about — to protect our democracy and build an economy that works for everyone so that we are never again susceptible to the siren sound of a dictator who promises that he alone can fix it.
**[If you’re with me, today is an important day to show your support. We are less than 2 weeks from our final FEC deadline before this primary election, which is just a few more weeks away. If you can spare $3 or any amount, I promise you it will make a difference. Chip in:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231218_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4792%2E5257348%2EhA7Xr1)**

clean_body: | Trump is still the same existential threat. In recent weeks, he’s vowed to be a dictator on Day One — and his loyalist MAGA supporters cheer. Dear Derek, Four years ago today, the House of Representatives voted to impeach the President of the United States, Donald Trump. So today, I felt it appropriate to share some of my thoughts on the path we’ve taken in the four years since — and reflect on the road ahead. Did you know recent expert reports find more than twice as many countries are moving toward authoritarianism as those moving toward democracy? The evidence is clear right here in the United States — in the four years since Trump’s first impeachment, we had to impeach him a second time after he incited a violent insurrection that threatened our democracy’s very existence. Trump is still the same existential threat. In recent weeks, he’s vowed to be a dictator on Day One — and his loyalist MAGA supporters cheer. He has tried to cheat in every election, and he will again. I said as much on the Senate floor during his trial. You can’t trust this president to do the right thing. Not for one minute, not for one election, not for the sake of our country. You just can’t. He will not change and you know it. In the 2016 election, it was by attempting to secure Russian help to obtain his opponent’s emails and then making full use of what Russia stole. It involved his campaign manager giving Russian intelligence their internal campaign polling data while Russian intelligence was doing a clandestine social media campaign to help him in battleground states. In the 2020 election, it was by extorting Ukraine’s president Volodymyr Zelenskyy to open an investigation of Trump’s opponent — by threatening to withhold military aid for their war against Russia’s ongoing military occupation. And when he lost, he attempted the first presidential coup in American history. Trump’s threats are not empty. And authoritarians across the globe have taken Trump’s cue to tighten their grips on power. On January 8 of this year, the Brazilian far-right stormed their Congress in their national capital after the incumbent far-right president lost his reelection. And there are more examples the world over. I have stood up against authoritarianism and in support of democracy for my entire career. From my chairmanship of the House Intelligence Committee to serving as the lead impeachment manager in Trump’s first Senate trial, to serving on the January 6 Select Committee, I have always put my oath of office and the Constitution first. We are not out of the woods yet. Authoritarians like Trump will repeat the same outrageous lies over and over again in the hopes that we will tire, give in, and stop fighting back. They seek to overwhelm us with misinformation, divide us with prejudice, bigotry, racism, and xenophobia, and obscure their corrupt misdeeds with constant campaigns of projection onto their opponents. It’s why Trump and his MAGA allies have called me a liar so relentlessly. They hope voters will not know what to believe. That we will stop fighting back when they go on the attack. That they can eventually overwhelm us with a Big Lie after we are too tired to fight back. But we must fight. That’s what this campaign is about — to protect our democracy and build an economy that works for everyone so that we are never again susceptible to the siren sound of a dictator who promises that he alone can fix it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for putting your trust in me to defend this remarkable American experiment in democracy. With your support, we will protect it and help it flourish, stronger than ever. Adam | | 135 E. name: Bob Casey
subject: Do you know these Pennsylvania fun facts?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’m one of our Commonwealth’s number one fans

Derek Willis, fun fact: you probably know that the Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia in 1776, but did you also know that Philly was the capital of the United States from 1790 to 1800?

I’m one of our Commonwealth’s number one fans, so there’s a lot more where that came from.

Before I share, my Finance Director, Taylor, said that I can’t use this email to only recite facts about Pennsylvania, no matter how much I might want to. I should also ask folks to chip in to help me continue representing the place I’ve always called home.

**[Derek Willis, will you chip in now to help me continue fighting for my fellow Pennsylvanians in the U.S. Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400895/444561785/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=)**

Now that’s out of the way, are you ready for some more facts?

Did you know that Pennsylvania’s Fayette County is home to Fort Necessity, where George Washington experienced his first military combat in 1754? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400896/444561786/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=) Or that William Maclay — a member of Pennsylvania’s first United States Senate delegation — kept a diary during his term, which became one of few historical accounts of the 1st United States Congress? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400897/444561787/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=) Or here’s a fun one: the world’s first computer was built in Philadelphia in 1946! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400898/444561788/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=) These are just a few of my favorite pieces of Pennsylvania trivia, Derek Willis. I love the Commonwealth and its history. Just recently, my team challenged me to name all 67 of our counties — and I did it in under 10 minutes.

**[Now I’m hoping you’ll chip in $10 or more to support our re-election fight. I’m Pennsylvania through and through, and I need your support to keep making progress for our Commonwealth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400899/444561789/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400900/444561790/-1645383944?refcode=email_121823_Shapiro-casey-split&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNTFiMS1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9KeT3CrPJiIYvSUohy0zeq_DUe9X1gp_xahU_G7NIU=)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: New pipeline safety legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Bipartisan bill aiming to bolster pipeline safety not only in the Pacific Northwest
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75400914/444561858/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTRlMjJlYi1kZjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P5GMim7rHHJlnvOwlPaoF5gU4wd1E-m5uchx1rcyBO0=&emci=f3169293-c49a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=d94e22eb-df9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=9494239)
---

| | On June 10, 1999, a gas pipeline operated by the Olympic Pipeline Company exploded in Bellingham's Whatcom Falls Park — taking the lives of two 10-year-old boys, Stephen Tsiorvas and Wade King, and an 18-year-old young man, Liam Wood. Following the incident, I helped draft several pieces of legislation to ensure the safety, regulation, and adequate staffing of pipelines. In 2021, I toured Whatcom Falls Park with pipeline safety experts to discuss the 1999 explosion and how to further improve pipeline safety. That same year, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law established the Natural Gas Distribution Infrastructure Safety and Modernization grant initiative, which makes millions in funding available to municipality- or community-owned utilities to repair, rehabilitate or replace its natural gas distribution pipeline systems or to acquire safety equipment. **This tragedy and other pipeline incidents are preventable, and I am grateful to share that we are continuing to take measures in Congress to ensure that every pipeline across the country has robust safety standards and guidelines.** As the lead Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I am thrilled to announce the introduction of a crucial, bipartisan bill aiming to bolster pipeline safety not only in the Pacific Northwest — but across the entire nation. This legislation will:
* Ensure pipeline safety inspectors have necessary resources
* Prepares for emerging pipeline infrastructure
* Holds Pipeline Operators Accountable
* Increases transparency

Together, we can make substantial strides in ensuring a safer and more secure energy infrastructure for everyone. More soon, _Rick_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen.

clean_body: Bipartisan bill aiming to bolster pipeline safety not only in the Pacific Northwest | | | | On June 10, 1999, a gas pipeline operated by the Olympic Pipeline Company exploded in Bellingham's Whatcom Falls Park — taking the lives of two 10-year-old boys, Stephen Tsiorvas and Wade King, and an 18-year-old young man, Liam Wood. Following the incident, I helped draft several pieces of legislation to ensure the safety, regulation, and adequate staffing of pipelines. In 2021, I toured Whatcom Falls Park with pipeline safety experts to discuss the 1999 explosion and how to further improve pipeline safety. That same year, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law established the Natural Gas Distribution Infrastructure Safety and Modernization grant initiative, which makes millions in funding available to municipality- or community-owned utilities to repair, rehabilitate or replace its natural gas distribution pipeline systems or to acquire safety equipment. This tragedy and other pipeline incidents are preventable, and I am grateful to share that we are continuing to take measures in Congress to ensure that every pipeline across the country has robust safety standards and guidelines. As the lead Democrat on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, I am thrilled to announce the introduction of a crucial, bipartisan bill aiming to bolster pipeline safety not only in the Pacific Northwest — but across the entire nation. This legislation will: Ensure pipeline safety inspectors have necessary resources Prepares for emerging pipeline infrastructure Holds Pipeline Operators Accountable Increases transparency Together, we can make substantial strides in ensuring a safer and more secure energy infrastructure for everyone. More soon, Rick | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . body:
| | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7f454ab69e7747d4bb013cb03185ef83&_e=8cT8Sws4k12Y5UZYVImyFNKWdNUA23bRXQ4gu6CPe7Rby6Yk3VKR4jADo6p6uXzw6nYBmbyTb8Lz5G8z6WjZcUNHQuL9VSfT6Cu0w0whO7gFWwfhudv4F70019khvus9CI2qtHy8RLzHxbILSJptdb8lHPFds8YjmHiOhcbf0MC37j-TPs-vo3eeKejy2_ZcnX5EnsywNGRzX8pkxxOZr1HzFLfGfsopYb6xRHtShSUe1Un7wi2Hi-T5yMH_NETJbjPMJDYFgBosphXPjFS7UvwQfjGzI6KMBeIEfIHy3FE%3D)

Fellow American,
---
My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point and fought in frontline combat for 18 months in some of the worst conditions on the planet. But I believe that my most important accomplishment is my family. I'm the dad of two beautiful girls and the husband of a loving wife. I'm a tried and true leader ready to take on my next great challenge: **I 'm officially announcing my run for Congress in North Carolina.**
---
[**STAND WITH PAT HARRIGAN **](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7f454ab69e7747d4bb013cb03185ef83&_e=8cT8Sws4k12Y5UZYVImyFNKWdNUA23bRXQ4gu6CPe7Rby6Yk3VKR4jADo6p6uXzw6nYBmbyTb8Lz5G8z6WjZcUNHQuL9VSfT6Cu0w0whO7gFWwfhudv4F70019khvus9-2MT9yCJeZUUzbMNVZSdgtQdSx3xmOkh3wxSTadqJTOLPX1QyyXBX7xnS13Y8nEyzakeCZ5mh0uSBDwn0c-_Ct57W7Wt2dxK6D7sGy-ShDRbA7Mhnul25L1lSt94mE2aYBIKtwKbZRO2e_0G57TH8noALQ_PqLccbvuG0RgsqM8%3D)
---
When I came home from combat, I was shocked by how our so-called "leaders" in Washington were treating the American people. Instead of serving the people's best interests - they have sold themselves out to a group of no-name bureaucrats fueled by greed. Even worse is the radical-Left's destructive agenda designed to rip apart the societal fabric of America. As a father of girls, it frightens me to imagine the country they'll be faced with when they're my age. It doesn't have to be this way, Fellow American. I'm one of the 10's millions of American who knows this: our country officially hit **code-red.** We desperately need leadership that puts power BACK into the hands of The People, or we may be doomed. But just like during my time in the Green Berets, I need a top-tier team by my side to help me carry this fight all the way to Washington. **[I'm asking with humility - can I count on seeing your name on my list of founding Patriots ready to RETAKE DC?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7f454ab69e7747d4bb013cb03185ef83&_e=8cT8Sws4k12Y5UZYVImyFNKWdNUA23bRXQ4gu6CPe7Rby6Yk3VKR4jADo6p6uXzw6nYBmbyTb8Lz5G8z6WjZcUNHQuL9VSfT6Cu0w0whO7gFWwfhudv4F70019khvus9LxngdjCREcP0O5vZHavmZFrSywQD27aBBwXJrLaUbDL4slhYIe_3CODhZ9kC2ZC_SlMl6b-FWNhKo6uPrfMRk9cULCoL0c8c9Mm-csutHtUhnpYIrCAv7ShQFCzQddsGmWq7ASZ283lkdgGxq7jadBD9dNtBATPkerFCnh5btjA%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point and fought in frontline combat for 18 months in some of the worst conditions on the planet. But I believe that my most important accomplishment is my family. I'm the dad of two beautiful girls and the husband of a loving wife. I'm a tried and true leader ready to take on my next great challenge: I 'm officially announcing my run for Congress in North Carolina. When I came home from combat, I was shocked by how our so-called "leaders" in Washington were treating the American people. Instead of serving the people's best interests - they have sold themselves out to a group of no-name bureaucrats fueled by greed. Even worse is the radical-Left's destructive agenda designed to rip apart the societal fabric of America. As a father of girls, it frightens me to imagine the country they'll be faced with when they're my age. It doesn't have to be this way, Fellow American. I'm one of the 10's millions of American who knows this: our country officially hit code-red. We desperately need leadership that puts power BACK into the hands of The People, or we may be doomed. But just like during my time in the Green Berets, I need a top-tier team by my side to help me carry this fight all the way to Washington. Your founding contribution today will help supercharge my race to the finish line. Thank you for your time, and God Bless. With great appreciation, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

subject: Introducing the Equality Act, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
As a gay man, this means so much to me.

| **Peter — In June, I proudly reintroduced the Equality Act,** a hugely important set of reforms that would finally prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation and gender identity.

****[**Peter, as a member of the LGBTQ+ community, nothing would mean more to me than your support of this critical legislation. Will you take just a few seconds to cosponsor the Equality Act and join the fight to protect gay marriage? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401278/444563429/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20231218_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQzZDYxYy1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtKZ-BatIHXRLVZr79s1WnhoIS6UDvllR4M9y2kMYiU=&emci=5eefa425-c39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cad3d61c-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=18839602)**** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401282/444563431/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20231218_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQzZDYxYy1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtKZ-BatIHXRLVZr79s1WnhoIS6UDvllR4M9y2kMYiU=&emci=5eefa425-c39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cad3d61c-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=18839602) | [5,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: COSPONSOR THE EQUALITY ACT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401284/444563435/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20231218_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQzZDYxYy1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtKZ-BatIHXRLVZr79s1WnhoIS6UDvllR4M9y2kMYiU=&emci=5eefa425-c39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cad3d61c-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=18839602)

Peter, as a gay man, I was publicly outed against my will by my Republican opponent when I ran for Congress in 1994.

I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities.

I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry.

**And I’m not going back.** That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress.

But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, _**I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue.**_

[**Peter, take 5 seconds to cosponsor the Equality Act NOW! We have to strike while the iron is hot – I’m counting on 5,000 signatures before 10AM tomorrow »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401290/444563439/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20231218_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQzZDYxYy1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtKZ-BatIHXRLVZr79s1WnhoIS6UDvllR4M9y2kMYiU=&emci=5eefa425-c39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cad3d61c-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=18839602)

# Join us tonight for an Iowa Update on Zoom with Ryan Binkley.
On January 15, the Iowa Caucus will be the first presidential primary of 2024. Iowa plays a pivotal role in election year politics, and can change the course of the primary race, literally overnight!

Ryan and the Binkley 2024 team will be on Zoom **TONIGHT,** December 18, to discuss the Caucus and how you can be involved. The meeting starts at 7pm CT / 8pm ET.

Be sure to register at the link below. See you tonight!
---
| **Date: Monday, December 18

---
Peter, Republicans at every level of government have made it abundantly clear that _none_ of our most fundamental rights will be secure this coming election year.
Our right to a future free from gun violence will remain contested, our libraries and schools will remain at stake, and our reproductive rights will continue to be threatened – especially with the legality of abortion pills going to the Supreme Court again.
We _can_ win these fights. But we need to build a strategy that we can rely on to keep all of these rights defended through the tough election year ahead. And _you_ can help me do just that.

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters in your area to take my 2024 Strategy Survey so I can begin to shape our fight in the new year. Will you take my survey before midnight tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401671/444564678/-1554066183?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1282-su-nd&refcode=jtk1282-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZTRjZS1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iSPcWXOkMidU-_nu6IfRRGgfAY9-x4fyNiEMtKuaW0=&emci=e52b493c-559b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=2f0ce4ce-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=25369504)**

---
Peter, highlighting and uplifting the voices of everyday, working Americans is a _key_ part of my work because I know what it's like to grow up voiceless and vulnerable.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that so far, I’ve kept that promise – and this Strategy Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day. So please:**
**[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you? Each response will be integral to helping me build out my strategy for 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75401674/444564681/-1554066183?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1282-su-nd&refcode=jtk1282-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjBjZTRjZS1lMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4iSPcWXOkMidU-_nu6IfRRGgfAY9-x4fyNiEMtKuaW0=&emci=e52b493c-559b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=2f0ce4ce-e09d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=25369504)**

A report earlier this month on how The Medical University of South Carolina — a state-supported medical institution where I used to work — bowed to political pressure from the far-right South Carolina legislature is personal for me.

Let’s be clear: Yes, when the hospital’s decisions became fodder for a political attack against me, it put me and my family in harm’s way — and that was scary and hard. But what’s more, when it blocked my coworkers from coming to my defense with things like facts and leading medical opinions — **_it allowed for dangerous misinformation to put children’s lives at risk._**

Simply put: The hospital let politics get in the way of doing what’s best for children and their families. That’s one of the reasons why I started Their Future PAC.

**_[Now, we need to raise $1,500 in the next 24 hours to fund our work to elect a Kids Frist Majority to make sure this type of political fear mongering NEVER happens at the expense of our kids again — can you rush a donation of $10 or any amount to help?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zL7aglw_zhViRjOhnhfXagtJSlXyAarDEgYBu_-jrMHZG6UspAaqdbiaHEdizysDWGn7XUzYW3sadgHwt7Kx2JkihU-ug4IjcRK9dHU3-MI7Gf2VoY5A_lNsfsHUEOqKrvmYeu64ihPKWEQyV-SlUuC77QhUxRfb4amaMU_5d_RyqDC6FRjjuPaSG3Ut19OkIbuMsuImtIOsv7jw52D117_c3EQUfls7Pz23PtkQ2yT0ZxJjqceYTT-tNVWiOPSDCZCRGA48YobbHFlQR-E3PT2Y4SIbpWVxwbaLAPOr1jzmrxY8TrDpFkqAyYeJhBVsWX_r2DxTJMy0x9Yu9E8ppjRBwG5cy1B4w0--imvPM-AdAho-9AyYHembkWRyDqo1NDynzl1KFZfKBwzUceOvgb/428/0McwMrMYSgKR7w3JQBOTdg/h2/fouuC4-o0Ye9OlnHOjKNPB5rjZJBbCWkvWnGcCom1LU)_**

As a medical professional, I had to watch as healthcare leaders charged with putting patient care first, made decisions that threatened children’s safety, for what the legislature’s Freedom Caucus celebrated as a **_political victory._** Our kids deserve better. They deserve to have adults at all levels of government who will fight for their right to life-saving healthcare.

Instead, they have extremists in Congress and statehouses all across this country who hold hostage tax-payer dollars to push their personal beliefs on the medical community; who bully and traumatize children into suicidal ideation.

**_[_That’s why I need you to join me in this fight._ We need to put leaders in the halls of power who will put kids first. Friend,
My name is Amy Nachtrab and I am Tamie Wilson's Campaign Coordinator. Together Tamie, myself, and our army of hundreds of volunteers, are working hard everyday to build the infrastructure to flip Ohio's 4th Congressional district blue.
I am a firm believer that every day is a good day to spread the word:**_Jim Jordan is unfit to serve in Congress and should be FIRED!_**
That’s why we’re making such a strong push to raise enough resources to post our billboards all across our district for as long as possible. As a get out the vote operative I _love_ billboards. Thousands of voters will see Tamie as the alternative to Jordan, and will visit our website—**the cost of a single billboard is recouped almost immediately!** [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDc5MzA3NzQ2NDIwOTk5NjksXCJyXCI6MTA3OTMwODE4NTc5NTMwOTkzfSIsInMiOiI5NTVjYWE1YmZhMmVhMzQ0In0)

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Washington Examiner: The root causes of our illiberal higher education system
body:
| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=f352207fc7694431a0ab4528893a0c4b&_e=XkVxyc5VMrHZwuqjl0fP-ZxWKYQCo5VvHxUe9dLf9QGzR5tMAKjb_7fFhdCjwtaZI6PaQ6NdKw7Ccdp0KcmRehNGiqj2jF3nMuyYZkm_KSE0Da7qPkMfoU3YVGvTPoEExLNGtw51Fdd4sr_B2GTyAUqxLNVYi9aUuvjiazpr5Z2BxpDv67xttWdi6wLZP3cacmSW45nIxdA0SYuOBTbIwA%3D%3D)
---
_**The root causes of our illiberal higher education system**_ By Bobby Jindal
---
Americans repulsed by college students harassing Jewish students were more horrified when the adults in charge refused before Congress to condemn calls for Jewish genocide as a violation of their codes of conduct and suggested the words were fine until acted upon. Three university presidents responded to a congressional query about calls for “intifada” with mealy-mouthed words, citing the need for context. One even called the query “a difficult question.”

Most Americans, however, do not require advanced degrees to condemn antisemitism . This failure in leadership revealed latent antisemitism and moral blind spots but also revealed deeper systemic issues afflicting leading universities. While many wish these privileged students were better informed about the Jewish people’s historical and spiritual connections to the land, it has become clear the anti-Israel protesters are impervious to corrective instruction. Their protests reveal more about their moral rot than intellectual deficiencies. The university presidents may have been forced to apologize in the face of donor and bipartisan condemnation, but they are merely addressing the symptoms and not the root causes of higher education’s current crisis. **[FINISH READING ON WASHINGTONEXAMINER.COM](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=f352207fc7694431a0ab4528893a0c4b&_e=XkVxyc5VMrHZwuqjl0fP-SSsUbNHdCc7W4i2NUnpaw0Zv51ZRyvvLXpe2wjXlmWqoBugRCOVz0LDiDNbECCqzv68P0uDSAUNEYXd9gPxMHIjYnVvZa28TTLhmWm_FijolVy-eGCjGO0_l86g8-n5ueiqv6QFEj9zWe3MCVcRfQboyOlcekTITbHmzNAIDBNTKi3xjWvtAX4HOaxud49aP8ZPA6WCqyk_1Rn8NvMr1cfrXqEmng7czvkhNX_A18_X5FayWMkCNLw1J_ZrWS-xSxuUU3qpYjW7JQNDTBQbkiOhviQ-nwoNJ3Yn7iClMCgNywzR3dc6xxoeyxn05bicnw%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: A Christmas Reflection...
body:
Important reminder | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/christmas?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

As Christmas approaches, I say to you - with joy in my heart - "Thank you!"

Together, we have traveled a challenging journey - from a governor campaign to intrusions into free speech to lawsuits against Attorney General Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice. I cannot adequately express how much I appreciate your willingness to stand by my side. You have been amazing! You have been a blessing to Mary and I.

Now I am asking you to take advantage of this wonderful time of the year and reflect on the blessings in your life. Our spirits become more generous and loving when we realize that our lives have been touched by goodness and friendship and belief in our Creator. It is healing for humans to try to let worries and stresses melt away, even for a short while. So please, take this opportunity to be fully present with your loved ones. Perhaps on Christmas Day we could even try to ignore our electronic devices, for just a little while anyway. It's so easy to be distracted from what really matters.

>From my family to yours, be blessed this Christmas season. There are struggles ahead, but now can be a time for rest, reflection, and connection with those who mean the most to you.
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=5838cb7e73&e=9828080a05)
---
| Again, I share with you that I'm incredibly thankful for your willingness to sacrifice time, money, and efforts on my behalf. And I thank God for your commitment to a free America.

Stay present in this season; there are people who need your company and attention, and we all need one anothers' prayers. Merry Christmas!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Scott Perry's Week in Review
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend,
Last week, as our campaign was making national headlines for our innovative use of technology [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/12/12/democratic-campaign-ai-caller-00131180] to defeat Scott Perry next year, Perry himself was having a much different experience.
If you think you had a rough week, take a look at the week our Republican opponent had. Here is our Scott Perry week in review!
First up it was announced that Perry had lost his position as Chair of the Freedom Caucus. [https://www.axios.com/2023/12/12/house-freedom-caucus-leader-drama-bob-good] That's right, Scott Perry is just too extreme for the likes of Marjorie Taylor Green, Matt Gaetz, and Jim Jordan.
Ousting Perry as head of the Freedom Caucus is a step in the right direction, make a contribution to our campaign to make sure we oust him from Congress altogether! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Next, as a follow-up to the recent story about Perry's leaked text messages which demonstrate his central role in the plot to overturn the election, it was announced that Scott Perry is on the prosecution's witness list in the Georgia election fraud trial. [https://www.witf.org/2023/12/07/pa-rep-scott-perry-on-witness-list-in-georgia-election-fraud-case/]
Prosecutors are finally moving to hold Scott Perry accountable for his role in undermining our Democracy, but we can't leave anything to chance. DONATE NOW to hold him accountable at the ballot box in 2024! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Lastly, because of the emerging details around Scott Perry's role in the attempted insurrection (and our 2022 campaign that sought to hold him accountable for those actions), the Cook Political Report moved our district from "Likely Republican" to "Lean Republican," making Scott Perry the most vulnerable Republican Congressional incumbent in PA! [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2023/12/after-turbulent-23-politics-tracker-calls-rep-perry-pas-most-vulnerable-republican-incumbent.html?emci=aa3c7203-b39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
That means that we can beat Perry, BUT we can't take our foot off the gas, and that's why I'm asking you to make a contribution today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Scott Perry's very bad week makes one thing clear - The momentum is with us, and I hope you are as proud of what our campaign has accomplished since 2022 as I am. Getting to this point where we are poised to finally defeat Scott Perry was a team effort, and YOU have been an important part of our team. As we close in on the end of 2023, and our year end fundraising deadline, I am asking you to make a contribution to our campaign so we can finish what we started.
Together, we WILL defeat Scott Perry! Thank you for being a vital part of our team!
Shamaine
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

clean_body: Everyday we're getting closer to facing Monica De La Cruz head on and we need to be ready for anything. | | | As the holidays get closer and the year draws to a close, we know there are a lot of things competing for your attention. But, Peter, there’s only one thing on our minds at Team Vallejo and that’s the fact that everyday we're getting closer to facing Monica De La Cruz head on and we need to be ready for anything. Last cycle GOP mega donors and special interests spent millions of dollars on this race and that money has already started to pour in once again. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | We know that Michelle’s opponents are going to get nasty because that’s what they did last cycle. They dumped TONS of money into spreading misinformation and lies about Michelle and we know that as we get closer to Election Day, they’re going to do it again. This race is winnable, Peter, but only if we have the resources to get Michelle’s message out to as many voters as possible while responding to any attacks and making sure voters know the truth about this race and about what Michelle stands for. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

# [Year In Review](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=139590773&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NTkwNzczLCJpYXQiOjE3MDI5MzIyMTksImV4cCI6MTcwNTUyNDIxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9He9vJScbsvQPIqzjPCFWw6yd3ClI3Nzv1JPJKvXYqs)
### Help us continue to grow State Freedom Caucuses
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/02f81bc0-826e-4cec-9b54-abdbff5d25af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
Friends,
2023 was an incredible year for the State Freedom Caucus Network.
We launched Freedom Caucuses in four new states, bringing the total to eleven nationwide, and they succeeded in fighting against the radical left and swampy establishment Republicans to deliver solid victories for conservatives.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for**tax cuts and fiscal responsibility.** The Arizona Freedom Caucus helped pass the Arizona Families Tax Rebate, returning $750 per household back to taxpayers. This money came out of the AZFC's pot of tax dollars typically reserved for earmarks. So while other members spent that money on pork projects, the AZFC spent it on tax relief! The South Dakota Freedom Caucus returned the state's $115 million surplus back to the taxpayers. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus successfully blocked a proposal to provide subsidies to Hollywood for movie production in their state.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for **election integrity**. The Georgia, Louisiana, and Montana Freedom Caucuses all got laws passed in their states that banned so-called Zuckerbucks. The Georgia and Idaho Freedom Caucuses successfully killed efforts to bring ranked choice voting to their states. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus got a law passed closing the state's primary elections to stop crossover voting.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for **healthcare freedom**. The Georgia Freedom Caucus led efforts to pass a bill banning discrimination based on covid vaccine status. The Louisiana Freedom Caucus successfully passed a bill to ensure that no patient is left to die alone in a medical facility. The South Carolina Freedom Caucus helped pass a law repealing the state's Certificate of Need laws for medical facilities.
State Freedom Caucuses fought against **bloated budgets.** The Idaho Freedom Caucus saved taxpayers $150 million by leading efforts to force the removal of ineligible Medicaid patients. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus killed an attempt to expand Obamacare in the state.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for the **Second Amendment.** The Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus blocked efforts to repeal the state's "Stand Your Ground" law. The Idaho Freedom Caucus championed a law that banned credit card companies from surveilling gun owners.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for **parental rights.** The Louisiana Freedom Caucus authored and passed a bill requiring parental notification for teachers to use any pronoun for a child other than the sex recorded on the child's birth certificate. The Idaho Freedom Caucus passed a bill banning the use of a child's vaccination status as evidence to investigate if a couple is fit to be parents. The Wyoming Freedom Caucus brought national attention to their RINO Speaker of the House who blocked efforts to pass a parental rights bill.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/423e05f3-ae77-45d2-8322-a0adc36e88fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
State Freedom Caucuses fought against **wokeness in schools.** The Georgia Freedom Caucus helped pass a law that prevents requiring schools to have Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) and Critical Race Theory (CRT) programs in order to receive accreditation. The Montana Freedom Caucus passed a law affirming that teachers and students are not required to use the personal pronouns of anybody. The South Carolina Freedom Caucus won a lawsuit it filed against a school district that was caught circumventing the state's ban on CRT.
Freedom Caucuses fought against **transgender madness.** The Montana, Mississippi, Georgia, Idaho, and Louisiana Freedom Caucuses all led efforts to pass laws that banned sex change operations on minors. The South Carolina Freedom Caucus also successfully shut down a transgender clinic at a hospital that was performing sex changes on minors while the legislature was out of session.
State Freedom Caucuses fought for **unborn life.** The Wyoming Freedom Caucus championed a law that passed without the governor's signature declaring that human life begins from the moment of conception and declares that abortion is not "health care" within the state. The Idaho Freedom Caucus helped pass a law criminalizing the provision of abortion pills to minors and assisting in taking them across state lines for an abortion. The Illinois Freedom Caucus led an effort to stop an abortion clinic from opening up in the town of Danville, IL.
Our Freedom Caucus in South Carolina upset the establishment so much that all of our members were kicked out of the Republican caucus. The same thing happened in Georgia with our Vice Chair State Senator Colton Moore, who got booted for his calls to defund the office of Fulton County DA Fani Willis.
Even in the extremely blue state of Illinois, our seven Freedom Caucus members ended their legislature's "consent calendar," which Democrats used to ram hundreds of bills through the House with little consideration and debate.
On all the issues conservatives hold dear to their hearts, our State Freedom Caucuses delivered and we couldn't have done it without the support from patriots all over the country such as yourself.
But we are not even close to achieving our ultimate goal: A Freedom Caucus in all 50 states.
We need your help to make it happen.
Please donate to the State Freedom Caucus Network so we can continue our mission of expanding the "farm team" for the House Freedom Caucus in DC, take on the establishment in both parties, and continue to deliver victories for conservatives.
The State Freedom Caucus Network will be bigger and stronger in 2024. There is no doubt about that. But the question is how much bigger and stronger? And that is up to you. With your help, State Freedom Caucuses will really put the Swamp on notice.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/423e05f3-ae77-45d2-8322-a0adc36e88fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/825bf7c5-088f-4fe1-a8a5-e700741e5238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/85bd5fcd-5a86-45ae-a0b4-9c48f9b2e0fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qgFXaIUN0pynHtaTxIxxWyKb6oWxPzBe8GAQDwYQbcY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qgFXaIUN0pynHtaTxIxxWyKb6oWxPzBe8GAQDwYQbcY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: JD Vance
subject: this could be the last email I ever send you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cc8a056417548059d95fbd4522772ca&_e=-5GeKzGM7WaUjhZn7SNETZbijaijJ0F1FfrhQLs5eIDHjE5OYI-IzRBkA5DDJC7D5up64UR3tuLem43ktnFfH8YvZHSqKv72gbVCCyLXN5jXMHXsS6CPULAMJFdZk2vFU9B64uD-Xt9DJBhQGPB49rtPclenXhimgHyZnvosFuTilSer35W27oVmxtI8KY8KiGRibXhg6teOViUKtB4FviB6XqxExjKNM8JCu2et7hAjoFOjTf0P8TIe-atM4wl27tSZIpitSERwVOAS-5oSORr9WSfzEeXVnmvkHAgiBlpqr5EmUjRMtn9B1CiwD2ZGVmuCgX9YghdQbAqSnaorGlAjSXKDj5GFs4PuCS6rz7MMho0i4fHtlvpXbg4KkPQJgLRxMPg3KobzEBVDD5MdOMBlFr7AWVORUNEx0FMcyLs%3D)
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cc8a056417548059d95fbd4522772ca&_e=-5GeKzGM7WaUjhZn7SNETZbijaijJ0F1FfrhQLs5eIDHjE5OYI-IzRBkA5DDJC7D5up64UR3tuLem43ktnFfH8YvZHSqKv72gbVCCyLXN5jXMHXsS6CPULAMJFdZk2vFU9B64uD-Xt9DJBhQGPB49rtPclenXhimgHyZnvosFuTilSer35W27oVmxtI8KY8KiGRibXhg6teOViUKtB4FviB6XqxExjKNM8JCu2et7hAjoFOjTf0P8TIe-atM4wl2QDHjJjLWcp79UsLlZYw9VLu83joaK7pjqfBdVQNwxVW_yJl73GoJwVSr8MicLb_1MkwPeC53_rGdczPeiRb5Q1rZVnfYbdM-chGLy7w6G2mci7LCS0RjBIQ2SVAYlV9IWgZ95WxKKotvE7cq07TZ7O5Eikja-F8mkTsjQb3jSGk%3D) Hey there.....

**This could seriously be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend.**

I’ll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out.

Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you’ll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response.

My name is JD Vance. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio.

I’ve worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I’m never going to be dishonest with you.

**Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can’t let them win.**

**[That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cc8a056417548059d95fbd4522772ca&_e=-5GeKzGM7WaUjhZn7SNETZbijaijJ0F1FfrhQLs5eIDHjE5OYI-IzRBkA5DDJC7D5up64UR3tuLem43ktnFfH8YvZHSqKv72gbVCCyLXN5jXMHXsS6CPULAMJFdZk2vFU9B64uD-Xt9DJBhQGPB49rtPclenXhimgHyZnvosFuTilSer35W27oVmxtI8KY8KiGRibXhg6teOViUKtB4FviB6XqxExjKNM8JCu2et7hAjoFOjTf0P8TIe-atM4wl2OQ7qh6nv2R2tvEXUBZ1fWzNzJyr9DbRF4jPuDerXp0HMhBZTthuHc4kiI5Cl7jcvh68F9_bSwUkkpuTx41GAkkgUJvKA7hVx6lHLbYlOkG2gtVC0HZjzZWGcGMmh3Et7JPAVc4l9UzMcZuxgPsrQU2K-8yIZqZSMRFf6Vfz-Od0%3D)**

The Democrats think that the American People are stupid. They’re wrong. I know how tuned in you are to the politics of our country, what needs to be done to turn it around, and how we can get there together.

clean_body: | Hey there..... This could seriously be one of the last emails I ever send you, Friend. I’ll be honest with you, no matter how much it pains me to lay it out. Things are not looking good for Trump-supporting conservatives like us in 2024, and I need to know how you’ll react to this message to know how to move forward. My next move depends on your response. My name is JD Vance. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m a Husband, Father, Marine Corps Veteran, Businessman, Author, and Trump Conservative Senator from the great state of Ohio. I’ve worked hard to serve the people of Ohio in Washington, and I’m never going to be dishonest with you. Joe Biden and his Hard-Left Liberal cronies are sending millions and millions of dollars across the country in an attempt to sweep the most important races and eradicate the conservative movement. We can’t let them win. The Democrats think that the American People are stupid. They’re wrong. I know how tuned in you are to the politics of our country, what needs to be done to turn it around, and how we can get there together. I hate asking others for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. | I’ll always tell it to you like it is, and I’m not going to allow the Left to walk all over everything we’ve worked hard for. God Bless, JD Vance Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HmccZ_qp-4hIgnJLHtaclw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnY1caP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1BRlItMjAyMzEyMThXA3NwY0IKZX3Gr4Bl0F4z5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HmccZ_qp-4hIgnJLHtaclw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnY1caP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1BRlItMjAyMzEyMThXA3NwY0IKZX3Gr4Bl0F4z5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

| | They did it again. After the last census, Georgia lawmakers designed state legislative and congressional maps that blatantly diluted the voting power of Black voters, in violation of the Voting Rights Act. In October, a federal judge struck down those maps. But instead of following the judge’s order to remedy the violation and deliver fair maps, **the state legislature convened for a special session where they once again prioritized partisan power-clinging over accurately representing the diversity of Georgia voters in the General Assembly.** This isn’t over: As anti-voter lawmakers continue pushing their extreme agenda, we’ll keep fighting back even harder so voters can make their voices heard. But this work is only possible because of this team. Together with partners in the Peach State, Fair Fight Action monitored the special session — calling on legislators to conduct the work in public, end gerrymandering that disadvantages Black voters, and allow Georgians time to review and provide input on the maps.
Now that the session is over, the Georgia Legislature appears to be heading down the same path as Alabama: vacating their responsibility to draw fair maps and instead risking the responsibility being handed to a court appointee.
**Over the course of this special session, anti-voter lawmakers reiterated their core goal: maintaining partisan power by any means necessary.**
Let’s be clear: Partisan gerrymandering and racial gerrymandering are cousins in the ongoing effort to undermine democracy and the will of voters. The people should pick their representatives. Politicians should not pick their voters.
**Fair Fight Action is committed to standing up on behalf of voters in Georgia and across the country. We will not cease our fight for free and fair elections, and I hope we can count on your support.**
[**Pitch in $20 to help ensure our team has the resources we need to keep up work advocating for laws that ensure equitable access to the ballot box.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75403398/444569906/243426068?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231218_f_specialsession_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmVmNjU4Ny1lNjlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=skN-kGQWqhvueErYDMRVhCvVfGQAnU6_vheJyhwXAls=)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Plastic is invading our oceans and bodies
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2206356?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: Demand federal action on the plastic crisis immediately before the planet is destroyed by the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE. [_Take action and speak up now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2206357?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Friend, as you read this, precious baby sea turtles in the ocean are eager to eat and explore the expansive waters they call home. They’re looking for yummy _jellyfish, seaweed, and fish eggs_ to snack on. They need lots of nutritious foods to grow from half a pound to over **500 pounds!** Curious and hungry, a baby sea turtle spots a translucent object floating across the ocean. _Must be a jellyfish!_ It glides quickly to its prey and begins chomping. But as soon as it tries to chew the object, they start to _**CHOKE.**_ The piece of “food’ is actually a piece of _**PLASTIC.**_ The plastic debris gets **LODGED** in the sea creature’s tiny throat, keeping it from breathing. This innocent baby sea turtle will soon die of _**SUFFOCATION.**_ This is only one example of how **MILLIONS** of marine animals are **_KILLED_** from plastic waste that is washed into our oceans. Plastic pollution is an _**endangerment**_ to our marine ecosystem. Marine life can easily mistake plastic as food, get entangled in plastic debris which affects their ability to swim, and can even get **INJURED** by sharp pieces of plastic scraps. The plastic that invades our oceans are also invading our bodies. When plastic breaks down, it becomes **MICROPLASTICS** that are found in our food supply and even the air we breathe. Plastic do not ever DISAPPEAR Friend... **We need to regulate plastic production and pollution NOW before it overwhelms our planet any further. We don’t need more plastic, we need solutions! In order to demand bold action from the Biden Administration, we need YOU in this fight. [_Will you help us, marine animals, and the planet? Sign our plastics petition before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2206358?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2206359?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Friend make no mistake: Big Plastic and Big Oil are deeply connected._ Plastic is made from a **colossal amount of fossil fuels.** These industrial-sized plastic factories release tons of harmful greenhouse gases into the atmosphere and harm nearby residents in communities that are disproportionately low-wealth and communities of color. In fact, mega-plastic corporations have also been discovered _**ILLEGALLY**_ discharging plastic waste into communities’ water sources!
We cannot stand by while greedy corporations fill their pockets and fill our lands with waste. Our precious planet is on the line, as well as our health and wildlife. **We need immediate action—we cannot wait another day.[_Please, Friend, take action against the plastic apocalypse and demand regulation of Big Plastic and Big Oil. clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: Demand federal action on the plastic crisis immediately before the planet is destroyed by the PLASTIC APOCALYPSE. == Friend, as you read this, precious baby sea turtles in the ocean are eager to eat and explore the expansive waters they call home. They’re looking for yummy jellyfish, seaweed, and fish eggs to snack on. They need lots of nutritious foods to grow from half a pound to over 500 pounds! Curious and hungry, a baby sea turtle spots a translucent object floating across the ocean. Must be a jellyfish! It glides quickly to its prey and begins chomping. But as soon as it tries to chew the object, they start to CHOKE. The piece of “food’ is actually a piece of PLASTIC. The plastic debris gets LODGED in the sea creature’s tiny throat, keeping it from breathing. This innocent baby sea turtle will soon die of SUFFOCATION. This is only one example of how MILLIONS of marine animals are KILLED from plastic waste that is washed into our oceans. Plastic pollution is an endangerment to our marine ecosystem. Marine life can easily mistake plastic as food, get entangled in plastic debris which affects their ability to swim, and can even get INJURED by sharp pieces of plastic scraps. The plastic that invades our oceans are also invading our bodies. When plastic breaks down, it becomes MICROPLASTICS that are found in our food supply and even the air we breathe. Plastic do not ever DISAPPEAR Friend... We need to regulate plastic production and pollution NOW before it overwhelms our planet any further. We don’t need more plastic, we need solutions! In order to demand bold action from the Biden Administration, we need YOU in this fight. == | == Friend make no mistake: Big Plastic and Big Oil are deeply connected. Plastic is made from a colossal amount of fossil fuels. These industrial-sized plastic factories release tons of harmful greenhouse gases into the atmosphere and harm nearby residents in communities that are disproportionately low-wealth and communities of color. In fact, mega-plastic corporations have also been discovered ILLEGALLY discharging plastic waste into communities’ water sources! We cannot stand by while greedy corporations fill their pockets and fill our lands with waste. Our precious planet is on the line, as well as our health and wildlife. We need immediate action—we cannot wait another day.== == Thank you for taking a stand against plastic pollution. Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: ICYMI: John Teichert Headlines Wreaths Across America Event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---
**ICYMI: John Teichert Headlines Wreaths Across America Event**
**BALTIMORE, Md.** – In case you missed it, retired Brigadier General John Teichert was the keynote speaker at the [Wreaths Across America](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ad735f9489&e=1b1fb1ad9f) event on Saturday, December 16th at Crownsville Veterans Cemetery.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=bf80b17fd1&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
Captivating thousands of volunteers who were gathered to recognize America’s fallen heroes this holiday season, the U.S. Senate candidate shared with the crowd three important sentiments regarding this powerful event: “remember, honor, and teach.”
“As you go about your duty here on this hallowed ground; as you remember and you honor and you teach, use this time to redouble your dedication to carrying on their unfinished work - the noble calling that they served - that we are here to follow up on their amazing legacy,” Teichert told the crowd. “It's a joy and a thrill for me to be here as a veteran, as a candidate for United States Senate, and as a proud American, as we collectively serve together with one another to remember, and to honor, and to teach. ”
Watch John’s speech in full [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e60488758a&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=494c56e23c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Wreaths Across America is a nationwide mission, placing wreaths at fallen soldiers headstones each Christmas season. In 2023, the program laid over 3 million wreaths at cemeteries across the United States and around the world.
# # #
|
---
| | |
---
