name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=04e3efe3e3c94a1fbff527d1c524e5f7&_e=-OaAB_rSVovJAjA1oQ6Y4dxwh-pFNTLLWnUzi4DtWItAR4rBsGn2KrF0fNSSZ3IrkifE7-OE0RF8kGkHwGiDQ-wSgllMJRIOlzjBwzVMwS_ePPPw4FSukCLLyY0F6Rj6Vl3G84BGKl8zQn6wPACghiln2qfCLrImMgNX_KgXuVsWG6TL4NoQM8D8VH7tBw7o3_8orCAYQqAkiQZ7khtqq36R0avmzoY7BaGAZG5iukPLsGPRiZWL3NugjwffEjf6aFehllFx9Y2t27MihvqcZmOF-ZgeTaG8Smj1hVlstqebJvX0nBv-fvlhkGFBQnJZHQQW91ueW3VA-5Hj2BuT-6m9CjoS5KEad9MnSOb9ODPFOOZwRGCwRu5P4TbjaliC)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=04e3efe3e3c94a1fbff527d1c524e5f7&_e=-OaAB_rSVovJAjA1oQ6Y4dxwh-pFNTLLWnUzi4DtWItAR4rBsGn2KrF0fNSSZ3IrkifE7-OE0RF8kGkHwGiDQ-wSgllMJRIOlzjBwzVMwS_ePPPw4FSukCLLyY0F6Rj6Vl3G84BGKl8zQn6wPACghiln2qfCLrImMgNX_KgXuVsWG6TL4NoQM8D8VH7tBw7o3_8orCAYQqAkiQZ7khtqq36R0avmzoY7BaGAZG5iukNM3d19mxe1KY4wDsgggalUG0Pf6ABZiYB4LRl8ruIEdKpqvc1Vk52UQShfSqoZQc6AleTu8ki2zsq_RV99YC80_kx7hTHi5ekf4kz5FmvR0STvfQigXq2r8t-E6uBhWHGZZzvaooob5m0UIZq0mIcY)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=04e3efe3e3c94a1fbff527d1c524e5f7&_e=-OaAB_rSVovJAjA1oQ6Y4dxwh-pFNTLLWnUzi4DtWItAR4rBsGn2KrF0fNSSZ3IrkifE7-OE0RF8kGkHwGiDQ-wSgllMJRIOlzjBwzVMwS_ePPPw4FSukCLLyY0F6Rj6Vl3G84BGKl8zQn6wPACghiln2qfCLrImMgNX_KgXuVsWG6TL4NoQM8D8VH7tBw7o3_8orCAYQqAkiQZ7khtqq36R0avmzoY7BaGAZG5iukO7TvQoo8bE0k841mYINl3ukN8B-1PB6VwBeMM8jeyDNwdgyBASmylDN56EaK2e9SwHhayUz0GuIwJ_OvTOq30mPnKV_KXtVNmgVxr5CaZJvBbUofR6mxcAl58HQ7sBjphNZkDMmxR-9-vZop8BrfcG)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=04e3efe3e3c94a1fbff527d1c524e5f7&_e=-OaAB_rSVovJAjA1oQ6Y4dxwh-pFNTLLWnUzi4DtWItAR4rBsGn2KrF0fNSSZ3IrkifE7-OE0RF8kGkHwGiDQ-wSgllMJRIOlzjBwzVMwS_ePPPw4FSukCLLyY0F6Rj6Vl3G84BGKl8zQn6wPACghiln2qfCLrImMgNX_KgXuVsWG6TL4NoQM8D8VH7tBw7o3_8orCAYQqAkiQZ7khtqq36R0avmzoY7BaGAZG5iukOqX_wDVw-dRUGy2uqzAMtQt4PxJNV1PZQK20-Je5LE1LqqUJsuNB6-ZJ7ov1GeCFjNE18lSLGnLIAV-jzK1ADaYeXsgQip-R32TVo3yZ4lqfQHCscoJZAgMuUj4yNyautnn22_UWKuhYqIiAyKykCo)

name: Kirsten
subject: End-of-quarter, explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Hi Peter,
I wanted to explain what our upcoming deadline means for our campaign.
We have until the end of December to raise as much as possible. After that, our fundraising numbers for the quarter become public — and my opponent and all his Republican allies will know exactly how strong our campaign is.
That’s why I’m reaching out now. My team set an ambitious goal for this month, and I won’t lie — we’re falling behind. Your donation now can help us make up for lost time >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
Every day I’m on the campaign trail is a reminder of why I’m in this race.
I first ran for office because I saw how Republican budget cuts were hurting public schools — including the one my daughter attended. Our elected officials' choices have serious consequences, and I wanted to make sure there was a voice in the Arizona legislature speaking for our working families.
Last year, I ran for an open House seat against Juan Ciscomani. Republicans in Congress knew my opponent would be a guaranteed MAGA vote — so they poured everything they could into electing him.
My campaigns have been people-powered operations focused on issues affecting Arizona folks, like abortion, water security, and workers’ rights. So, while GOP super PACs were spending millions in our district for Ciscomani, we had volunteers going door to door for free.
We lost by one of the smallest margins in the country despite being outspent 6:1. And we proved that with more support, we could win in 2024.
Our campaign already has more momentum than we had at any point last year. But Republicans are going to put everything they have into protecting my opponent.
If we hit our quarterly fundraising goal, we’ll show MAGA donors we’re a serious threat. We’ll be able to hit the ground running in 2024 and get a headstart on reaching voters with our message.
Our campaign last year proved the power of grassroots donors. I need your support to win next November, so I have to ask: will you chip in before our end-of-quarter deadline in less than two weeks? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]
Thank you so much, Peter. Your support now will help us make a better Arizona.
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_121823_EOQ_A_act]

subject: we appreciate you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** We’re quickly approaching 2024 and many of you stepped up to help us prepare for our end-of-year FEC deadline – thank you. _I know you know how important hitting our fundraising goals is, and we’re so grateful for your support – especially this time of year._

2023 showed us just how far the Republican Party is willing to go to push the MAGA agenda, and your grassroots support helps Mad and our team to stop them in their tracks here in the Philadelphia suburbs.

We’re fighting to take the House majority in 2024 so Democrats can get back to delivering for all Americans – like we did on infrastructure and jobs, clean energy investments and health care savings. _Your support helps Madeleine and House Democrats as we work to retake the majority._

If you didn’t have the chance to join the grassroots effort last week, **[you can still make a donation now, ahead of our big deadline at the end of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75404623/444574029/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=12182023_md_midmonthty_fr_1&refcode2=7390c596-ea9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwYzU5Ni1lYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJY7U9wQ9Rm9uD6fLdk8YNeIeHwxPfzv-3AgwA8mn5k=)**

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Cole
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Hey friend — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.
The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.
But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.
That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.
We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.
Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.
Let’s prove them wrong, friend.
That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Let’s do this,
David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Taking some time for family soon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That’s not a bad thing. It’s great.
#

Peter -
I’m writing to you because I know what time of the year it is. Yep, even campaigns celebrate the holidays.
And I know a lot of you will probably start taking some time away from these emails as we get closer to the end of the year.
That’s not a bad thing. It’s great. I will, too.
My wife and I had our first child together just a few months back, so this is Baby Isla’s first Christmas. We won’t get those moments back, and I want to make the most of it.
But the timing... It's not ideal. New Year’s Eve is also our final FEC deadline of the year. Our most important deadline of this campaign.
And before we take some time off for the holidays, I’ve got a bit of bad news: We’ve fallen behind on our goals.
I won’t be making quite as many fundraising calls as I normally would to catch up because of the holidays, and that’s why I’m writing to you. I’m hoping that you’ll be able to help us close the gap by chipping in to this email.
This is a really magical time, but it’s also a really important time for this campaign. And I hope you can help.

body:

Whether it’s a strengthening economy, historic investments to combat climate change, addressing student debt relief, or protecting same-sex marriage, President Biden and the Democrats spent the first three years in power delivering real results to the American people.
But as Democrats prepare to enter the new year, we want to know what you think President Biden should focus on next, Peter.

subject: I'll never forget where I came from, Peter

body:
When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community.

| Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter.

[If you’ve been on Team Ritchie from day 1, you can click here to skip my story and support our grassroots movement »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75405210/444575609/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231218_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdkMDdhZC1lYzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhAYbUDbIJJ7Lb5zllSLGTadNjiPxePDz6Fmu5c8QOM=)

**_Here’s a little bit about me:_**

📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx.

🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty.

🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight _every day_ until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law.

👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care.

**_And here’s why my story matters for you:_**

When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in _community._

From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of _changing the game_ for the Bronx.

**I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:[Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help me continue fighting for you? We’re aiming for 22 more donations from PA by midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75405211/444575610/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231218_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdkMDdhZC1lYzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhAYbUDbIJJ7Lb5zllSLGTadNjiPxePDz6Fmu5c8QOM=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75405218/444575617/-1359812268?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20231218_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdkMDdhZC1lYzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KhAYbUDbIJJ7Lb5zllSLGTadNjiPxePDz6Fmu5c8QOM=)

Together,
— Ritchie
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community. | Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter. = Here’s a little bit about me: 📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx. 🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty. 🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight every day until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law. 👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care. And here’s why my story matters for you: When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community. From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of changing the game for the Bronx. I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Your donation fuels this people-powered coalition — and I can’t thank you enough for your support. Together, — Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. **Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I 've increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun**.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now ->](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d44effd10044126b7685d568ce52531&_e=WrpAwjikZN7gLuzZeILO38WNmou61qYUblfQLO2h21-I9pbocPZXCbLQIzQuNko6Zn6agI6wAU5wTdqUHqeFyHF1MEbC9S7rrdT_6qbYHYsJwSWWDCM54dmG0OQOJya7wzk1QEu17pGLjHHmWxO4cHAo3tOAyxDd3qj8pH6VbKzUV8eP3JZHVoDm3cJgXFHUnVYRPKKXFsGt_hdwBjI1_hCyB9CCZz9jHYSJadxhYCAmHXXEp0FcAMn0tTNr5BMJUMIBca6Zh6AktgI4o1xbO6IToQ4DH8v_Js5BOm8e7uhoXb_ndZESCObpZhYGpMFf3TYwyz0DpgPltie1Cd-d-gm64bKjYhshddvKNqVmmEjMbClj6h9HqINsJrssZ3TMTMdXAAn5gdO1VKzZAFuKr4Lh1gLuxZP_s7cmIJpGPmQ%3D)
---
| | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel's most ardent defenders in the American press. It's for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). **The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare.** I've been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It's a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support. **The Sun 's success will be a triumph over falsehood**. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today.

clean_body: Access the Sun's reporting for just 1¢ per day. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader, I am a lifelong supporter and defender of Israel. I do so on moral grounds, because of our shared values and because she has many vicious enemies. In particular, I've found much of the mainstream press coverage of Israel to be appalling. It's often misleading, inaccurate, and just plain biased. Now, as Israel faces a desperate fight for its future, I 've increasingly found myself turning to the outstanding and unique coverage of The New York Sun. | | | | The Sun takes the side of right over popular. I consider the Sun to be one of Israel's most ardent defenders in the American press. It's for this reason that when I have something to say, I often turn to the Sun. They have carried a number of my columns since the attack on October 7th (I've written many). The voice of the Sun is precious and far too rare. I've been impressed by its impact and influence, but I know it is the David in this battle, facing many Goliaths. It's a battle that the Sun must win and I have pledged my support. The Sun 's success will be a triumph over falsehood. To succeed, we need you to join. I highly encourage you to become a member of the Sun today. | | | | Every person counts. Don 't wait. Our battle for truth starts now. | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: There's a lot at stake
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75405649/444577125/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZTNiNWViLWVmOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4cbiWTr1j7lySywnbfmPCXlrfwRNr8oCeL_upMsMjc=&emci=6ddb10d7-849b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=36e3b5eb-ef9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, With only a couple of weeks left in the year, we’re building the resources that we need to start 2024 strong. **[Will you donate to OLCV today and help us continue our work protecting Oregon’s people, places, climate, and environment next year and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75405650/444577126/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZTNiNWViLWVmOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4cbiWTr1j7lySywnbfmPCXlrfwRNr8oCeL_upMsMjc=&emci=6ddb10d7-849b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=36e3b5eb-ef9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230) ** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75405651/444577127/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZTNiNWViLWVmOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4cbiWTr1j7lySywnbfmPCXlrfwRNr8oCeL_upMsMjc=&emci=6ddb10d7-849b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=36e3b5eb-ef9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230)
---
The 2024 election is less than a year away and there’s a lot at stake. There are many important races including attorney general, secretary of state, and treasurer, all statewide seats with four-year terms. It’s critical for the future of our state that we elect candidates to fill these seats who will be champions for our climate and environment.
We must also hold Senate Republicans who took part in this year’s walkout accountable on the ballot. It’s time that we end these anti-democratic tactics once and for all, and elect more climate voices to the legislature.
And with former President Trump likely to be on the ballot again this year, it’s a reminder that we can’t take elections for granted. Our work electing pro-climate and pro-environmental champions at the state level is more important than ever.
As always, we’re going up against deep-pocketed corporate interests and fossil fuel companies. Our secret weapon is _you_ —thousands of grassroots supporters coming together to support our work. [**Will you pitch in today to help?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75405652/444577128/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZTNiNWViLWVmOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4cbiWTr1j7lySywnbfmPCXlrfwRNr8oCeL_upMsMjc=&emci=6ddb10d7-849b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=36e3b5eb-ef9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230)
Thanks for all you do.
Sincerely,
Lindsey Scholten, OLCV Executive Director
[**PS: If you’re eligible, you can give $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC using the Oregon Political Tax Credit and get it back when you file your taxes! Click here to find out if you’re eligible and to donate.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75405653/444577129/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2ZTNiNWViLWVmOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4cbiWTr1j7lySywnbfmPCXlrfwRNr8oCeL_upMsMjc=&emci=6ddb10d7-849b-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=36e3b5eb-ef9d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, With only a couple of weeks left in the year, we’re building the resources that we need to start 2024 strong. | The 2024 election is less than a year away and there’s a lot at stake. There are many important races including attorney general, secretary of state, and treasurer, all statewide seats with four-year terms. It’s critical for the future of our state that we elect candidates to fill these seats who will be champions for our climate and environment. We must also hold Senate Republicans who took part in this year’s walkout accountable on the ballot. It’s time that we end these anti-democratic tactics once and for all, and elect more climate voices to the legislature. And with former President Trump likely to be on the ballot again this year, it’s a reminder that we can’t take elections for granted. Our work electing pro-climate and pro-environmental champions at the state level is more important than ever. As always, we’re going up against deep-pocketed corporate interests and fossil fuel companies. Our secret weapon is you —thousands of grassroots supporters coming together to support our work. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely, Lindsey Scholten, OLCV Executive Director | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Ilhan’s opponents are vying for AIPAC money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats-endorsed Rep. Ilhan Omar is currently facing three
opponents for her seat in next August’s Democratic primary, and they’re
all vying for AIPAC’s support:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231218-io.mtnlkK&refcode=em20231218-32395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs ]The New York Times: Democratic Critics of Israel Draw Challengers
Eyeing AIPAC’s Help

A New York Times article describes a pre-primary primary of sorts, with
each of these candidates competing for a windfall of GOP mega-donor cash
from AIPAC, its super PAC, and other anti-Palestine groups who seek to
unseat Ilhan from Congress for her pro-peace stance and courage to call
for a ceasefire in Gaza.

Ilhan is one of AIPAC’s top targets, and they’ve made it clear they plan
on spending upward of $100 million — more than ever before — to defeat
progressive incumbents like her in 2024’s primary elections.

In 2022, Ilhan won by a margin of less than 2,500 votes against repeat
challenger Don Samuels, who’s willing to throw human rights for
Palestinians out the window in exchange for AIPAC’s war chest behind him.

But as Ilhan said, “Organized people beat organized money.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231218-io.mtnlkK&refcode=em20231218-32395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs ]With grassroots donations from people like you, we must come together
once again to help Ilhan defend her House seat next year: split a
contribution of $3 or more to Justice Democrats and Ilhan’s
campaign now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231218-io.mtnlkK&refcode=em20231218-32395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs ]Contribute $3

Our movement cannot afford to lose such an unapologetic champion for bold,
progressive change and human rights in Congress. Let’s do everything in
our power over these next eight months to re-elect Ilhan.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231218-32395-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32395_1203867_ZHldHs&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32395%2E1203867%2EZHldHs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Friend,

This is it - we've come so far over the past 12 months, and my FINAL deadline of the year is rapidly approaching. **We won by the skin of our teeth last election - and the left is coming for me again. This deadline is MASSIVE, it's REAL, and it will play a HUGE FACTOR in the 2024 election.**

**DECEMBER 31st - MARK YOUR CALENDAR**

**December 31st marks the last deadline of the year. After the 31st, we must show the left how much we 've raised over the past year. [If we want to HOLD the House and WIN next year, we need to show the left we're in a fighting position.](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=b428c858908740038a43e11ea0389baa&_e=2ZxICKKKu2CbX_6obkXq3FVvWTP_qiIbbCPVacWgXjAi4N6VsTT-XOwoZK2iCnXBK8nxgnFzOHssfvCTIiTUX-p7YLE9MZ7P9easWrNVQERjEmjrkF4ubcnLbSNaimON8R7cJkrqi3OkSHE3-Rt0sz6UEK6J6xjGnxcD5aJ-75vsl-m0PhYP2cDWeUpJEIcUz79b4kMPHmVxY6dOJzNxvYnYGrvRb18s_DTnsd-e6VJKSb1lEgdpFkBbjjWDiDgFZIIQiboHjRir7Ax5EaxORj3GFQqpNZ106G1nMwrw-Ypcg_y5lJxARwV_vJF5DoAf)**

Usually, the Democrats outraise Republicans. Time and time again, they've shown their fundraising prowess. That's precisely why they keep winning CRUCIAL elections. They have cash to spend and are not afraid to throw money at their problems (much like how they run the government).

It is up to us to show the Radical Left that Americans are fed up, and we're ready to fight back.

Right now - we're on track to come up short on this upcoming deadline. Your help right now would make a real difference, and many people would sleep easier at night if they knew you had our back.

[**Please take five seconds to pitch in. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Joe Biden and Tony Gonzales nowhere to be found | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2590b1bee265/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12669158?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=2757edcb40&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,

US Customs just announced the suspension of railroad traffic as Border Patrol Agents are redirected to handle the influx of illegal immigrants. This is just another example of the BIDEN BORDER CRISIS that continues to wreak havoc on our country. Now, more than ever, we need REAL CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP that will secure our borders and protect Americans.

The people of Texas are tired of dealing with the consequences of **BIDEN’S DANGEROUS BORDER POLICIES.** The drug cartels and career criminals are running the border and putting American lives at risk.

The people of my district, the people of Texas, and the citizens of our Republic are tired of liberal extremists allowing this free-for-all at our border. It’s time to protect America!

According to recent polls, 71% of Americans say they want a more secure border, while 57% want the wall built. ARE ANY OF THE CAREER POLITICIANS LISTENING TO THEIR VOTERS?!

Tony Gonzales isn’t listening, he is busy campaigning and posing for photos with celebrities.

**Rather than stand up to Sleepy Joe,_Tony the RINO bends the knee to his liberal master. _**

ENOUGH! Texas deserves real leadership, that’s why I am running for Congress. It’s time to kick Tony the RINO out of office and fight back against the liberal extremists.

ON DAY ONE, I WILL FIGHT WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP TO SECURE OUR BORDER AND STOP ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION!

[__With your support, Peter, , we can stand up together and protect our Republic, will you stand AMERICA?__](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=00e74d0570&e=c982eb7ad4)

name: Team Scott
subject: TikTok’s newest user...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Either she’s ignorant of our national security or she just doesn’t care.

**One of Rick Scott’s Democrat opponents, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, is now on the Chinese spying app TikTok.**

It’s almost like the Democrats aren’t even trying to hide their love for the CCP anymore.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121823_azabortionbattleground [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121823_azabortionbattleground]
Peter,
We all know hard-right Republicans are working nonstop to roll back our fundamental rights. They’re doing it at the federal level and in states across the country. Now, they’ve set their sights on Arizona.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121823_azabortionbattleground [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121823_azabortionbattleground]
The state Supreme Court is set to decide whether to allow a near-total abortion ban, dating back from 1864, to take effect. 1864.
Raquel has seen the effects of oppressive measures like this firsthand. As a legislator, she traveled to El Salvador, where there is a total abortion ban. She met with women who had been jailed for having obstetric emergencies and miscarriages.
We cannot allow similar injustices to take place in Arizona – ever. That’s why Raquel supports enshrining abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution and will fight to restore abortion rights at the federal level.
Raquel is the fighter for reproductive justice we need to represent us in Congress. Can you help us get there by chipping in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_121823_azabortionbattleground]

clean_body: [] Peter, We all know hard-right Republicans are working nonstop to roll back our fundamental rights. They’re doing it at the federal level and in states across the country. Now, they’ve set their sights on Arizona. [] The state Supreme Court is set to decide whether to allow a near-total abortion ban, dating back from 1864, to take effect. 1864. Raquel has seen the effects of oppressive measures like this firsthand. As a legislator, she traveled to El Salvador, where there is a total abortion ban. She met with women who had been jailed for having obstetric emergencies and miscarriages. We cannot allow similar injustices to take place in Arizona – ever. That’s why Raquel supports enshrining abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution and will fight to restore abortion rights at the federal level. Raquel is the fighter for reproductive justice we need to represent us in Congress. Can you help us get there by chipping in today? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $1 [] DONATE $2 [] DONATE $12 [] DONATE $20 [] DONATE $200 [] MORE [] A ganar, Team Terán [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. name: Team Mazie
subject: Yet another outrageous report about Justice Clarence Thomas
body:
|
#
Peter, you need to see this headline from _ProPublica:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75406048/444578835/-2102377403?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231218_PM1_T1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWY1ZjNkYy1mMDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvzmDFFmBE_4ngzT-J1ChcizoiTWLL6_-qNCJnvtO54=) According to this new bombshell report, in early 2000, Justice Clarence Thomas complained to a former GOP Congressman that the salaries of Supreme Court justices are too low — and he hinted that he might quit as a result. _So what happened next?_ The former GOP Congressman, Cliff Stearns, wrote a letter to Thomas promising to “look into” raising the salaries of Supreme Court justices — and word quickly spread through “conservative legal circles.” Then, influential GOP billionaires like Harlan Crow got the message, lavishing Justice Thomas with extravagant gifts, private jet trips, and even tuition money for his grandnephew. **It is no wonder that the American people have lost trust in the Supreme Court — how can they believe they have a fair shake when they see such blatant misconduct and conflicts of interest?** Peter, this is exactly why Mazie is fighting hard for accountability and transparency at the Supreme Court, and it’s why she’s speaking out against this kind of rampant, unfair behavior every day. body:
#
Derek, next year, we have tons of work to do to keep Republicans from flipping PA red -- and with it, taking control of the Senate.
And on December 31, we’re facing our end-of-year fundraising deadline. After that, we have to report *everything* we’ve raised to the Federal Election Commission.
**[Derek, can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to support John Fetterman and protect our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231218-1?refcode=em20231218-1-8718&refcode2=8718_434096_66U8Vz&akid=8718%2E434096%2E66U8Vz)**

Thanks, Derek.
-- Fetterman HQ 💛

body:
We can’t go back.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75406735/444580736/1806212802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZlOGMzZDQtZjI5ZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KmYcfOLvWduDKQQOIBcUHn21i77qgjDg2F6_e6wmyk8=) | Peter, I want you to think back to where you were on Election Night 2016. I remember exactly where I was. Pam thought it would be fun to make cookies in the shape of all 50 states and we’d frost them red or blue as results came in. Unfortunately as we made more and more red cookies we started realizing what was happening. **Donald Trump, someone who vilified immigrants and bragged about sexual assault was going to become President of the United States.** I remember the despair we felt. The sadness and the anger. I refuse to feel that way again. I share this story to remind you how important it is that you get involved before this happens again. **If the election were held today, not only would Trump win, but he would have a GOP majority in Congress to go along with it.** I refuse to let that happen. That’s why I’m begging you to take this election seriously. We need to volunteer, speak out, and donate before it’s too late. If we do that, on Election night we can celebrate finally sending Donald Trump and his MAGA allies to the dustbins of history. That sounds a lot better than red cookies. clean_body: We can’t go back. | = | Peter, I want you to think back to where you were on Election Night 2016. I remember exactly where I was. Pam thought it would be fun to make cookies in the shape of all 50 states and we’d frost them red or blue as results came in. Unfortunately as we made more and more red cookies we started realizing what was happening. Donald Trump, someone who vilified immigrants and bragged about sexual assault was going to become President of the United States. I remember the despair we felt. The sadness and the anger. I refuse to feel that way again. I share this story to remind you how important it is that you get involved before this happens again. If the election were held today, not only would Trump win, but he would have a GOP majority in Congress to go along with it. I refuse to let that happen. That’s why I’m begging you to take this election seriously. We need to volunteer, speak out, and donate before it’s too late. If we do that, on Election night we can celebrate finally sending Donald Trump and his MAGA allies to the dustbins of history. That sounds a lot better than red cookies. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Josh *

subject: ICYMI: 5 ways NY Democrats could reshape the race for the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/db8b19487410/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9418067?e=a39a20e5dd)
"The Democrats don't want to win districts at the polls. They want to win them in the backrooms of Albany."
- Former Congressman & Redistricting Advisor, John Faso
Dear Friends,

Last week, New York’s highest court gave Democrats a free pass to redraw Congressional districts in the state, giving their party a significant advantage heading into 2024.

I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read this article in Politico that outlines how this decision could impact our race. (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/12/13/5-ways-new-york-democrats-could-reshape-the-race-for-the-house-00131369) [FULL ARTICLE BELOW]

I couldn’t disagree more with the court’s decision. We are still keeping up the fight to protect the will of the voters.

In 2022, we were outspent, but not outworked. With a winning message, we overcame long odds and proved the political pundits wrong by winning in a district Biden had won by over 4.5%.

Our fight in 2024 will be no different.

Regardless of how the lines work out, you can count on me to continue working everyday - for everyone - in New York 19. I will always continue to fight to make sure Upstate New York has a voice and the representation we deserve.

Thank you,
Marc Molinaro
Congressman, NY-19
Donate (https://marcforus.com/donate)

FULL ARTICLE:

By BILL MAHONEY (https://www.politico.com/staff/bill-mahoney)

12/13/2023 03:34 PM EST

Updated: 12/14/2023 10:43 AM EST

ALBANY, New York — Democrats won the court fight. Now they’ll look to win the redistricting war.

New York’s top court Tuesday handed Democrats a victory (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/12/12/new-yorks-top-court-orders-new-house-district-lines-00131360) in a lawsuit over the state’s congressional lines, ordering the restart of a redistricting process that will eventually put the maps in the hands of the Democratic-dominated state Legislature.

How much Democrats seize that opportunity will determine the fate of candidates from Long Island to Syracuse.

There’s a chance the lines might not be as ambitious as some Democrats are hoping: While the Legislature can now redraw the maps, lawmakers also need to guard against an inevitable Republican lawsuit alleging an illegal gerrymander.

Since both sides want to avoid two years of legal battles, any change might be relatively minor — perhaps just tweaking a couple of neighborhoods in the five districts Democrats lost by narrow margins in 2022 and hoping the party fares better in a high-turnout presidential year.

But there will be plenty of pressure from Democrats, including House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, to make sweeping changes to help the party.

“Everybody has strong incentives to draw the maps in a way that creates as many seats that are favorable to Democrats as possible,” Jon Paul Lupo, a New York City Democratic consultant, said.

Exactly what an ambitious overhaul would look like won’t be clear until they’re finalized in January or February. But there are plenty of clues to the changes that might be on tap.

The commission tasked with drafting the plans collected 51 hours of public testimony in 2021. And there have been 20 different congressional plans that have appeared in various legal proceedings — including one that Democrats attempted to enact in 2022.

Here’s a look at five changes Democrats could make if they want to swing for the fences:

** 1. Join Ithaca and Syracuse
------------------------------------------------------------
Republican Rep. Brandon Williams' district.

Republican Rep. Brandon Williams' district as it appeared in the maps used in 2022 (left) compared to the maps Democrats planned to draw (right). | Maps generated by the Graduate Center at CUNY's Redistricting & You

The most obvious move for Democrats would be to place liberal Ithaca in the Central New York district held by freshman Republican Rep. Brandon Williams.

Doing so would add one of the most Democratic-friendly pockets of the state to a district that Williams won by only 2,600 votes last year.

A map that joins Syracuse and Ithaca with other Democratic enclaves like Cortland, another college town, would create a district where Biden dominated by 20 points in 2020 — far better for Democrats than the district Williams narrowly won in 2022, where Biden won by only 7 points.

Drawing a seat like that makes both strategic and legal sense.

Democrats will still need to withstand another round of GOP lawsuits over the lines. Language added to the state constitution in 2014 likely means the best way to beat back a legal challenge would be convincing the courts that changes were made in an attempt to unite communities with common interests.

But Democrats could have an easier time justifying the changes to Williams’ seat than those in other parts of the state: The new district would unite nearby college towns in a compact block.

** 2. Make Bowman’s district more moderate
------------------------------------------------------------
Democratic Rep. Jamaal Bowman's district.

The district Democratic Rep. Jamaal Bowman won in 2022. | The New York State Legislative Task Force on Demographic Research and Reapportionment

When Democrats were drawing lines in early 2022, three incumbents lived in the corner north of the Bronx and south of Ulster County in the Hudson Valley.

But the new court-drawn maps contributed to Republican Rep. Mike Lawler’s defeat of Democratic Rep. Sean Patrick Maloney. It also placed Democratic Reps. Jamaal Bowman and Mondaire Jones into the same district.

** Jones wound up finishing third in a New York City primary. Now he’s challenging Lawler.
------------------------------------------------------------

Democrats thus have different interests than they did last year: Rather than protecting three of their own, their overarching goal in the region is to topple Lawler.

And with Biden enjoying a nearly 50-point edge in the Bowman seat, there’s room to move blue neighborhoods into the Lawler district without risking a Republican upset against the winner of a Democratic primary between Bowman and Westchester County Executive George Latimer.

The overhaul might not be dramatic: Voting rights concerns could ensure that non-white voters continue to make up a majority of Bowman’s constituency.

But if enough neighborhoods shift, Lawler’s district could become Democratic-friendly enough to let mapmakers move blue corners of his district into the neighboring seat held by Democratic Rep. Pat Ryan. That could be the best of both worlds for Democrats: make Ryan’s seat safer and Lawler’s race more competitive.

The tweaks would leave Bowman’s seat safely Democratic, but also make the primary electorate more moderate. That could be an added bonus for Latimer, a well-liked former state lawmaker whose former colleagues will approve the lines.

** 3. Protect Molinaro, maybe
------------------------------------------------------------
Republican Rep. Marc Molinaro's district.

The district Republican Rep. Marc Molinaro won in 2022. | The New York State Legislative Task Force on Demographic Research and Reapportionment

Helping freshman Republican Rep. Marc Molinaro probably isn’t a top priority for any Democrat. But he could wind up becoming one of the big winners in a new set of maps.

Democrats drew their 2022 lines to make the party a favorite in 22 of the state’s 26 congressional districts. They wound up winning only 15 under the lines drawn by the court.

But the blame for the poor showing rests more with a relatively weak election year for Democrats in New York than it did with the maps. Democrats lost in five court-drawn seats where Biden comfortably won in 2020, and they wouldn’t have done much better even if the Democratic lines were still in place.

With those results fresh in mind, any new maps might be less aggressive than those from two years ago.

Rather than trying to draw as many seats as possible in which Democrats have an edge, they could try to draw as many as possible where they have solid advantages. That would limit the number of districts the party could win in a good year, but set the floor in a bad year at somewhere around 18 victories — guaranteeing at least a few pick-ups.

Under the current lines, Molinaro, Williams and Ryan each won with less than 51 percent of the vote, making them textbook swing races. If Democrats decide to take the less aggressive approach, it would be difficult to make Molinaro’s battleground district into a blue stronghold.

So it could be one Democrats simply write off to bolster their chances in neighboring seats — moving Democratic-friendly pieces of the Molinaro seat like Hudson and Ithaca into the seats held by Ryan and Williams. That would come close to locking up two of those three seats for Democrats for the remainder of the decade.

** 4. Change a part of Brooklyn linked to Staten Island
------------------------------------------------------------
Republican Rep. Nicole Malliotakis' district

The district Republican Rep. Nicole Malliotakis won in 2022 (with purple borders) compared to the district Democrats hoped to draw (in black borders). | Maps generated by the Graduate Center at CUNY's Redistricting & You

Staten Island isn’t quite big enough for a district of its own, so it’s guaranteed that it will be joined with a piece of another borough.

In 2022, the final maps were similar to those from the prior decade. The Republican-friendly island was joined with a moderate portion of southern Brooklyn, and Republican Rep. Nicole Malliotakis received 62 percent of the vote.

The lines that Democrats drew would have paired Staten Island with deep-blue pockets of western Brooklyn like Park Slope — allowing for a competitive district that has voted Democratic in several recent elections.

There’s a path to be even more aggressive.

Democrats didn’t have too much room to play around with the Manhattan maps in 2022, since the mid-town addresses of Reps. Jerry Nadler and Carolyn Maloney meant that both needed to have most of their districts squeezed into the portions of the island south of Harlem.

The court-drawn maps placed the two into the same seat, ending Maloney’s career. Nadler now represents the middle portion of Manhattan, while freshman Democrat Dan Goldman represents its southern parts and a chunk of Brooklyn.

It’s possible to push Goldman’s district a bit further into Brooklyn. That would clear room for adding some Manhattan voters to the Malliotakis seat.

While that would be the type of gerrymander that’s likely to come up in court, Democrats would have some ground to argue the boroughs make sense together. Earlier this year, new maps for the state Assembly were approved with strong bipartisan support that were similar.

** 5. Try something different with Long Island
------------------------------------------------------------
Tom Suozzi listens during a debate.

Former Rep. Tom Suozzi is running in a special election in February for his former House seat. But the contours of the Long Island district could be different under new maps set to be drawn by Democrats. | Bebeto Matthews/AP

There are four congressional seats on Long Island. For most of the past decade, the major parties split those 2-2.

Democrats entered 2022 with a plan to squeeze as many Republicans as possible into Rep. Andrew Garbarino’s district — with the goal of solidifying their standing in the other three. That would set the stage for a decade where Democrats held a 3-1 edge in these seats.

Democrats wound up going 0-4 in the court’s maps. They performed so poorly that they would have had the same results even if the Democratic-drawn maps had been on the books.

Mapmakers will need to decide whether they want to swing for the fences again, drawing three districts that appear friendly to Democrats, but none of which is a lock. Or they could try to squeeze as many Democrats as possible into one or two districts to hopefully ensure at least some success in the region.

One major factor that might influence their thinking is the result of the special election to replace Rep. George Santos on Feb. 13 (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/12/07/santos-seat-suozzi-00130737) .

If the map-making process drags on long enough, state legislators could know if Democrat Tom Suozzi has won the special election. That would ensure that boosting Suozzi’s reelection efforts in November would be a centerpiece of their strategy on the entire island.

============================================================

Fellow Conservative,

It's Tim Sheehy. As a Navy SEAL, I proudly completed several deployments and hundreds of missions in defense of our freedoms and way of life.

But those freedoms are under attack here on our own soil. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring to serve our country again, this time in the U.S. Senate.

Here's the thing - I need a team to help me achieve this mission. _**We have less than 365 days until Election Day**_ , and if we're going to retire a career politician for good and put America First, our mission must begin now.

**[Just $1 from 1,000 donors will help keep this campaign running for another day,](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3b93846b2b42403db4f522e988aa3532&_e=eZCpqEdVzhYElo-sCpclG4xtSKKV1QBAg0ImuFiwIc02ChBPXjrrwYl6-c1iE-u_67j9wLjQlkxINJYVonCaCnWO2XUyWA7zwoSpoTmkizhNGUYEvVBh-It0j-_vLUk1fO0qLiH4LU0O0BUqwQEo-wqJ0AGtgJa5NkASKJ-gO05dKtdzP3fan7Os_CvlyvxFua0qYodIwEjViETieE41Af_XDLIqxSdD0lVN-CiKcCbk12zOqJ0YH0hW7wNJApBgGdtgiP6p6PRPelmki-MzMXaFVSICG4dtAIa4u40mNWYYZ4ehLvU9luECY_2BwjmXd4-dCGrnqTPcetFvrea5QGsvEt1gS4bY-1pHSEuF3u0KyNkiCFvb3omyTVy5dsG5y5tp3-nsZs4mbD2UKLQbyvT66tz_QRH8H14HNusrK2M%3D)** so if you are willing to join me on this mission, will you chip in just $1 or more before the end of the day?

subject: We rise by lifting others.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KOI_De_WslcuySta4gB53zlZs2cxuIsC42aHt_F-t8tz_GMrMKt4l_Xp5tSMI-QNhlBbtBdpjnV5vDsvmhDV1MaApyWw63jed8094aDmBfe_fqXMV4rlXzlT5-TpPty_w1pLdxHhBqetVoDqD64VZTAuIyVRR9KCbw6lczygveaq7XQJIMGhOmt63cb45twy63VBZY86D1CTzk-1VtNPNQi-GOqJxkoa-LeZhI61PXISl49LSaYf4u97IYPgBc_SELo3AlDobdsLQfeMkY9ldin/428/ft_2OSrIS72TSYM95P8LOA/h0/hySNCSCd1GePWuTR2u5cKuvWer4I4SecEuAhFOojN8g)
My campaign’s vision is to bring home resources, create jobs, lift up our communities, and make sure that we don’t leave anyone behind.
**That is why I am so excited by the promise of the new Wellness Center in Victorville, CA.** It provides wraparound services such as mental healthcare, medical care, employment services and even pet accommodations to unhoused families and individuals, setting them up to transition to a more stable and secure future.
**So many of us have felt the sting of our broken economic system.** We live in the wealthiest nation in the world, yet one financial crisis can be devastating to families.
**[It doesn’t have to be that way. That’s why I fight for living wages, affordable housing, universal healthcare, and equality. Will you chip in to help me flip CA-23 from red to blue?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KOI_De_WslcuySta4gB53zle5c5ZN-hkS7_tWBWV8Ov7MNjh-Xd-lPBUiisCVs1OVEdNov0qCfvVZu2sEWrlBTMupfURANtqEcriowU-ONWKvTPiLK_gGhtoysiy4w9UvjukkvkSq70ZAbFQsnYrW4FsekQx8hvFHc4-Ec0PCX8XPLampdO3n5V9pmbH4Nu2BJNkSRpqcXM1QLWkGH2OxydHIp1h-ZmL66TlU62fVdDFePZJRB5Mj5paPbt2QfakYZqpdHaoartnlsnkV_7LXli/428/ft_2OSrIS72TSYM95P8LOA/h1/-7wt5kykenVEvFYucFZw41wGJzMnyoBxgxC-Mo6dx6g)**

My time working internationally helped me gain insight into effective social programs, and my community service informed my belief that we rise by lifting others.
Growing up, my family ran a homeless outreach program called “Soup to Go'' that provided meals and supplies to those in need. It taught me that extreme inequalities prevail in our society, and it catalyzed my lifelong commitment to bringing positive change.
**I saw how a helping hand could uplift the spirit of others, and a system that works for everyone could improve the lives of all of us.**
******[My campaign seeks to make real, tangible change that will improve people’s lives. Will you make a grassroots donation to send me to Washington DC?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KOI_De_WslcuySta4gB53zlW8aJlH_hNG7bUCucRtT5dpmyXq16LuqvJjGThLQ-4YRoKeqEuD2aQCRAyay9QFULT1rSOaD3FXPRB_WBvxOfPZt-qVoI3nziuUS72qn9X5W6dTfYXUFdRihmxUwG2NLxV0bLx_H2QxRpDjYMp_fU5xpL1LwRbVfgi6aMvMpAX5CDRaRhUBQf1eCfRZAgpfRS0WuMnUUAnBhAcqrqdLIwL2F7uZ_Xo91FbfQ1WW9YAcuIdIufT0ALvZdKqbcxe_uj/428/ft_2OSrIS72TSYM95P8LOA/h2/1gayzgBALe2AjkRDikRSlzKdBwfDBEMpMrlgQhjCNzA)**

body:
We are calling on the top Republicans to take our Fourth quarter Pulse. Before 2024, we need to know who's on our team.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=069299e6cc014d6da72e13061bd0e6fc&_e=7e567dqWUgvXMpNl_bqxLot1fPklK3-3oY4oupUyTQBB4K9jwr54RUYCV3TAnZbd2uy8AbQrl7dnnyBtcC2VSS-L4tBeeyQ_tmiZOGzpnZBm07JGl15aaRODB2jKHo8e62Rws1Ca7cGnAI_v1B3-8HznpS72wJZgP_OCTnBmLueUAcuDok85F9L8Q-xkqCpPLDCw9XIUTtseOSfftGU2F9IjpraAogZth3BqBsQdNKXmsxHFZ3P3zus9PFedBoN7PwlJ96fTNyjc4r0sojekpvFzupohd8JPflGRVhA2J2s2_HMPi3GKFssmILTXXqoLgGm8iCbAA1fed77cRIzjDBSbDbTI1ez51w4orNI8OkIll7ZiTh2Ph8qJgeZawaqQakf24QPTgKAWwxxq_jUevHIUvguxBhi0GN5-eO9pc_I9moJ-Cfd78AjElMgp7lnSZw3uv8qY4_IxlTjmZbo8sQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, we all know this: The fourth quarter of this year is coming to a close, which means it's time for Republican leaders across the country to report the amount of support they've raised over the course of this past year. The nation's about to learn if the American people are more willing to back the radical Democrats or if they're jumping into the fight for freedom and sanity with Republicans. Before these reports are filed and made public, we're conducting a Republican Party Fourth Quarter Pulse. **_And we need YOUR response to complete it._**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=069299e6cc014d6da72e13061bd0e6fc&_e=7e567dqWUgvXMpNl_bqxLot1fPklK3-3oY4oupUyTQBB4K9jwr54RUYCV3TAnZbd2uy8AbQrl7dnnyBtcC2VSS-L4tBeeyQ_tmiZOGzpnZBm07JGl15aaRODB2jKHo8e62Rws1Ca7cGnAI_v1B3-8HznpS72wJZgP_OCTnBmLueUAcuDok85F9L8Q-xkqCpPLDCw9XIUTtseOSfftGU2F9IjpraAogZth3BqBsQdNKXmsxHFZ3P3zus9PFedBoN7PwlJ96fTNyjc4r0sojekpvFzupohd8JPflGRVhA2J2sIwTDQZH40EZ01IdF2eNXzlydeGJW5UhCR8hg5bkBvu3pGJ09nDWoVmHoXJSY-q1XIH9ACoSvtJ6Z_-L0KbQ-r_HpBvLP4IwZQdcej487PbfSjbsNgf6RgkDvGGnv2776bad2m5uMmRYGd6peZpJVLrUjK42wRwMirVr6-M4JDAg%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

Team, If there’s one lesson that Governor Gretchen Whitmer has learned during her time in public service, it’s to keep fighting like hell for what you know is right. Last Monday marked the tenth anniversary of the day that Governor Gretchen Whitmer first publicly revealed that she is a survivor of sexual assault — telling her story as a last-ditch effort to block an extreme, anti-choice bill from passing. Peter Willis, in the wake of Israel killing three hostages, the need for an end to civilian killing in Gaza has only grown more urgent.

That's why Our Revolution is doing everything we can to support Peace candidates brave enough to stand up against AIPAC and call for a ceasefire.

Peter Willis, please join us in supporting Peace candidates by chipping in a $5 recurring contribution or a $10 one-time donation. In return, we'll send you one of our new Peace stickers! Peter Willis,

With Israel carrying out an illegal bombing campaign in Gaza that has murdered thousands of innocent civilians, we're so proud of Peace candidates like Barbara Lee, Bernie Sanders, Ro Khanna, and others who have spoken out demanding an end to indiscriminate bombing.

In response, right-wing allies of Bibi Netanyahu, like AIPAC, have waged a dishonest and well-funded campaign to smear anyone calling for peace.

With AIPAC having pledged to spend "at least $100 million" defeating progressives and primary challenges underway for Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman and others, Our Revolution gearing up now to defend these important voices of moral clarity in 2024.

That's why we're asking you to send in a $5 recurring contribution or a $10 one-time donation to support progressives standing up for peace. Billionaire-funded right-wing groups like AIPAC think they can bully progressives into silence, but with lives on the line, we cannot back down.

We need more voices speaking up and fighting back to demand peace - on the streets and in the halls of power.

That's why we're organizing the progressive movement and mobilizing resources to defend those brave enough to call for an end to the bombing of civilians in Gaza.

Pitch in here, and we'll send you our brand new Peace sticker! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13085?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231218_FR_peacestickerfwd_0_6MO_ourrevolutiondotcom_na_na_peacestickerfwd&amount=10&t=1018&akid=5081%2E5885482%2EpbjEj5)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: It's official:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
The Supreme Court will hear the mifepristone case.
|
---
| | **We got official word last week that the Supreme Court will take up the baseless lawsuit being perpetuated by far-right fanatics to limit access to the abortion medication, mifepristone.** This case is the byproduct of Republicans' effort to deny women access to a safe, commonly-used abortion drug. **I'll be blunt: I'm**** _very_****worried about the outcome of this case, considering that this is the same court that overturned**** _Roe v. Wade_****.** But no matter what happens: I remain steadfast in my commitment to championing reproductive health care access. I held the first-ever congressional hearing on mifepristone more than three decades ago. Years later, I'm not about to let Republicans take it away without a fight. [**So please join me, and chip in to help me continue to call out Republican extremists and advocate for reproductive rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75407741/444583635/-2044921950?refcode=2023-12-18-mifepristone&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1ba210dd-f79d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmEyMTBkZC1mNzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv93LmOz4My05Gs6KCWPUqStgDaVF89NPz3Eo5y1ytg=) _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75407742/444583636/2140832878?=9818364&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmEyMTBkZC1mNzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv93LmOz4My05Gs6KCWPUqStgDaVF89NPz3Eo5y1ytg=&emci=6928d2ac-d49d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=1ba210dd-f79d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=9818364)
---
When the far-right overturned _Roe v. Wade_ in 2022, I – and many others – warned that Republicans wouldn't stop at overturning _Roe_. I've long been afraid that they will go after every facet of reproductive freedom.
**Unfortunately, they're continuing to prove me right. In 2023, they've done everything they can to attack another pillar of reproductive care: access to the abortion medication mifepristone.**
This spring, right-wing activists hand-picked an extremist judge in Texas to rule in their favor and further restrict access to the most commonly-used abortion medication in the country – even in states where abortion remains legal. Fortunately, the Supreme Court temporarily blocked the lower court's radical and illegitimate decision. This means that for the time being, mifepristone remains on the market for millions of Americans.
Now, as we wait for the Supreme Court to decide whether or not it will take up the mifepristone case, anti-choice Republicans are desperate and trying _yet again_ to rig the game and rip away Americans' constitutional rights to privacy and reproductive freedom.
Earlier this month, three GOP state attorneys general (of Missouri, Kansas, and Idaho) filed a motion to join the suit of the plaintiffs who kicked off this period of legal chaos. They're trying to advance a radical argument that states have standing to sue the FDA for allowing mifepristone to be bought and sold. **In effect: they want to see the harsh anti-choice policies of their states take effect in other states.**
I'll be clear: I'm not about to let right-wing extremists impose their policies — policies that keep losing at the ballot box across the country — on Oregonians or the rest of the country.
As we just saw days ago, voters across the country continue to send the strong message that they want to protect their reproductive freedom, not have it clawed back by far-right extremists.
I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later, I'm still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care.
Even before the initial Texas decision on mifepristone came down, **I took to the Senate floor and called on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring illegitimate rulings and keeping mifepristone on the market**.
The days and weeks ahead demand vigilance. We must continue to ensure that folks have the correct information about mifepristone, and we have to keep shining a light on the despicable attempts by the GOP to impose their will on the reproductive healthcare decisions of millions of Americans.
[**If you're able to stand with me in the fight to protect access to reproductive care and hold anti-choice Republicans accountable, please do so by donating $3 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75407743/444583637/-2044921950?refcode=2023-12-18-mifepristone&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1ba210dd-f79d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmEyMTBkZC1mNzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv93LmOz4My05Gs6KCWPUqStgDaVF89NPz3Eo5y1ytg=)
Thank you,

clean_body: The Supreme Court will hear the mifepristone case. | | | We got official word last week that the Supreme Court will take up the baseless lawsuit being perpetuated by far-right fanatics to limit access to the abortion medication, mifepristone. This case is the byproduct of Republicans' effort to deny women access to a safe, commonly-used abortion drug. I'll be blunt: I'm veryworried about the outcome of this case, considering that this is the same court that overturned Roe v. Wade. But no matter what happens: I remain steadfast in my commitment to championing reproductive health care access. I held the first-ever congressional hearing on mifepristone more than three decades ago. Years later, I'm not about to let Republicans take it away without a fight. = Ron Forwarded Message | When the far-right overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022, I – and many others – warned that Republicans wouldn't stop at overturning Roe. I've long been afraid that they will go after every facet of reproductive freedom. Unfortunately, they're continuing to prove me right. In 2023, they've done everything they can to attack another pillar of reproductive care: access to the abortion medication mifepristone. This spring, right-wing activists hand-picked an extremist judge in Texas to rule in their favor and further restrict access to the most commonly-used abortion medication in the country – even in states where abortion remains legal. Fortunately, the Supreme Court temporarily blocked the lower court's radical and illegitimate decision. This means that for the time being, mifepristone remains on the market for millions of Americans. Now, as we wait for the Supreme Court to decide whether or not it will take up the mifepristone case, anti-choice Republicans are desperate and trying yet again to rig the game and rip away Americans' constitutional rights to privacy and reproductive freedom. Earlier this month, three GOP state attorneys general (of Missouri, Kansas, and Idaho) filed a motion to join the suit of the plaintiffs who kicked off this period of legal chaos. They're trying to advance a radical argument that states have standing to sue the FDA for allowing mifepristone to be bought and sold. In effect: they want to see the harsh anti-choice policies of their states take effect in other states. I'll be clear: I'm not about to let right-wing extremists impose their policies — policies that keep losing at the ballot box across the country — on Oregonians or the rest of the country. As we just saw days ago, voters across the country continue to send the strong message that they want to protect their reproductive freedom, not have it clawed back by far-right extremists. I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later, I'm still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. Even before the initial Texas decision on mifepristone came down, I took to the Senate floor and called on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring illegitimate rulings and keeping mifepristone on the market. The days and weeks ahead demand vigilance. We must continue to ensure that folks have the correct information about mifepristone, and we have to keep shining a light on the despicable attempts by the GOP to impose their will on the reproductive healthcare decisions of millions of Americans. = Thank you, Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign.
