name: Team AOC
subject: AIPAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This is important.
One of the wealthiest and most powerful conservative PACs in the country is recruiting Democratic primary challengers to defeat Alexandria and six other members of the Squad next year.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231218.zbhbPI&refcode=em20231218-5499-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)
AIPAC doesn’t like that Alexandria supports a bilateral ceasefire in Gaza — even though that’s an opinion shared by 61% of Americans, regardless of political party.1
AIPAC has already found Democratic challengers for Representatives Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, and Ilhan Omar. **Now they’re looking for a challenger for Alexandria.**
We know that AIPAC is going to spend big in 2024 against progressives and we have to be prepared for them to try and defeat Alexandria.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you please help us make sure Alexandria has the resources she needs to stay in Congress with a $5 contribution?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231218.zbhbPI&refcode=em20231218-5499-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231218.zbhbPI&refcode=em20231218-5499-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)**
Thank you so much for your support for a brighter future for all.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

* * *
1: [dataforprogress.org/blog/2023/12/5/voters-want-the-us-to-call-for-a-permanent-ceasefire-in-gaza-and-to-prioritize-diplomacy](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22017?t=22&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231218?refcode=em20231218-5499-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&refcode2=5499_2526796_OwBEV-&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231218-5499-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&akid=5499%2E2526796%2EOwBEV-)**

Hey co-pilot, **It’s the most wonderful time of year again:** cold air coming off the Delaware River, hot chocolate by the fire, and singing along (albeit off-key) to Mariah Carey’s classic ‘All I Want For Christmas Is You.’ ❄️🎶☕ As I look ahead to the new year, I’m reflecting on how far we’ve come since launching this campaign. With Republican extremists attacking our rights, I want to know what issues are at the top of your mind so I can fight for your interests on the campaign trail next year. [This is the last time I’ll ask until 2024, co-pilot. Will you please take a minute to share your thoughts with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75407801/444583931/732541305?ms=EM_FL_EHA_20231218_su_wintersurvey_cand_mf_30da_hdr1_sbt&refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231218_su_wintersurvey_cand_mf_30da_hdr1_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmU2ZjM5ZC1mODlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rzqnHcjAcKgf5i920BLaDTcopTJo6fwBE8zbJ4GpJs=&emci=b72bc559-d39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=02e6f39d-f89d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=5643323) | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75407802/444583933/732541305?ms=EM_FL_EHA_20231218_su_wintersurvey_cand_mf_30da_hdr1_sbt&refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231218_su_wintersurvey_cand_mf_30da_hdr1_sbt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmU2ZjM5ZC1mODlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7rzqnHcjAcKgf5i920BLaDTcopTJo6fwBE8zbJ4GpJs=&emci=b72bc559-d39d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=02e6f39d-f89d-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=5643323)

Ashley 🚁

show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58308?t=6&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58308?t=7&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58308?t=8&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58308?t=9&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58308?t=10&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12129%2E878179%2EeUVWd4) to request fewer emails. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Trump: Immigrants “poisoning the blood of our country”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We can’t sit idly by and let this traitor march back into the White House.
#
Derek,
Let’s make one thing completely clear:
In the United States, our diversity is our strength. For generations, our country has been a beacon of hope for the world. “Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free...”
These words are foundational to the American experience.
But not for Trump. According to him, immigrants are, “poisoning the blood of our country.” Trump ripped these words straight from the speeches of totalitarian dictators and fascists.
And for all of us, alarm bells need to be going off.
We can’t sit idly by and let this traitor march back into the White House. The man who sent an armed mob to storm the Capitol, who called our fallen American heroes “suckers” and “losers”, who has promised to bring authoritarianism to the United States wrapped in an American flag.
This will be the fight of our lives. We have to be ready.
VoteVets is building our infrastructure and capacity to defeat Trump again — for the final time. And we need you with us.
**[Please, chip in to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23.L4YfC7&refcode=em231218-1-30&t=1&akid=22730%2E3013755%2EFSBvM2)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Rebel with a Cause
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
People across the political spectrum realize the system has failed.

|
---
| | | **People across the political spectrum realize the system has failed.**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The American revolution was triggered by the Boston Tea Party, a rebellion against the British empire imposing taxes on New England tea merchants while eliminating taxes on the tea company owned by the British aristocracy. Furious with a blatant violation of their rights to “no taxation without representation,” the colonists boarded the ship carrying the King’s tea and dumped it in Boston Harbor.
In the revolution that followed, America’s citizen soldiers defeated history’s most powerful empire, freed themselves from a corrupt collusion between money and government, and won our independence.
Today, after the failed policies of the Trump and Biden administrations, **the top 1% now owns more of our country’s wealth than the entire 60% in the middle**.
The Trump Biden lockdown economy has saddled us with an unacceptable crisis. Working Americans can no longer afford life in America. Everyday Americans, on average, are borrowing $5000 a year on credit cards to meet their needs.
**We are facing a disparity in income that is downright dystopian. Income inequality today is worse than it was in 1774 before our revolution.**
So we are back to conditions we fought a revolution over. And is that any surprise when we have two parties in Washington who’s elected officials are indentured servants to their corporate donors and who claim to believe in democracy but really only when it’s convenient?
People across the political spectrum realize the system has failed. Our government, subverted by powerful monied interests, no longer works for them. And it has given us an economy that exploits the many to build the outsized wealth of a few in a new, emerging aristocracy.
_That’s why this election is not about “left vs. right” and the same old, tired fights. It’s about all Americans of good will coming together to rebel against a broken, bankrupt system._
**[JOIN THE KENNEDY REBELLION](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=2) **
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=5)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $1,000 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=1000&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=8)
As President, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will end the corrupt merger between state and corporate power that strip mines the assets of the middle class. Kennedy will end the forever wars, invest the peace dividend here at home and restore the American Dream.
While the pack in Washington has been cozying up to their big money donors, Kennedy has fought the corporate takeover of our environment and government for decades. That’s why Time Magazine named him “Hero for the Planet” and why an Independent Robert F. Kennedy Jr is the people’s champion we need in 2024.
Team Kennedy

| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=13) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rebel_12_18_23_email_1_2_nd&n=14)

name: Vicente Gonzalez
subject: My folks didn't ask for handouts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Vicente Gonzalez for Congress Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
Friend,
Living in our region comes with a number of customs and unique experiences that shape our daily lives. I am proud to be from South Texas—the mentality I saw growing up stays with me every day.
First things first, that means working hard and not asking for any handouts. In South Texas, the spirit of resilience and determination is ingrained in us as it was ingrained in me as a child. You see, my father was a veteran and later a small business owner. I grew up working with my dad, putting work over holidays and after-school play.
My parents' mentality of working hard was a driving force in their lives... even as a military family, my folks did not go to the VA for healthcare or any type of support.
This mentality is what informs every decision I make when voting to protect access to quality healthcare, stand up to corporations that are trying to rip us off, and support infrastructure improvements in South Texas.
We need to make sure we keep this voice in Congress and ensure one of the closest districts across the country doesn't go to an extremist who won't stand with working families.
Friend, will you join our movement and support my campaign for re-election to Texas' 34th Congressional District by donating today? Together, we can ensure that the hardworking families, veterans, and students of our community continue to have a strong advocate in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
In unity,
Congressman Vicente Gonzalez
Vicente Gonzalez, a life-long Democrat, is a candidate for Texas’ 34th U.S. Congressional District.
From humble beginnings, Vicente was raised in a military family. Through hard work and pure ganas, Vicente aimed to make something of himself. His mother stressed to him over and over again that education was the key that will open doors of opportunities. Vicente made the decision to get his life back on track by going back to school to get his GED, working and attending classes at community college, and earning his college degree alongside other military families at the Embry Riddle Aeronautical University on the Corpus Christi Naval Air Station. Vicente surpassed his and his parents' dreams when he graduated from Texas A&M School of Law, earning his Juris Doctorate degree.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]
While in law school, Vicente learned how government should work. Through his experience as a Congressional Intern in Washington, D.C., Vicente learned how government really works. After law school, Vicente didn’t stop learning, and continued his training in Negotiation at Harvard University School of Law.
Vicente started his business, the Law Offices of V. Gonzalez and Associates, in McAllen and married Lorena Saenz, a former teacher and administrator in Edinburg and McAllen schools. Vicente has focused his practice on fighting for a level playing field for working families wronged by corporations and insurance companies evading responsibility. Through several victories for our community, Vicente recovered millions in tax dollars for South Texas school districts after shady contractors misspent millions in bond money and put our children in physical danger.
Today, Vicente Gonzalez is fighting for our South Texas values in Congress as a member of the Committees on Financial Services and Foreign Affairs and the Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth. Vicente has stood by our promise to veterans, helping constituents cut through red tape at the VA and working across the aisle to prevent the shameful deportation of our honorably discharged veterans. He’s working to lower prescription drug prices, protect the benefits and healthcare of seniors, and ensure that jobs and opportunities are there for all with the ganas to work.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Vicente Gonzalez for US Congress
PO BOX 6270
Brownsville, TX 78523
JOIN TEAM VICENTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vgonzalez-email?refcode=20231218_em_fr_b1_VG_initial]

name: Goldco

name: John Fetterman
subject: *Seriously* scary stuff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1728%2E35263%2ERIulTp)
Hey, Peter, it’s John. I really need to talk to you about my friend Bob Casey. The 2024 election is approaching fast — and **the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.** Republicans are zeroing in on 2024’s battleground states as we speak. You can bet Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires will spend hundreds of million$ to attack Bob. This is *seriously* scary stuff, but you know what gives ME hope? This amazing grassroots team!!! The way we stopped the GOP in 2022 is the same way we fight back and re-elect Bob now: by bringing together an ✨all-star grassroots team✨ that can stand up to the GOP’s money by folks chipping in $5, $25, or more at a time. Together, we’ll defend PA’s Senate seat, as long as we don’t lose sight of the stakes. **Holding this seat is make-or-break for our Democratic majority.** [**With that in mind...please, Peter, split $10 or more between Tammy Baldwin and Bob’s campaign before the deadline. We need to hit every single fundraising goal between now and Election Day, so I’m asking for yinz guys to dig deep!**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231218_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1728%2E35263%2ERIulTp) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Bob Casey and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-casey.kD9PQC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231218_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1728%2E35263%2ERIulTp)

clean_body: will you join me? | This is unheard of. After my recent campaign launch, I was still significantly short of my goal - almost $3k short, to be exact. We're facing some of our toughest challenges ahead, and our campaign has just begun. We're less than a year away from November 2024, meaning we need to get started NOW if we want to win and stop a complete Leftist takeover! | Now, we need to act fast because the election is creeping up on us faster than ever. We need to be meeting every fundraising deadline from here on out. We can 't slip behind, not even a little bit. EVERY. DOLLAR. COUNTS. My next fundraising deadline is just days away and we need to meet this goal if I want any shot at a win. Thank you for helping me get started. I'm excited to take on November 2024 with you by my side, patriot. - Abe PAID FOR BY ABE FOR ARIZONA Abe for Arizona, Abe for Arizona, P.O. Box 2135, Peoria, AZ 85380 Copyright (C) 2023 Abe for Arizona, All rights reserved.

| | Hi Peter, I’m Adam Stein, Josh’s dad. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75408413/444586051/1536759036?refcode=20231218.2_JS_12AA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIwMTllZi1mYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ub7IEh49B9tXEgDGQj9kd0xEpb818E8bh109LnSJ68E=)
---
I’m so proud of him and so grateful that so many of you have joined our team. We are working hard to ensure Josh is North Carolina’s next governor. [**_Defeating Josh’s extremist GOP opponents won’t be easy. Together, we can do it. Pitch in any amount to say you’re with Josh and the GA Dems._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75408414/444586052/1536759036?refcode=20231218.2_JS_12AA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIwMTllZi1mYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ub7IEh49B9tXEgDGQj9kd0xEpb818E8bh109LnSJ68E=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75408415/444586053/1536759036?refcode=20231218.2_JS_12AA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIwMTllZi1mYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ub7IEh49B9tXEgDGQj9kd0xEpb818E8bh109LnSJ68E=)
---
**My wife Jane and I taught our kids that it’s important to fight for what’s right, even if it isn’t easy.** Back in the mid-1960s, my partners and I founded North Carolina’s first integrated law firm. We fought for civil rights and against segregation and discrimination. We faced intense resistance. Racist extremists firebombed our firm’s offices. We continued fighting to vindicate people’s civil rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75408416/444586054/1536759036?refcode=20231218.2_JS_12AA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIwMTllZi1mYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ub7IEh49B9tXEgDGQj9kd0xEpb818E8bh109LnSJ68E=)
---
Now, new extremists are working to undo so much of the progress we’ve made for civil rights, women’s rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more.

**Right-wing extremism is a threat to the values we share, Peter, but I know that Josh is ready to hold the line and fight for what’s right. But to succeed, he needs your help.**

[**_Josh and his GOP opponent are neck-and-neck in the polls. We can’t afford to let the outcome of this race come down to chance. Josh urgently needs your support NOW to deliver a victory for North Carolina. We can’t wait. Rush a split donation to Josh’s team and the GA Dems NOW._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75408417/444586055/1536759036?refcode=20231218.2_JS_12AA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTIwMTllZi1mYTlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ub7IEh49B9tXEgDGQj9kd0xEpb818E8bh109LnSJ68E=)

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I’m Adam Stein, Josh’s dad. | = I’m so proud of him and so grateful that so many of you have joined our team. We are working hard to ensure Josh is North Carolina’s next governor. = = My wife Jane and I taught our kids that it’s important to fight for what’s right, even if it isn’t easy. Back in the mid-1960s, my partners and I founded North Carolina’s first integrated law firm. We fought for civil rights and against segregation and discrimination. We faced intense resistance. Racist extremists firebombed our firm’s offices. We continued fighting to vindicate people’s civil rights. = Now, new extremists are working to undo so much of the progress we’ve made for civil rights, women’s rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more. Right-wing extremism is a threat to the values we share, Peter, but I know that Josh is ready to hold the line and fight for what’s right. But to succeed, he needs your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Adam Stein | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

subject: “It is a win for voters.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, the NDRC is the nation’s only centralized hub for executing a comprehensive redistricting strategy, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete.

**[_Our work is powered by grassroots donations from supporters like you._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408585/444586629/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231218_FR_12J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4MmY0MTU4LWZiOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UqF3hTAUoxtlPDhmFeH5vrOTMDHgCuiyDHd-OUmz9WA=) Together, we’re making real headway in the fight for fair maps and a strong democracy.** | **FIRST:**
Ahead of the 2022 midterm elections, our work helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last forty years.”

**BUT THEN:**
We didn’t stop there – instead, we continued fighting to eliminate gerrymandering across the country.

Over the summer, our movement helped achieve critical wins for fair maps in states like Alabama, Georgia and Louisiana.

**AND NOW:**
Before the 2024 election, there are as many as nine congressional districts across seven states that could be redrawn – enough to swing control of the House of Representatives!

[**_Donate now to support the nationwide fight for fair maps >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408586/444586630/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231218_FR_12J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4MmY0MTU4LWZiOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UqF3hTAUoxtlPDhmFeH5vrOTMDHgCuiyDHd-OUmz9WA=)

Team, our movement has proven that we have what it takes to combat map manipulation and hand power back to the people. We’re hoping we can count on your continued support ahead of a highly consequential election.
**“Each one of these recent wins for fair maps . . . is a win for a more representative democracy. It is a win for voters.

Our movement has been fighting for fairness state by state – we are playing the righteous, long game.”

– Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr.**

clean_body: | Team, the NDRC is the nation’s only centralized hub for executing a comprehensive redistricting strategy, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. = Together, we’re making real headway in the fight for fair maps and a strong democracy. | FIRST: Ahead of the 2022 midterm elections, our work helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last forty years.” BUT THEN: We didn’t stop there – instead, we continued fighting to eliminate gerrymandering across the country. Over the summer, our movement helped achieve critical wins for fair maps in states like Alabama, Georgia and Louisiana. AND NOW: Before the 2024 election, there are as many as nine congressional districts across seven states that could be redrawn – enough to swing control of the House of Representatives! = Team, our movement has proven that we have what it takes to combat map manipulation and hand power back to the people. We’re hoping we can count on your continued support ahead of a highly consequential election. “Each one of these recent wins for fair maps . . . is a win for a more representative democracy. It is a win for voters. Our movement has been fighting for fairness state by state – we are playing the righteous, long game.” – Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| Dan Rowe from the Jane Fonda Climate PAC team here. As we approach Jane’s 86th birthday, I’m reaching out to invite you to a special celebration — a tribute to an extraordinary leader who has inspired us all.

In the past year-and-a-half with the team, I’ve witnessed firsthand the profound impact Jane has on those around her. And I know I’m not the only one: in case you missed it over the weekend, renowned artist Shepard Fairey recently shared this illustration based on Jane’s iconic 1970 mugshot photo and inspired by her decades of relentless action for justice.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408685/444586934/420108225?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-12-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTc3MmExLWZiOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nc-fFEttsVn2QPGJouhIN0ATvCsHHJB2bPtvRJ-SNwc=)
To share this appreciation far and wide, we’re now offering T-Shirts, Hoodies, Stickers, Tote bags, and more featuring this stunning new piece. [_**Click here to check out the items on offer — every contribution will go directly to supporting our work to elect climate champions.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408686/444586935/420108225?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-12-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTc3MmExLWZiOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nc-fFEttsVn2QPGJouhIN0ATvCsHHJB2bPtvRJ-SNwc=)

While you’re there, you can also share a message for Jane! We will share every message with her on her Birthday.

Jane has dedicated her life to the fight to protect our planet and hold the fossil fuel industry accountable for its role in the climate crisis, and I’m honored to work with such an inspiring leader. I hope you’ll join me in our Appreciating Jane campaign today! [_**Check out the Act for Justice illustration merchandise and share a personal message with Jane at AppreciatingJane.com today!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408687/444586936/420108225?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-12-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YTc3MmExLWZiOWQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nc-fFEttsVn2QPGJouhIN0ATvCsHHJB2bPtvRJ-SNwc=)
Thank you for joining the celebration,

Dan Rowe

clean_body: As we approach Jane’s 86th birthday, I’m reaching out to invite you to a special celebration — a tribute to an extraordinary leader who has inspired us all. | = | Dan Rowe from the Jane Fonda Climate PAC team here. As we approach Jane’s 86th birthday, I’m reaching out to invite you to a special celebration — a tribute to an extraordinary leader who has inspired us all. In the past year-and-a-half with the team, I’ve witnessed firsthand the profound impact Jane has on those around her. And I know I’m not the only one: in case you missed it over the weekend, renowned artist Shepard Fairey recently shared this illustration based on Jane’s iconic 1970 mugshot photo and inspired by her decades of relentless action for justice. = To share this appreciation far and wide, we’re now offering T-Shirts, Hoodies, Stickers, Tote bags, and more featuring this stunning new piece. = While you’re there, you can also share a message for Jane! We will share every message with her on her Birthday. Jane has dedicated her life to the fight to protect our planet and hold the fossil fuel industry accountable for its role in the climate crisis, and I’m honored to work with such an inspiring leader. I hope you’ll join me in our Appreciating Jane campaign today! = Thank you for joining the celebration, Dan Rowe Director of Organizing and Digital Engagement, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A note I recently received:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=931%2E135344%2EHyX9l4)

Today, I wanted to put some names and faces to a huge part of our fundraising: the small dollar donor. When I talk about building a team of grassroots supporters, this is what I mean:
**Rohn in Lansing gave $5 this month.** I’ve been his Member of Congress for four years. It has been such an honor to represent Lansing in the U.S. House of Representatives, and I am so grateful for the support of this community in my race for statewide office.
**Ann in Benton Harbor contributed $35 back in August.** I had just visited Benton Harbor. I’ve met voters there in a rented restaurant, and people are fired up about 2024. Thank you for your support!
**Gerald from Detroit donated $100 last week.** I don’t know him and don’t believe we’ve met, but I have loved getting to know voters in Detroit and spending so much time in the city.
It’s people like Rohn, Ann, Gerald, and you who make up the critical foundation of this campaign. At the risk of sounding like a broken record, it really is these $5, $35, $100 donations that make up the building blocks of our team – and help set the course for how early we can hire more staff, go up on TV, and do the critical work of reaching voters.
[**I’m so thankful to everyone who has given so far, and if you’re able, I would love to earn your support today so we can continue building the strongest damn Senate campaign Michigan has ever seen!](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231218-2-NOR&t=2&akid=931%2E135344%2EHyX9l4)**

Peter,

It's Tim Sheehy. As a Navy SEAL, I proudly completed several deployments and hundreds of missions in defense of our freedoms and way of life.

But those freedoms are under attack here on our own soil. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring to serve our country again, this time in the U.S. Senate.

Here's the thing - I need a team to help me achieve this mission. _**We have less than 365 days until Election Day**_ , and if we're going to retire a career politician for good and put America First, our mission must begin now.

**[Just $1 from 1,000 donors will help keep this campaign running for another day,](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f59c07a7e31441eba65306636331e567&_e=ULHxP50u5ZdaLtwD6E6xoU9cqy39blgdgbV-6sDHlb97ODrSUWvA5IXV81yv0AOiiuvgF1xbsnQieXOTVEN7G8fTPprTPKJISfg-ze00DrYDexWI3DjjTQa9WnEVNTDFJCSeKfp0rcVqgPybOps2yQH2prdlOnuXbDQ4ZwucjEpHBtfKvMKHzKgfbD-uAokSl74WN1iXrE7lIoqN6Z7IdzIVNAjQs8o48mFBlp61lAvBza9Ss5bkBLY0iUo8m357U-q8Pw1-RJ63kHYW-51An9QmNuMiLq3gpw3VwKm5lvZtL89E1UcxPVF4wrBrzVKDIXwRtcEw_UPFnT24MbeYTzBI4dqOyk8suMDTvZRknFsCjq0AeVJiJyz0aogo2W_Cfi6KD4yiqTbY_IoWUwjGvTBHa5Jiv5Qoqbj1VcT9xFY%3D)** so if you are willing to join me on this mission, will you chip in just $1 or more before the end of the day?

We MUST defeat David Trone in the MD Senate race. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75408903/444587758/188368918?refcode=20231218_AlsobrooksSplit_v1s1&sourceid=1052583&refcode2=WTEFHL34&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmUyOTNmMC1mYzlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e9_mzbgX3UqOg7OmbwksjKYxTLCHkf7BD7wrGiWxj7c=) Peter, take a guess at how much money Angela Alsobrooks's self-funding billionaire opponent has already spent on advertising so far in Maryland's open-seat Senate race.

He's already spent _**$11 MILLION**_. And that's with _months_ to go before Maryland's primary. But that's just the beginning. He and his private company have donated nearly $500,000 to anti-choice politicians nationwide. He sent $11,000 to Ken Paxton, the Republican Texas Attorney General who was recently in the news for making sure a Texas woman couldn't get an abortion after a devastating and dangerous medical diagnosis.

Angela doesn't have personal wealth to pour into her campaign to run expensive ads to millions of Marylanders. Running against a billionaire, _especially_ a billionaire who is misleading the public about his anti-choice donation history, will take A LOT of resources.

**But fortunately, elections aren't won by the highest bidder.**

When it comes to grassroots momentum, we're the wealthy ones — because **we know we can count on our supporters to help us prepare for this fight.**

[**Your contribution will help set the record straight. Maryland deserves pro-choice leadership in the Senate. clean_body: We MUST defeat David Trone in the MD Senate race. | = Peter, take a guess at how much money Angela Alsobrooks's self-funding billionaire opponent has already spent on advertising so far in Maryland's open-seat Senate race. He's already spent $11 MILLION. And that's with months to go before Maryland's primary. But that's just the beginning. He and his private company have donated nearly $500,000 to anti-choice politicians nationwide. He sent $11,000 to Ken Paxton, the Republican Texas Attorney General who was recently in the news for making sure a Texas woman couldn't get an abortion after a devastating and dangerous medical diagnosis. Angela doesn't have personal wealth to pour into her campaign to run expensive ads to millions of Marylanders. Running against a billionaire, especially a billionaire who is misleading the public about his anti-choice donation history, will take A LOT of resources. But fortunately, elections aren't won by the highest bidder. When it comes to grassroots momentum, we're the wealthy ones — because we know we can count on our supporters to help us prepare for this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Alsobrooks EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Tomorrow is a *very* special day, team: It’s Lauren Boebert’s 37th birthday. For the last three years, Boebert has used her office to spread dangerous conspiracy theories and go all-in on Donald Trump’s agenda. Boebert has made it clear that she’s only in it for herself. So we have a *great* surprise in store for her. After winning by just **_0.13%_** last year, Boebert is up for reelection again in 2024 — and the most recent poll has her Democratic challenger **_AHEAD by 2 points!_** We’re determined to defeat her and restore servant leadership in CO-03. **[Will you pitch in $5.46 to help us invest in get-out-the-vote efforts across Colorado?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75409074/444588166/-486953699?amount=5.46&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2YxNDljOS1mZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-Tt82pjy7wT32Q6rHSom0WdA2-KQk1iWpB6v4yyMxo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5.46 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75409075/444588167/-486953699?amount=5.46&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20231218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2YxNDljOS1mZDlkLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-Tt82pjy7wT32Q6rHSom0WdA2-KQk1iWpB6v4yyMxo=)

For the last three years, Boebert has used her office to spread dangerous conspiracy theories and go all-in on Donald Trump’s agenda. Boebert has made it clear that she’s only in it for herself. So we have a great surprise in store for her. We’ve seen over and over again that the goal of billionaire CEOs and big corporations is to just keep hoarding profits for themselves — no matter the cost to working families like ours. But we’re fighting back, and in 2023, workers from the United Auto Workers, to the Teamsters, to the Writers Guild of America, to SAG-AFTRA actors, and so many others across the country won historic victories that will protect jobs and ensure that working people are safe and paid fairly on the job. And in 2024, we’re not letting up. We’re organizing year-round to make our country work for everyone, not just the wealthy few — and elect more candidates who will fight for all of us. Next year, we will have major opportunities to reshape our communities for the better by supporting worker power and electing WFP champions to federal, state, and local office nationwide. But to do that, we need the support of people like you giving what you can to help fuel our movement. **[Can you pitch in any amount right now? clean_body: | | | Peter, This holiday season, we want to give you a gift to say thank you for everything you do to help grow our grassroots movement. We’ve seen over and over again that the goal of billionaire CEOs and big corporations is to just keep hoarding profits for themselves — no matter the cost to working families like ours. But we’re fighting back, and in 2023, workers from the United Auto Workers, to the Teamsters, to the Writers Guild of America, to SAG-AFTRA actors, and so many others across the country won historic victories that will protect jobs and ensure that working people are safe and paid fairly on the job. And in 2024, we’re not letting up. We’re organizing year-round to make our country work for everyone, not just the wealthy few — and elect more candidates who will fight for all of us. Next year, we will have major opportunities to reshape our communities for the better by supporting worker power and electing WFP champions to federal, state, and local office nationwide. But to do that, we need the support of people like you giving what you can to help fuel our movement. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

How? I explain.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=CCzDaZ-Hu3PW56d-ZbPFB7UmyK-EwVWb_64obUyBvcM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Y5T24tSExoNj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)_**

| | Save America- Read Your Bible DAILY
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | No religion, no church, no leader is going to save America. But reading the Bible daily will! I'll explain.[Surveys](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=OW598LS9AjycbieR00yLtNVdHd3zz4XVmsOPnbbm1ws.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGlzdGEuY29tL3N0YXRpc3RpY3MvMjk5NDMzL2JpYmxlLXJlYWRlcnNoaXAtaW4tdGhlLXVzYS8iLCJyIjoiZGZiZmRiYTQtNDE0YS00NjUwLWQ2MjEtMGNkNTQ1NGY1M2JmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjEzNWZkNDYtOTkyYS00MjhiLWE5YzAtMmYwNGQ5ODA1NWNlIn0) says that as of 2021 only about 11% of Americans read their Bible daily. But as of 2023 I found a [survey](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=6iE-rTssdiURH2nOp0n3mKnaK7Mf0usFDpjJ_NNePgU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3RiLnJlc2VhcmNoLmJpYmxlLyIsInIiOiJkZmJmZGJhNC00MTRhLTQ2NTAtZDYyMS0wY2Q1NDU0ZjUzYmYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ) that said it’s up to 29%!Our History is rife with why America was founded (religious freedom), how is was founded (upon Scripture), how our Legislation was formed (The 10 Commandments) and that even our [first book for public education](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=dDg_tVapnnX4JHkQPQUqtfG0sd_nKyRAXnlSuCpjzZ8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hcmNoaXZlLm9yZy9kZXRhaWxzL3VuaXRlZHN0YXRlc3NjaG8wMG5ld3lpYWxhL3BhZ2UvMTAvbW9kZS8ydXA_cmVmPW9sJnZpZXc9dGhlYXRlciIsInIiOiJkZmJmZGJhNC00MTRhLTQ2NTAtZDYyMS0wY2Q1NDU0ZjUzYmYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ) had Scripture as front and center. Yes, our Founding Fathers and Americans used to read the Bible daily.Do you want to save America? We must get back to that routine! First thing in the morning- Read your Bible.How to do this successfully- [READ HERE](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=-eEfHMHwZi0Uo3Vh0TEF1Ey3VyQFNxsPKwo5uuRyoA4.)And if you are like me and require a book in your hands to read, please look into getting “The Founders Bible”! [Click Here ](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=rQpPlbYEvGOESRvUOBBbYlagNfMrpwnKFp_f-6U1ku8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmb3VuZGVyc2JpYmxlLmNvbS8iLCJyIjoiZGZiZmRiYTQtNDE0YS00NjUwLWQ2MjEtMGNkNTQ1NGY1M2JmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjEzNWZkNDYtOTkyYS00MjhiLWE5YzAtMmYwNGQ5ODA1NWNlIn0)I have one and cannot express enough how much American historical information is contained alongside Scripture. It’s absolutely mind boggling how little of our true history we actually know.Want more? Biblical Citizenship class is a must. Churches need to provide these classes for their congregation- A MUST! If we are ever going to become a United America again with a united church that actually stands against what is wrong in our society. Extremists have demolished our church going Americans into Doormat Christians, and our education system and Main Stream Media have dumbed us down into couch potatoes who cannot critically think for ourselves. [CLICK HERE FOR CLASS INFO](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=JplcKfAvxztfUDOQIHpF-vLQydtEbUouRyp_9rA1NwM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdGFjYWRlbXkuY29tL2JpYmxpY2FsY2l0aXplbnNoaXAvIiwiciI6ImRmYmZkYmE0LTQxNGEtNDY1MC1kNjIxLTBjZDU0NTRmNTNiZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9) *for your church or for you to do a little class at home with your friends and neighbors* :)Since 1962 when the [Supreme Court said prayer in school was Unconstitutional](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9On-HLh6/c?w=JCBUIP3lWVsMjHNyhe-sTAjl8cZB93glz6dBXQ8-uJg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9maXJzdGFtZW5kbWVudC5tdHN1LmVkdS9hcnRpY2xlL2VuZ2VsLXYtdml0YWxlLyIsInIiOiJkZmJmZGJhNC00MTRhLTQ2NTAtZDYyMS0wY2Q1NDU0ZjUzYmYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJiMTM1ZmQ0Ni05OTJhLTQyOGItYTljMC0yZjA0ZDk4MDU1Y2UifQ), America has seen a HUGE DECLINE in morals, values, ethics, but to put a measurement onto that statement look at: The Economy, Education, Crime, Monetary Value, Movies/TV Shows, and Legislation have all abysmally declined over the past several decades. And continues to decline with no end in site. Just ask someone “What is a woman?”When we are not reading our Bibles and when our leaders are not reading the Bible, everything declines because the world is based on what is “right” in your own head. I certainly cannot do one good thing without divine intervention, how about you?So lets Save America together. Read your Bible daily, one chapter at a time, start TODAY. No reason to wait for the New Year! Save America, read your Bible DAILY.Yes, this is My Motto for 2024. Merry Christmas and God bless!Dalila

Team,

I wanted to reach out personally and let everyone know that we only have one more chance to make up ground and build a war chest, so this campaign has the best chance possible to unseat President Biden’s strongest supporter **— Sherrod Brown.**

Ohio is the best chance we have to take back the Senate, but the simple fact is we’ve got a lot of work to do before Election Day. [**This campaign relies on grassroots support, and the next few months could be the deciding factor in victory or defeat.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f404285dc6194a80ad9bd92832f2b648&_e=64qii5MdQNx499DPSd46R71fsj1yjwsIkC8FJaAG-0DEsg3Myg-lXosb0tKpucmvTr06HEipITNaldT0gK2Nl1zJemGEQjOc8xWlWCHrFz3IhnQh6HWpUEVXFY-JUbBwHsxFqctqELhqg9Y-xbx6emNXesPSd2d9OSbTM-usI2qfjen5M7zR15uuS4yPfNgKHEKe_n34lAVTHEd6uh-YrzncndDpURusNx6YEVFH2g96wD23c-r0t_DY8_AsYvxfoW9zl0PKM9PDjbbYYxQA6RjG08NeEOIdiKOMd6PAqT8KlwSrCfdQLnaw9Juwqm88ekTRPz99ohuWIwrZudmkZtppb7fox4N_t1WZB00eVuPTsFg-p7_ZNeuzTyKb9ZqEhN0TQKm8gs7cwrK3j02ESpNkilHO8T0Er7R4KwFzQdydjaZ-KW7AkPtwKeeA6trBG0HNIr9ZWrJbDBRsK6rX6bOAMVnVoB3Qm5wacRI-h3abHZpwueiLTTrZS_N5GX3EAI_vwo4pjJ5VNDMWcOPwEqjpQcV7ljCKAH-RWLL8E1bJFQJ_1ciRBF9ajci02JF9)

clean_body: Emergency Deadline. | Team, I’ll make this short. My emergency deadline didn’t pan out as I hoped. I wanted to reach out personally and let everyone know that we only have one more chance to make up ground and build a war chest, so this campaign has the best chance possible to unseat President Biden’s strongest supporter — Sherrod Brown. Ohio is the best chance we have to take back the Senate, but the simple fact is we’ve got a lot of work to do before Election Day. For the next thirty minutes, I’m extending my deadline for the last time. | Best, Matt Dolan | Matt Dolan is running for U.S. Senate in Ohio he needs YOUR HELP. Rush a contribution below! | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Hill Harper
subject: Reproductive health and freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I was raised in a long line of medical professionals, and my admiration and passion for health care means I can’t sit still while reproductive rights are under attack.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231218&t=1&akid=726%2E62735%2ERjYJVa)
Peter, I want to share a little more about my background with you today. My upbringing has helped guide my values and my passions since I was a child.
I was born into a family where stethoscopes and lab coats were symbols of dedication and service — which has instilled in me a deep sanctity for the medical profession.
My parents are both doctors, and my grandparents also devoted their lives to medicine.
That’s why healthcare has been such an important issue for me as I launched our campaign. There can be no ifs, ands, or buts about where we stand on healthcare and especially reproductive rights.
**Championing healthcare rights is nothing short of heroic and reproductive rights are a key part of that. Abortion access is an integral part of medical care and a fundamental right.**
I hope that I can not only make my parents and grandparents proud, but YOU as well by going to Washington to fight to protect abortion rights in Michigan and across the country.
[**But I can’t do it without you. Can you chip in anything you can as we fundraise for our end-of-quarter goal of $50,000?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231218?amount=5&refcode=em20231218-726&refcode2=726_62735_RjYJVa&akid=726%2E62735%2ERjYJVa)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231218?amount=5&refcode=em20231218-726&refcode2=726_62735_RjYJVa&akid=726%2E62735%2ERjYJVa)**
Thank you for your support today and every day,
Hill 💙
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231218&t=2&refcode2=726_62735_RjYJVa&akid=726%2E62735%2ERjYJVa)**

Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

In case you missed it, here’s what happened:

Mike Garcia sold up to $50,000 in Boeing stock just weeks before his congressional committee released a “damning” report on the company following a string of deadly crashes.

**As a member of Congress, Garcia was legally obligated to report this transaction within 45 days – but he waited TWO MONTHS to report the trade, after the 2020 election where he won by a narrow 333 vote margin.**

We’re sick and tired of Garcia’s games. CA-27 deserves so much better, and that’s why we’re raising an emergency $20,000 response fund to reach more undecided voters with our message.

**[It’s time to expose Garcia’s corruption and oust him from Congress. If you’re with us, can we count on you to chip in $3 or any amount right now?
